papers.title: From Fuzzy to Formal: Scaling Hospital Quality Improvement with AI
papers.abstract: Hospital Quality Improvement (QI) plays a critical role in optimizing healthcare delivery by translating high-level hospital goals into actionable solutions. A critical step of QI is to identify the key modifiable contributing factors, a process we call QI factor discovery, typically through expert-driven semi-structured qualitative tools like fishbone diagrams, chart reviews, and Lean Healthcare methods. AI has the potential to transform and accelerate QI factor discovery, which is traditionally time- and resource-intensive and limited in reproducibility and auditability. Nevertheless, current AI alignment methods assume the task is well-defined, whereas QI factor discovery is an exploratory, fuzzy, and iterative sense-making process that relies on complex implicit expert judgments. To design an AI pipeline that formalizes the QI process while preserving its exploratory components, we propose viewing the task as learning not only LLM prompts but also the overarching natural-language specifications. In particular, we map QI factor discovery to steps of the classical AI/ML development process (problem formalization, model learning, and model validation) where the specifications are tunable hyperparameters. Domain experts and AI agents iteratively refine both the overarching specifications and AI pipeline until AI extractions are concordant with expert annotations and aligned with clinical objectives. We applied this "Human-AI Spec-Solution Co-optimization" framework at an urban safety-net hospital to identify factors driving prolonged length of stay and unplanned 30-day readmissions. The resulting AI-for-QI pipelines achieved $\ge 70\%$ concordance with expert annotations. Compared to prior manual Lean analyses, the AI pipeline was substantially more efficient, recovered previous findings, surfaced new modifiable factors, and produced auditable reasoning traces.

analysis.tldr: 提出人机协同的规范-方案联合优化框架，将医院质量改进中的模糊因素发现过程形式化为AI/ML开发流程，并在安全网医院取得≥70%专家一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 医院质量改进（QI）中的因素发现传统上依赖专家驱动的半结构化定性工具，耗时耗力且缺乏可重复性和可审计性，AI有潜力加速该过程，但现有对齐方法假设任务定义明确，而QI因素发现是探索性、模糊且迭代的，需要复杂隐性专家判断。
analysis.problem: 如何设计AI流程在保留探索性成分的同时形式化QI因素发现过程，使AI提取与专家标注一致并符合临床目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出“人机协同规范-方案联合优化”框架，将QI因素发现映射到经典AI/ML开发流程（问题形式化、模型学习、模型验证），其中规范作为可调超参数，领域专家和AI智能体迭代优化规范与AI流程直至一致。
contributions: 提出将QI因素发现形式化为AI/ML开发流程的新视角，并引入可调自然语言规范作为超参数。
设计人机协同的规范-方案联合优化框架，在真实医院场景中验证有效性，实现≥70%专家一致性，提升效率并发现新可修改因素。
analysis.experiments: 在安全网医院针对住院时间延长和30天非计划再入院两个QI任务进行应用，AI流程与专家标注一致性≥70%，相比人工精益分析更高效，复现了先前发现并发现了新因素。
limitations: 可能依赖专家参与迭代，扩展性有待验证。
仅在一个医院的两个任务上验证，泛化性需更多场景测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将AI对齐扩展到模糊探索性任务，真实应用验证有效，但技术细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出人机协同的规范-方案联合优化框架，将医院质量改进中的模糊因素发现过程形式化为AI/ML开发流程，并在安全网医院取得≥70%专家一致性。

papers.title: Information Aggregation with AI Agents
papers.abstract: Can Large Language Models (AI agents) aggregate dispersed private information through trading and reason about the knowledge of others by observing price movements? We conduct a controlled experiment where AI agents trade in a prediction market after receiving private signals, measuring information aggregation by the log error of the last price. We find that although the median market is effective at aggregating information in the easy information structures, increasing the complexity has a significant and negative impact, suggesting that AI agents may suffer from similar limitations as humans when reasoning about others. Consistent with our theoretical predictions, information aggregation remains unaffected by allowing cheap talk communication, changing the duration of the market or initial price, and strategic prompting, thus demonstrating that prediction markets are robust. We establish that "smarter" AI agents perform better at aggregation and they are more profitable. Surprisingly, giving them feedback about past performance has no impact on aggregation.

analysis.tldr: AI agents在预测市场中聚合信息的效果受信息复杂度影响，但市场机制本身具有鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 研究AI agent在分散信息聚合中的能力，特别是其推理他人知识的能力，对于理解AI在复杂社会交互中的表现至关重要。
analysis.problem: AI agent能否通过交易聚合分散的私有信息，以及信息复杂度如何影响这一过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：在简单信息结构下，中位数市场能有效聚合信息；但增加复杂度会显著降低聚合效果，表明AI agent在推理他人时可能面临类似人类的局限。此外，廉价交谈、市场时长、初始价格和策略提示均不影响聚合，而更智能的agent表现更好且更盈利，但反馈过去表现无影响。
analysis.method: 通过控制实验，让AI agent在预测市场中交易，接收私有信号后观察价格变动，以最后价格的对数误差衡量信息聚合效果。
contributions: 首次通过实验验证AI agent在预测市场中聚合信息的能力及其受复杂度的影响。
发现市场机制（如廉价交谈、时长等）对聚合效果具有鲁棒性，而agent智能水平是关键因素。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了实验设计和主要发现。
limitations: 实验可能仅基于特定类型的AI agent（如LLM），结论的泛化性有限。
未探讨不同市场设计或agent架构对聚合效果的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 研究AI agent在预测市场中的信息聚合能力，具有新颖性和实际意义，但实验细节有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI agents在预测市场中聚合信息的效果受信息复杂度影响，但市场机制本身具有鲁棒性。

papers.title: AgenticRecTune: Multi-Agent with Self-Evolving Skillhub for Recommendation System Optimization
papers.abstract: Modern large-scale recommendation systems are typically constructed as multi-stage pipelines, encompassing pre-ranking, ranking, and re-ranking phases. While traditional recommendation research typically focuses on optimizing a specific model, such as improving the pre-ranking model structure or ranking models training algorithm, system-level configurations optimization play a crucial role, which integrates the output from each model head to get the final score in each stage. Due to the complexity of the system, the configuration optimization is highly important and challenging. Any model modification requires new optimal system-level configurations. But each experimental iteration requires significant tuning effort. Furthermore, models in different stage operates within a distinct context and optimizes for different targets, requiring specialized domain expertise. In addition, optimization success depends on balancing competing multiple online metrics and alignment with shifting production development objectives. To address these challenges, we propose AgenticRecTune, an agentic framework comprising five specialized agents, Actor, Critic, Insight, Skill, and Online, designed to manage the end-to-end configuration optimization workflow. By leveraging the advanced reasoning of Large Language Models (LLMs), specifically Gemini, AgenticRecTune explore the optimal configuration spaces. The Actor Agent proposes multiple candidates and Critic Agent filters out suboptimal proposals.Then Online Agent autonomously prepares A/B tests based on the proposed configurations set from the Critic Agent and captures the subsequencet experimental results. We also introduce a self-evolving Skillhub, which utilizes a collaboration between the Insight Agent and Skill Agent to summarize the history results, extract underlying mechanics of each task in recommendation system and update skills.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体框架AgenticRecTune，利用LLM推理和自进化技能库优化推荐系统多阶段配置。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代推荐系统是多阶段流水线，系统级配置优化至关重要但极具挑战：模型修改需重新调优，不同阶段模型目标不同需领域知识，且需平衡多个在线指标并与业务目标对齐。
analysis.problem: 推荐系统多阶段流水线（预排序、排序、重排序）中，系统级配置优化困难，现有方法依赖人工调参，效率低且难以适应模型变化和业务目标偏移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AgenticRecTune框架，包含五个专用智能体（Actor、Critic、Insight、Skill、Online），利用LLM（Gemini）推理探索最优配置空间；Actor生成候选，Critic过滤次优，Online自动进行A/B测试；并引入自进化Skillhub，由Insight和Skill智能体协作总结历史结果、提取任务机制并更新技能。
contributions: 提出多智能体框架AgenticRecTune，实现推荐系统配置优化的端到端自动化。
引入自进化Skillhub，通过智能体协作从历史实验中提取可复用技能，持续提升优化效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖LLM推理质量，可能受限于模型能力。
多智能体协作的通信开销和稳定性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（多智能体+自进化技能库），但摘要未提供实验验证，影响和深度待确认。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体框架AgenticRecTune，利用LLM推理和自进化技能库优化推荐系统多阶段配置。

papers.title: PASTA: A Patch-Agnostic Twofold-Stealthy Backdoor Attack on Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have achieved remarkable success across vision tasks, yet recent studies show they remain vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Existing patch-wise attacks typically assume a single fixed trigger location during inference to maximize trigger attention. However, they overlook the self-attention mechanism in ViTs, which captures long-range dependencies across patches. In this work, we observe that a patch-wise trigger can achieve high attack effectiveness when activating backdoors across neighboring patches, a phenomenon we term the Trigger Radiating Effect (TRE). We further find that inter-patch trigger insertion during training can synergistically enhance TRE compared to single-patch insertion. Prior ViT-specific attacks that maximize trigger attention often sacrifice visual and attention stealthiness, making them detectable. Based on these insights, we propose PASTA, a twofold stealthy patch-wise backdoor attack in both pixel and attention domains. PASTA enables backdoor activation when the trigger is placed at arbitrary patches during inference. To achieve this, we introduce a multi-location trigger insertion strategy to enhance TRE. However, preserving stealthiness while maintaining strong TRE is challenging, as TRE is weakened under stealthy constraints. We therefore formulate a bi-level optimization problem and propose an adaptive backdoor learning framework, where the model and trigger iteratively adapt to each other to avoid local optima. Extensive experiments show that PASTA achieves 99.13% attack success rate across arbitrary patches on average, while significantly improving visual and attention stealthiness (144.43x and 18.68x) and robustness (2.79x) against state-of-the-art ViT defenses across four datasets, outperforming CNN- and ViT-based baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种针对视觉Transformer的补丁无关双重隐蔽后门攻击方法PASTA，利用触发辐射效应实现任意位置触发的高成功率攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有针对ViT的后门攻击通常假设推理时触发位置固定，且牺牲了视觉和注意力隐蔽性，容易被检测。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种补丁无关的、在像素和注意力域均保持隐蔽的后门攻击方法，同时保持高攻击成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到补丁触发器在相邻补丁间激活后门时存在触发辐射效应（TRE），且训练时跨补丁插入触发器可协同增强TRE。
analysis.method: 提出PASTA，包含多位置触发插入策略增强TRE，并通过双层优化自适应后门学习框架，使模型和触发器迭代适应以保持隐蔽性。
contributions: 首次提出针对ViT的补丁无关双重隐蔽后门攻击，支持推理时任意位置触发。
发现并利用触发辐射效应（TRE），提出多位置触发插入策略增强TRE。
设计自适应后门学习框架，通过双层优化平衡攻击效果与隐蔽性。
analysis.experiments: 在四个数据集上，PASTA平均达到99.13%的攻击成功率，视觉隐蔽性提升144.43倍，注意力隐蔽性提升18.68倍，鲁棒性提升2.79倍，优于CNN和ViT基线。
limitations: 可能对特定防御策略的鲁棒性有限。
双层优化计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，对ViT安全有重要贡献，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种针对视觉Transformer的补丁无关双重隐蔽后门攻击方法PASTA，利用触发辐射效应实现任意位置触发的高成功率攻击。

papers.title: Gaussians on a Diet: High-Quality Memory-Bounded 3D Gaussian Splatting Training
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized novel view synthesis with high-quality rendering through continuous aggregations of millions of 3D Gaussian primitives. However, it suffers from a substantial memory footprint, particularly during training due to uncontrolled densification, posing a critical bottleneck for deployment on memory-constrained edge devices. While existing methods prune redundant Gaussians post-training, they fail to address the peak memory spikes caused by the abrupt growth of Gaussians early in the training process. To solve the training memory consumption problem, we propose a systematic memory-bounded training framework that dynamically optimizes Gaussians through iterative growth and pruning. In other words, the proposed framework alternates between incremental pruning of low-impact Gaussians and strategic growing of new primitives with an adaptive Gaussian compensation, maintaining a near-constant low memory usage while progressively refining rendering fidelity. We comprehensively evaluate the proposed training framework on various real-world datasets under strict memory constraints, showing significant improvements over existing state-of-the-art methods. Particularly, our proposed method practically enables memory-efficient 3DGS training on NVIDIA Jetson AGX Xavier, achieving similar visual quality with up to 80% lower peak training memory consumption than the original 3DGS.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种内存受限的3D高斯泼溅训练框架，通过迭代生长与剪枝在低内存下保持高渲染质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS训练中高斯原语的无控制密集化导致内存峰值过高，限制了在边缘设备上的部署，现有后训练剪枝方法无法解决训练早期的内存尖峰问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在训练过程中将3DGS的内存消耗控制在恒定低水平，同时保持高渲染质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练早期高斯原语的突然增长导致内存峰值，后训练剪枝无法缓解此问题。
analysis.method: 提出内存受限训练框架，交替进行低影响高斯剪枝和自适应补偿的新原语生长，维持近恒定低内存使用并逐步优化渲染保真度。
contributions: 首个系统性的内存受限3DGS训练框架，通过迭代生长与剪枝动态优化高斯原语。
在NVIDIA Jetson AGX Xavier上实现高达80%的峰值训练内存降低，同时保持相似视觉质量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个真实世界数据集上评估，与现有最先进方法相比有显著改进，并在边缘设备上验证了内存效率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定剪枝和生长策略的调参。
未讨论对训练时间的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，显著降低内存消耗，适合边缘部署，实验充分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种内存受限的3D高斯泼溅训练框架，通过迭代生长与剪枝在低内存下保持高渲染质量。

papers.title: TriEx: A Game-based Tri-View Framework for Explaining Internal Reasoning in Multi-Agent LLMs
papers.abstract: Explainability for Large Language Model (LLM) agents is especially challenging in interactive, partially observable settings, where decisions depend on evolving beliefs and other agents. We present \textbf{TriEx}, a tri-view explainability framework that instruments sequential decision making with aligned artifacts: (i) structured first-person self-reasoning bound to an action, (ii) explicit second-person belief states about opponents updated over time, and (iii) third-person oracle audits grounded in environment-derived reference signals. This design turns explanations from free-form narratives into evidence-anchored objects that can be compared and checked across time and perspectives. Using imperfect-information strategic games as a controlled testbed, we show that TriEx enables scalable analysis of explanation faithfulness, belief dynamics, and evaluator reliability, revealing systematic mismatches between what agents say, what they believe, and what they do. Our results highlight explainability as an interaction-dependent property and motivate multi-view, evidence-grounded evaluation for LLM agents. Code is available at https://github.com/Einsam1819/TriEx.

analysis.tldr: 提出TriEx三视角可解释框架，通过结构化自我推理、信念状态和外部审计揭示多智能体LLM内部推理与行为的不匹配。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在交互式、部分可观测环境中的决策依赖动态信念，现有可解释性方法难以捕捉多智能体间的信念演化与行为一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何为多智能体LLM在交互式部分可观测场景中提供可比较、可验证的推理解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示智能体所说、所信与所做之间存在系统性不匹配，说明可解释性是交互依赖的属性。
analysis.method: 提出TriEx三视角框架：第一人称结构化自我推理、第二人称显式信念状态更新、第三人称基于环境参考信号的审计。
contributions: 提出TriEx三视角可解释性框架，将解释从自由叙述转为证据锚定对象
在不完美信息博弈中验证框架可扩展分析解释忠实度、信念动态和评估者可靠性
analysis.experiments: 在不完美信息战略博弈中进行了实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅在不完美信息博弈中验证，泛化性待确认
未讨论计算开销或扩展性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但实验信息有限，与重点方向中等相关，建议阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TriEx三视角可解释框架，通过结构化自我推理、信念状态和外部审计揭示多智能体LLM内部推理与行为的不匹配。

papers.title: Normalizing Flows with Iterative Denoising
papers.abstract: Normalizing Flows (NFs) are a classical family of likelihood-based methods that have received revived attention. Recent efforts such as TARFlow have shown that NFs are capable of achieving promising performance on image modeling tasks, making them viable alternatives to other methods such as diffusion models. In this work, we further advance the state of Normalizing Flow generative models by introducing iterative TARFlow (iTARFlow). Unlike diffusion models, iTARFlow maintains a fully end-to-end, likelihood-based objective during training. During sampling, it performs autoregressive generation followed by an iterative denoising procedure inspired by diffusion-style methods. Through extensive experiments, we show that iTARFlow achieves competitive performance across ImageNet resolutions of 64, 128, and 256 pixels, demonstrating its potential as a strong generative model and advancing the frontier of Normalizing Flows. In addition, we analyze the characteristic artifacts produced by iTARFlow, offering insights that may shed light on future improvements. Code is available at https://github.com/apple/ml-itarflow.

analysis.tldr: 通过引入迭代去噪过程，iTARFlow 将归一化流在图像生成上的性能提升至与扩散模型竞争的水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 归一化流（NFs）作为似然基生成模型，近年来因 TARFlow 等工作的推动重新受到关注，但其生成质量仍落后于扩散模型。
analysis.problem: 如何提升归一化流在图像生成任务上的性能，使其达到或接近扩散模型的水平。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 iTARFlow，在训练时保持端到端的似然目标，采样时先自回归生成再执行迭代去噪（受扩散模型启发）。
contributions: 提出 iTARFlow，一种结合自回归生成与迭代去噪的归一化流模型，在 ImageNet 64/128/256 上取得竞争性能。
分析了 iTARFlow 产生的特征伪影，为未来改进提供见解。
analysis.experiments: 在 ImageNet 64×64、128×128 和 256×256 分辨率上进行图像生成实验，展示了竞争性能。
limitations: 可能仍存在计算效率问题，因为迭代去噪过程增加采样时间。
特征伪影分析可能仅针对特定架构，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，结合了归一化流与扩散思想，实验覆盖多个分辨率，但摘要未提供详细定量结果。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过引入迭代去噪过程，iTARFlow 将归一化流在图像生成上的性能提升至与扩散模型竞争的水平。

papers.title: Separable Pathways for Causal Reasoning: How Architectural Scaffolding Enables Hypothesis-Space Restructuring in LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Causal discovery through experimentation and intervention is fundamental to robust problem solving. It requires not just updating beliefs within a fixed framework but revising the hypothesis space itself, a capacity current AI agents lack when evidence demands representations they have not previously constructed. We extend the blicket detector paradigm from developmental science to test this capacity in AI agents equipped with architectural scaffolding that targets hypothesis-space restructuring. Our compositional architecture has two discrete components: context graphs, which structure exploration as typed state machines, and dynamic behaviors, which monitor for evidence that the current hypothesis space is inadequate and expand it at runtime. Across 1,085 experimental trials, these components make orthogonal contributions: context graphs drive reasoning quality within the post-switch hypothesis space, accounting for 94\% of the accuracy gain, while dynamic behaviors drive reasoning eligibility by detecting regime changes and preventing premature commitment to outdated hypotheses.

analysis.tldr: 通过分离架构组件（上下文图与动态行为）实现LLM Agent在因果推理中的假设空间重构。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI Agent缺乏在证据要求新表征时重构假设空间的能力，这限制了其在因果发现中的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何使LLM Agent具备在因果推理中动态扩展假设空间的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出组合架构，包含两个独立组件：上下文图（将探索结构化为类型化状态机）和动态行为（监控证据并运行时扩展假设空间）。
contributions: 提出一种针对假设空间重构的架构性脚手架方法
通过1085次实验验证了上下文图和动态行为的正交贡献
analysis.experiments: 在1085次实验性试验中，上下文图贡献了94%的准确率提升，动态行为负责检测机制变化并防止过早承诺。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定因果推理范式（blicket检测器）
未讨论扩展到更复杂因果场景的可行性
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验设计严谨，但应用场景较窄，适合关注因果推理与LLM结合的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分离架构组件（上下文图与动态行为）实现LLM Agent在因果推理中的假设空间重构。

papers.title: FluSplat: Sparse-View 3D Editing without Test-Time Optimization
papers.abstract: Recent advances in text-guided image editing and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled high-quality 3D scene manipulation. However, existing pipelines rely on iterative edit-and-fit optimization at test time, alternating between 2D diffusion editing and 3D reconstruction. This process is computationally expensive, scene-specific, and prone to cross-view inconsistencies. We propose a feed-forward framework for cross-view consistent 3D scene editing from sparse views. Instead of enforcing consistency through iterative 3D refinement, we introduce a cross-view regularization scheme in the image domain during training. By jointly supervising multi-view edits with geometric alignment constraints, our model produces view-consistent results without per-scene optimization at inference. The edited views are then lifted into 3D via a feedforward 3DGS model, yielding a coherent 3DGS representation in a single forward pass. Experiments demonstrate competitive editing fidelity and substantially improved cross-view consistency compared to optimization-based methods, while reducing inference time by orders of magnitude.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需测试时优化的前馈式稀疏视角3D编辑框架，通过训练时跨视图正则化实现高效一致的3D场景编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于文本引导的3D编辑方法依赖测试时迭代优化，计算成本高、场景特定且易出现跨视图不一致，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行测试时优化的前提下，从稀疏视角实现跨视图一致的3D场景编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出前馈式框架FluSplat，在训练阶段引入跨视图正则化方案，利用几何对齐约束联合监督多视图编辑，推理时无需逐场景优化，通过前馈3DGS模型将编辑视图提升为一致的3D高斯表示。
contributions: 提出无需测试时优化的前馈式稀疏视角3D编辑方法，显著降低推理时间。
引入训练时跨视图正则化机制，确保编辑结果的跨视图一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖训练数据的多样性和质量。
稀疏视角下的编辑质量可能受限于输入视图数量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，解决了3D编辑中的效率与一致性问题，但摘要未提供实验细节，需进一步验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需测试时优化的前馈式稀疏视角3D编辑框架，通过训练时跨视图正则化实现高效一致的3D场景编辑。

papers.title: Learning to count small and clustered objects with application to bacterial colonies
papers.abstract: Automated bacterial colony counting from images is an important technique to obtain data required for the development of vaccines and antibiotics. However, bacterial colonies present unique machine vision challenges that affect counting, including (1) small physical size, (2) object clustering, (3) high data annotation cost, and (4) limited cross-species generalisation. While FamNet is an established object counting technique effective for clustered objects and costly data annotation, its effectiveness for small colony sizes and cross-species generalisation remains unknown. To address the first three challenges, we propose ACFamNet, an extension of FamNet that handles small and clustered objects using a novel region of interest pooling with alignment and optimised feature engineering. To address all four challenges above, we introduce ACFamNet Pro, which augments ACFamNet with multi-head attention and residual connections, enabling dynamic weighting of objects and improved gradient flow. Experiments show that ACFamNet Pro achieves a mean normalised absolute error (MNAE) of 9.64% under 5-fold cross-validation, outperforming ACFamNet and FamNet by 2.23% and 12.71%, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出ACFamNet和ACFamNet Pro，通过改进FamNet实现小尺寸和聚类细菌菌落的精确计数。
analysis.research_motivation: 细菌菌落计数对疫苗和抗生素开发至关重要，但存在小尺寸、聚类、标注成本高和跨物种泛化差等挑战，现有方法FamNet在这些场景下效果未知。
analysis.problem: 解决细菌菌落图像中因小尺寸和聚类导致的计数不准确问题，并降低标注成本、提升跨物种泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于FamNet扩展，ACFamNet引入对齐的感兴趣区域池化和优化特征工程；ACFamNet Pro进一步增加多头注意力和残差连接。
contributions: 提出ACFamNet，通过新颖的ROI池化与对齐及特征工程处理小尺寸和聚类对象。
提出ACFamNet Pro，结合多头注意力和残差连接，实现动态对象加权和梯度改善，提升跨物种泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在细菌菌落数据集上进行5折交叉验证，ACFamNet Pro的MNAE为9.64%，优于ACFamNet（2.23%提升）和FamNet（12.71%提升）。
limitations: 可能仅在特定细菌菌落数据集上验证，泛化性需更多测试。
未提及与其他先进计数方法的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法改进明确，实验有提升，但属于特定应用场景，创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ACFamNet和ACFamNet Pro，通过改进FamNet实现小尺寸和聚类细菌菌落的精确计数。

papers.title: Cognitive Alignment At No Cost: Inducing Human Attention Biases For Interpretable Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: For state-of-the-art image understanding, Vision Transformers (ViTs) have become the standard architecture but their processing diverges substantially from human attentional characteristics. We investigate whether this cognitive gap can be shrunk by fine-tuning the self-attention weights of Google's ViT-B/16 on human saliency fixation maps. To isolate the effects of semantically relevant signals from generic human supervision, the tuned model is compared against a shuffled control. Fine-tuning significantly improved alignment across five saliency metrics and induced three hallmark human-like biases: tuning reversed the baseline's anti-human large-object bias toward small-objects, amplified the animacy preference and diminished extreme attention entropy. Bayesian parity analysis provides decisive to very-strong evidence that this cognitive alignment comes at no cost to the model's original classification performance on in- (ImageNet), corrupted (ImageNet-C) and out-of-distribution (ObjectNet) benchmarks. An equivalent procedure applied to a ResNet-50 Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) instead degraded both alignment and accuracy, suggesting that the ViT's modular self-attention mechanism is uniquely suited for dissociating spatial priority from representational logic. These findings demonstrate that biologically grounded priors can be instilled as a free emergent property of human-aligned attention, to improve transformer interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 通过微调ViT自注意力权重与人类注视点对齐，可在不损失分类性能的前提下提升模型可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: Vision Transformers (ViTs) 的处理方式与人类注意力特征存在显著差异，这种认知鸿沟限制了模型的可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲ViT分类性能的前提下，使其自注意力机制与人类视觉注意力对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在人类显著性注视点图上微调Google ViT-B/16的自注意力权重，并与打乱控制组对比以隔离语义信号影响。
contributions: 首次证明ViT可通过微调实现与人类注意力的对齐，且不损失分类性能。
发现ViT的自注意力机制比CNN更适合分离空间优先级与表征逻辑。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet、ImageNet-C和ObjectNet上评估分类性能，使用五种显著性指标衡量对齐度，并采用贝叶斯奇偶分析验证性能无损。
limitations: 仅测试了ViT-B/16和ResNet-50，未探索其他架构。
人类注视点数据可能引入标注偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对可解释性领域有重要贡献，但技术细节摘要未完全展开。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过微调ViT自注意力权重与人类注视点对齐，可在不损失分类性能的前提下提升模型可解释性。

papers.title: Investigation of cardinality classification for bacterial colony counting using explainable artificial intelligence
papers.abstract: Automatic bacterial colony counting is a highly sought-after technology in modern biological laboratories because it eliminates manual counting effort. Previous work has observed that MicrobiaNet, currently the best-performing cardinality classification model for colony counting, has difficulty distinguishing colonies of three or more individuals. However, it is unclear if this is due to properties of the data together with inherent characteristics of the MicrobiaNet model. By analysing MicrobiaNet with explainable artificial intelligence (XAI), we demonstrate that XAI can provide insights into how data properties constrain cardinality classification performance in colony counting. Our results show that high visual similarity across classes is the key issue hindering further performance improvement, revising prior assertions about MicrobiaNet. These findings suggest future work should focus on models that explicitly incorporate visual similarity or explore density estimation approaches, with broader implications for neural network classifiers trained on imbalanced datasets.

analysis.tldr: 用可解释AI分析菌落计数模型，发现高视觉相似性是性能瓶颈，而非模型本身缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动菌落计数可减少人工劳动，但现有最佳模型MicrobiaNet在区分三个及以上菌落时表现不佳，原因不明，需要深入分析。
analysis.problem: 探究MicrobiaNet在菌落计数中难以区分多个菌落的根本原因，是数据特性还是模型固有缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过XAI分析发现，不同类别菌落图像的高视觉相似性是限制分类性能的关键因素，推翻了先前关于MicrobiaNet模型缺陷的断言。
analysis.method: 使用可解释人工智能（XAI）技术分析MicrobiaNet模型的决策过程，揭示数据属性对性能的约束。
contributions: 利用XAI揭示了菌落计数中视觉相似性对分类性能的制约作用。
修正了先前关于MicrobiaNet模型缺陷的认知，为未来模型设计指明方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对MicrobiaNet模型和特定数据集，结论的泛化性需验证。
XAI方法本身可能引入解释偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法应用有创新，但领域较窄，实验细节缺失，适合了解思路。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用可解释AI分析菌落计数模型，发现高视觉相似性是性能瓶颈，而非模型本身缺陷。

papers.title: Statistics, Not Scale: Modular Medical Dialogue with Bayesian Belief Engine
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous diagnostic agents, yet they conflate two fundamentally different capabilities: natural-language communication and probabilistic reasoning. We argue that this conflation is an architectural flaw, not an engineering shortcoming. We introduce BMBE (Bayesian Medical Belief Engine), a modular diagnostic dialogue framework that enforces a strict separation between language and reasoning: an LLM serves only as a sensor, parsing patient utterances into structured evidence and verbalising questions, while all diagnostic inference resides in a deterministic, auditable Bayesian engine. Because patient data never enters the LLM, the architecture is private by construction; because the statistical backend is a standalone module, it can be replaced per target population without retraining. This separation yields three properties no autonomous LLM can offer: calibrated selective diagnosis with a continuously adjustable accuracy-coverage tradeoff, a statistical separation gap where even a cheap sensor paired with the engine outperforms a frontier standalone model from the same family at a fraction of the cost, and robustness to adversarial patient communication styles that cause standalone doctors to collapse. We validate across empirical and LLM-generated knowledge bases against frontier LLMs, confirming the advantage is architectural, not informational.

analysis.tldr: 提出模块化诊断对话框架BMBE，严格分离语言与推理，用贝叶斯引擎替代LLM的概率推理，实现可校准、隐私保护且鲁棒的医疗对话。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM作为自主诊断代理时，将自然语言交流与概率推理两种能力混为一谈，导致架构缺陷而非工程不足，亟需分离两者以提升可靠性、隐私性和可审计性。
analysis.problem: LLM在医疗诊断中混淆语言生成与统计推理，无法提供可校准、可审计且隐私安全的诊断决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM作为自主诊断代理时，其概率推理能力与语言能力耦合，导致架构性缺陷；即使使用廉价传感器（小LLM）搭配贝叶斯引擎，也能超越同系列前沿独立模型，且对对抗性沟通风格具有鲁棒性。
analysis.method: BMBE框架：LLM仅作为传感器解析患者话语为结构化证据并生成问题，所有诊断推理由确定性、可审计的贝叶斯引擎完成；患者数据不进入LLM，实现隐私保护；统计后端可独立替换以适应不同人群。
contributions: 提出模块化诊断对话框架BMBE，严格分离语言与推理，实现可校准的选择性诊断（准确率-覆盖率可调）。
证明架构优势而非信息优势：廉价传感器+贝叶斯引擎超越前沿独立LLM，且对对抗性沟通风格鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在经验知识和LLM生成的知识库上，与前沿LLM进行对比验证，确认优势源于架构而非信息。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量结构化证据提取，对复杂或模糊患者表述的解析能力有限。
贝叶斯引擎的先验知识构建可能需领域专家参与，扩展至新疾病时成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，分离语言与推理的模块化设计具有实际应用价值，实验验证了架构优势，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模块化诊断对话框架BMBE，严格分离语言与推理，用贝叶斯引擎替代LLM的概率推理，实现可校准、隐私保护且鲁棒的医疗对话。

papers.title: EmbodiedMidtrain: Bridging the Gap between Vision-Language Models and Vision-Language-Action Models via Mid-training
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action Models (VLAs) inherit their visual and linguistic capabilities from Vision-Language Models (VLMs), yet most VLAs are built from off-the-shelf VLMs that are not adapted to the embodied domain, limiting their downstream performance. In this work, we propose EmbodiedMidtrain to bridge the gap between VLMs and VLAs. We first characterize the data distribution gap between them, showing that VLA data occupy compact regions that are largely separated from the broader VLM distribution, while the degree of alignment varies substantially both across and within VLM data sources. Then, we build a mid-training data engine that leverages a lightweight learnable proximity estimator to select the most VLA-aligned candidates from a large VLM pool, and mid-trains the VLM on this curated mixture before downstream VLA fine-tuning. Experiments on three robot manipulation benchmarks show that mid-training consistently improves performance across different VLM backbones, achieving results competitive with expert VLAs and off-the-shelf VLMs trained with larger model scale and training budgets. Further analysis reveals that mid-training provides a stronger initialization for VLA fine-tuning, with gains emerging from the earliest steps and widening throughout training. Moreover, the data engine captures both dataset-level and sample-level alignment signals, favoring spatial reasoning over text-centric tasks while preserving the diversity of the VLM data. We will release all code, data and models for future research.

analysis.tldr: 提出EmbodiedMidtrain方法，通过中训练弥合视觉-语言模型与视觉-语言-动作模型之间的数据分布差距，提升机器人操作性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型直接使用未针对具身领域调整的VLM，导致下游性能受限，亟需弥合两者间的数据分布鸿沟。
analysis.problem: VLM与VLA之间存在数据分布差距，VLA数据在VLM分布中占据紧凑且分离的区域，需要筛选与VLA对齐的VLM数据以提升VLA微调效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLA数据在VLM分布中占据紧凑且分离的区域，且不同VLM数据源与VLA的对齐程度差异显著。
analysis.method: 构建中训练数据引擎，使用轻量级可学习邻近估计器从大规模VLM池中筛选最与VLA对齐的候选数据，在VLA微调前对VLM进行中训练。
contributions: 首次系统刻画VLM与VLA之间的数据分布差距，揭示VLA数据在VLM分布中的紧凑分离特性。
提出EmbodiedMidtrain方法，通过数据引擎筛选对齐数据并进行中训练，有效提升VLA微调性能。
在三个机器人操作基准上验证方法有效性，达到与更大规模模型和训练预算的专家VLA相当的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在三个机器人操作基准上测试，使用不同VLM骨干网络，中训练一致提升性能，且收益从训练早期开始并持续扩大。
limitations: 数据引擎依赖轻量级学习器，可能无法完全捕捉复杂对齐信号。
方法仅在机器人操作任务上验证，泛化到其他具身任务有待探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与VLA方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EmbodiedMidtrain方法，通过中训练弥合视觉-语言模型与视觉-语言-动作模型之间的数据分布差距，提升机器人操作性能。

papers.title: Frictionless Love: Associations Between AI Companion Roles and Behavioral Addiction
papers.abstract: AI companion chatbots increasingly shape how people seek social and emotional connection, sometimes substituting for relationships with romantic partners, friends, teachers, or even therapists. When these systems adopt those metaphorical roles, they are not neutral: such roles structure people's ways of interacting, distribute perceived AI harms and benefits, and may reflect behavioral addiction signs. Yet these role-dependent risks remain poorly understood. We analyze 248,830 posts from seven prominent Reddit communities describing interactions with AI companions. We identify ten recurring metaphorical roles (for example, soulmate, philosopher, and coach) and show that each role supports distinct ways of interacting. We then extract the perceived AI harms and AI benefits associated with these role-specific interactions and link them to behavioral addiction signs, all of which has been inferred from the text in the posts. AI soulmate companions are associated with romance-centered ways of interacting, offering emotional support but also introducing emotional manipulation and distress, culminating in strong attachment. In contrast, AI coach and guardian companions are associated with practical benefits such as personal growth and task support, yet are nonetheless more frequently associated with behavioral addiction signs such as daily life disruptions and damage to offline relationships. These findings show that metaphorical roles are a central ethical design concern for responsible AI companions.

analysis.tldr: AI伴侣聊天机器人的角色（如灵魂伴侣、教练）与行为成瘾迹象相关，不同角色带来不同的危害与收益。
analysis.research_motivation: AI伴侣聊天机器人日益影响人们的社交和情感连接，甚至替代真实关系，但其角色依赖的风险尚未被充分理解。
analysis.problem: 分析AI伴侣聊天机器人扮演的不同隐喻角色如何影响用户交互方式，以及这些角色与感知到的AI危害、收益和行为成瘾迹象之间的关联。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出不同角色（如灵魂伴侣、教练）与不同的交互方式、危害/收益及成瘾迹象相关。
analysis.method: 从七个Reddit社区收集248,830篇帖子，识别十种隐喻角色，并提取与角色相关的感知AI危害、收益和行为成瘾迹象。
contributions: 识别出AI伴侣聊天机器人的十种常见隐喻角色（如灵魂伴侣、哲学家、教练）。
揭示了不同角色与行为成瘾迹象的关联，强调角色设计是负责任的AI伴侣的核心伦理问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据仅来自Reddit社区，可能无法代表所有用户群体。
分析基于文本推断，缺乏用户自我报告或行为数据验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 研究关注AI伴侣的伦理风险，方法为大规模文本分析，但缺乏实验验证，适合了解趋势。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI伴侣聊天机器人的角色（如灵魂伴侣、教练）与行为成瘾迹象相关，不同角色带来不同的危害与收益。

papers.title: scpFormer: A Foundation Model for Unified Representation and Integration of the Single-Cell Proteomics
papers.abstract: The integration of single-cell proteomic data is often hindered by the fragmented nature of targeted antibody panels. To address this limitation, we introduce scpFormer, a transformer-based foundation model designed for single-cell proteomics. Pre-trained on over 390 million cells, scpFormer replaces standard index-based tokenization with a continuous, sequence-anchored approach. By combining Evolutionary Scale Modeling (ESM) with value-aware expression embeddings, it dynamically maps variable panels into a shared semantic space without artificial discretization. We demonstrate that scpFormer generates global cell representations that perform competitively in large-scale batch integration and unsupervised clustering. Moreover, its open-vocabulary architecture facilitates in silico panel expansion, assisting in the reconstruction of biological manifolds in sparse clinical datasets. Finally, this learned protein co-expression logic is transferable to bulk-omics tasks, supporting applications like cancer drug response prediction. scpFormer provides a versatile, panel-agnostic framework to facilitate scalable biomarker discovery and precision oncology.

analysis.tldr: scpFormer是一个基于Transformer的单细胞蛋白质组学基础模型，通过连续序列锚定tokenization和ESM结合的表达嵌入，实现跨抗体panel的统一表征与整合。
analysis.research_motivation: 单细胞蛋白质组学数据整合常受限于靶向抗体panel的碎片化，不同panel之间缺乏统一表征，阻碍了大规模分析和临床应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个panel无关的基础模型，能够统一表示和整合来自不同抗体panel的单细胞蛋白质组数据，并支持panel扩展和跨任务迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出scpFormer，采用连续序列锚定tokenization替代标准索引，结合ESM（进化尺度建模）和值感知表达嵌入，将可变panel动态映射到共享语义空间，避免人工离散化。
contributions: 提出scpFormer，首个针对单细胞蛋白质组学的Transformer基础模型，预训练于3.9亿细胞。
设计连续序列锚定tokenization与ESM+值感知嵌入，实现panel无关的统一表征。
展示scpFormer在大规模批次整合、无监督聚类、in silico panel扩展和跨任务迁移（如癌症药物响应预测）中的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模预训练数据，对罕见细胞类型或新panel的泛化性需进一步验证。
连续序列锚定方法可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（连续序列锚定+ESM），应用价值高（单细胞蛋白质组学基础模型），但摘要缺乏实验细节，且与核心关注方向（VLM/视频生成等）相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: scpFormer是一个基于Transformer的单细胞蛋白质组学基础模型，通过连续序列锚定tokenization和ESM结合的表达嵌入，实现跨抗体panel的统一表征与整合。

papers.title: RareSpot+: A Benchmark, Model, and Active Learning Framework for Small and Rare Wildlife in Aerial Imagery
papers.abstract: Automated wildlife monitoring from aerial imagery is vital for conservation but remains limited by two persistent challenges: the difficulty of detecting small, rare species and the high cost of large-scale expert annotation. Prairie dogs exemplify this problem -- they are ecologically important yet appear tiny, sparsely distributed, and visually indistinct from their surroundings, posing a severe challenge for conventional detection models. To overcome these limitations, we present RareSpot+, a detection framework that integrates multi-scale consistency learning, context-aware augmentation, and geospatially guided active learning to address these issues. A novel multi-scale consistency loss aligns intermediate feature maps across detection heads, enhancing localization of small (approx. 30 pixels wide) objects without architectural changes, while context-aware augmentation improves robustness by synthesizing hard, ecologically plausible examples. A geospatial active learning module exploits domain-specific spatial priors linking prairie dogs and burrows, together with test-time augmentation and a meta-uncertainty model, to reduce redundant labeling. On a 2 km^2 aerial dataset, RareSpot+ improves detection over the baseline mAP@50 by +35.2% (absolute +0.13). Cross-dataset tests on HerdNet, AED, and several other wildlife benchmarks demonstrate robust detector-level transferability. The active learning module further boosts prairie dog AP by 14.5% using an annotation budget of just 1.7% of the unlabeled tiles. Beyond detection, RareSpot+ enables spatial ecological analyses such as clustering and co-occurrence, linking vision-based detection with quantitative ecology.

analysis.tldr: 提出RareSpot+框架，通过多尺度一致性学习、上下文感知增强和地理空间主动学习，显著提升航拍图像中小型稀有野生动物的检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 航拍图像自动监测野生动物对生态保护至关重要，但面临两个持续挑战：检测小型稀有物种困难，以及大规模专家标注成本高昂。草原犬鼠作为典型案例，体型小、分布稀疏且与环境视觉混淆，传统检测模型难以应对。
analysis.problem: 解决航拍图像中小型稀有野生动物（如草原犬鼠）的检测难题，并降低标注成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成多尺度一致性学习（多尺度一致性损失对齐检测头中间特征图）、上下文感知增强（合成困难生态样本）和地理空间主动学习（利用空间先验、测试时增强和元不确定性模型减少冗余标注）。
contributions: 提出RareSpot+检测框架，结合多尺度一致性学习、上下文感知增强和地理空间主动学习。
在2 km²航拍数据集上，检测mAP@50提升35.2%（绝对+0.13），主动学习仅用1.7%标注预算使草原犬鼠AP提升14.5%。
跨数据集测试（HerdNet、AED等）验证了检测器的鲁棒迁移性，并支持空间生态分析。
analysis.experiments: 在2 km²航拍数据集上，RareSpot+相比基线mAP@50提升35.2%（绝对+0.13）；主动学习模块在仅使用1.7%未标注瓦片标注预算下，草原犬鼠AP提升14.5%。跨数据集测试（HerdNet、AED等）验证了检测器级迁移能力。
limitations: 方法主要针对草原犬鼠，对其他小型稀有物种的泛化性未充分验证。
主动学习依赖地理空间先验（洞穴与犬鼠关联），可能不适用于无此类先验的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，实验效果显著，但应用场景较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RareSpot+框架，通过多尺度一致性学习、上下文感知增强和地理空间主动学习，显著提升航拍图像中小型稀有野生动物的检测性能。

papers.title: Optimizing Data Augmentation for Real-Time Small UAV Detection: A Lightweight Context-Aware Approach
papers.abstract: Visual detection of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) is a critical task in surveillance systems due to their small physical size and environmental challenges. Although deep learning models have achieved significant progress, deploying them on edge devices necessitates the use of lightweight models, such as YOLOv11 Nano, which possess limited learning capacity. In this research, an efficient and context-aware data augmentation pipeline, combining Mosaic strategies and HSV color-space adaptation, is proposed to enhance the performance of these models. Experimental results on four standard datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach, compared to heavy and instance-level methods like Copy-Paste, not only prevents the generation of synthetic artifacts and overfitting but also significantly improves mean Average Precision (mAP) across all scenarios. Furthermore, the evaluation of generalization capability under foggy conditions revealed that the proposed method offers the optimal balance between Precision and stability for real-time systems, whereas alternative methods, such as MixUp, are effective only in specific applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级上下文感知数据增强方法，结合Mosaic和HSV调整，提升YOLOv11 Nano在小型无人机检测中的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 小型无人机视觉检测在监控系统中至关重要，但目标小、环境复杂，且边缘设备需使用轻量模型（如YOLOv11 Nano），其学习能力有限，现有数据增强方法（如Copy-Paste）可能产生伪影或过拟合。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高效且上下文感知的数据增强策略，以提升轻量模型在小型无人机检测任务中的性能，同时避免合成伪影和过拟合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，Copy-Paste等实例级方法会产生合成伪影和过拟合，而MixUp仅在特定应用中有效；所提方法在雾天条件下能提供精度与稳定性的最佳平衡。
analysis.method: 提出一种结合Mosaic策略和HSV颜色空间适应的上下文感知数据增强管道，避免使用实例级操作，专注于全局上下文变换。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级上下文感知数据增强方法，专为小型无人机检测设计。
在四个标准数据集上验证了该方法相比Copy-Paste等方法的优越性，显著提升mAP且避免伪影。
评估了雾天条件下的泛化能力，证明该方法在实时系统中实现精度与稳定性的最佳平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在四个标准数据集上进行实验，并与Copy-Paste、MixUp等方法对比，评估了雾天条件下的泛化能力。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 方法仅在YOLOv11 Nano上验证，可能不适用于其他轻量或重型架构。
雾天条件评估可能未涵盖其他恶劣天气（如雨、雪）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，技术深度较浅，但针对实际部署问题有应用价值，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级上下文感知数据增强方法，结合Mosaic和HSV调整，提升YOLOv11 Nano在小型无人机检测中的性能。

papers.title: What Makes a Good AI Review? Concern-Level Diagnostics for AI Peer Review
papers.abstract: Evaluating AI-generated reviews by verdict agreement is widely recognized as insufficient, yet current alternatives rarely audit which concerns a system identifies, how it prioritizes them, or whether those priorities align with the review rationale that shaped the final assessment. We propose concern alignment, a diagnostic framework that evaluates AI reviews at the concern level rather than only at the verdict level. The framework's core data structure is the match graph, a bipartite alignment between official and AI-generated concerns annotated with match type, severity, and post-rebuttal treatment. From this artifact we derive an evaluation ladder that moves from binary accuracy to concern detection, verdict-stratified behavior, decision-aware calibration, and rebuttal-aware decomposition. In a pilot study of four public AI review systems evaluated in six configurations, concern-level analysis suggests that detection alone does not determine review quality; calibration is often the binding constraint. Systems detect non-trivial fractions of official concerns yet most mark 25--55% of concerns on accepted papers as decisive, where, under our operationalization, no official concern on accepted papers was treated as a decisive blocker. Identical overall verdict accuracy can conceal reject-heavy behavior versus low-recall profiles, and low full-review false decisive rates can partly reflect concern dilution rather than calibrated prioritization. Most systems do not emit a native accept/reject, and inferring it from review tone is method-sensitive, reinforcing the need for concern-level diagnostics that remain stable across inference choices. The contribution is a reusable evaluation framework for auditing which concerns AI reviewers identify, how they weight them, and whether those priorities align with the review rationale that informed the paper's final assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出关注点对齐诊断框架，从关注点层面评估AI审稿质量，发现校准比检测更关键。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI审稿评估仅依赖最终判决一致性，缺乏对系统识别哪些关注点、如何排序以及是否与审稿理由对齐的细粒度诊断。
analysis.problem: 如何从关注点层面系统评估AI审稿系统，揭示其检测、校准和决策对齐中的缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 检测非平凡比例的关注点，但校准是瓶颈；系统对已接收论文标记25-55%的关注点为决定性，而官方无此类标记；相同总体准确率可掩盖不同行为模式；低假决定性率可能源于关注点稀释。
analysis.method: 提出关注点对齐框架，核心数据结构为匹配图，并构建从二元准确率到反驳感知分解的评估阶梯。
contributions: 提出关注点对齐诊断框架，从关注点层面评估AI审稿质量。
通过四项系统的试点研究揭示校准比检测更关键等关键发现。
analysis.experiments: 对四个公开AI审稿系统在六种配置下进行试点研究。
limitations: 试点研究规模有限，可能不具广泛代表性。
框架依赖人工标注匹配图，成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，对AI审稿评估有重要改进，但试点规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出关注点对齐诊断框架，从关注点层面评估AI审稿质量，发现校准比检测更关键。

papers.title: Unified Multi-Foundation-Model Slide Representation for Pan-Cancer Recognition and Text-Guided Tumor Localization
papers.abstract: The expanding ecosystem of pathology foundation models has produced powerful but fragmented tile-level representations, limiting their use in clinical tasks that require unified slide-level reasoning and interpretable linkage to clinically meaningful information. We present ASTRA, a pan-cancer framework that integrates heterogeneous foundation-model representations into a shared slide-level representation space and semantically grounds that space using structured pathology annotation fields, including classification category, cancer type, and anatomic site. ASTRA combines sparse mixture-of-experts contextualization, masked multi-model reconstruction, and contrastive alignment to structured pathology prompts to learn slide representations that support 4-category classification, 3-class solid tumor typing, 16-class cancer typing, and text-guided tumor localization without pixel-level supervision. Developed on a CHTN cohort of 10,359 whole-slide images (WSIs) spanning 16 tumor types, ASTRA consistently improves pan-cancer classification across four pathology foundation-model backbones, achieving up to 97.8% macro-AUC for 4-category classification, 99.7% for 3-class solid tumor typing, and 99.2% for 16-class cancer typing. For tumor localization, ASTRA achieves a mean Dice of 0.897 on an annotated in-domain CHTN subset (n = 380) spanning 16 cancer types and 0.738 on an external TCGA cohort (n = 1,686) spanning four cancer types. These results demonstrate that minimal structured pathology annotation fields derived from slide-level metadata can provide effective semantic supervision for unified slide representation learning, enabling both pan-cancer prediction and weakly supervised tumor localization within a single framework.

analysis.tldr: ASTRA通过融合多种病理基础模型表征，实现全癌种识别和文本引导的肿瘤定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有病理基础模型产生强大但碎片化的瓦片级表征，限制了需要统一幻灯片级推理和可解释链接的临床应用。
analysis.problem: 如何整合异构基础模型表征为统一的幻灯片级表征，并实现语义可解释的肿瘤定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ASTRA框架结合稀疏混合专家上下文化、掩码多模型重建和对比对齐结构化病理提示，学习统一幻灯片表征。
contributions: 提出ASTRA框架，整合多种病理基础模型表征为共享幻灯片级表征空间。
利用结构化病理注释字段（分类类别、癌症类型、解剖部位）实现语义监督，支持文本引导肿瘤定位。
analysis.experiments: 在CHTN队列（10,359张WSI，16种肿瘤类型）上评估，4分类宏AUC达97.8%，3类实体瘤分型99.7%，16类癌症分型99.2%；肿瘤定位在CHTN子集（n=380）平均Dice 0.897，外部TCGA队列（n=1,686）平均Dice 0.738。
limitations: 依赖结构化病理注释字段，可能不适用于注释不完整的场景。
外部泛化性仅在TCGA四种癌症类型上验证，更多癌症类型需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与医学图像方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ASTRA通过融合多种病理基础模型表征，实现全癌种识别和文本引导的肿瘤定位。

papers.title: A Computational Model of Message Sensation Value in Short Video Multimodal Features that Predicts Sensory and Behavioral Engagement
papers.abstract: The contemporary media landscape is characterized by sensational short videos. While prior research examines the effects of individual multimodal features, the collective impact of multimodal features on viewer engagement with short videos remains unknown. Grounded in the theoretical framework of Message Sensation Value (MSV), this study develops and tests a computational model of MSV with multimodal feature analysis and human evaluation of 1,200 short videos. This model that predicts sensory and behavioral engagement was further validated across two unseen datasets from three short video platforms (combined N = 14,492). While MSV is positively associated with sensory engagement, it shows an inverted U-shaped relationship with behavioral engagement: Higher MSV elicits stronger sensory stimulation, but moderate MSV optimizes behavioral engagement. This research advances the theoretical understanding of short video engagement and introduces a robust computational tool for short video research.

analysis.tldr: 基于消息感官价值理论，提出多模态特征计算模型预测短视频的感官和行为参与度，发现MSV与行为参与呈倒U型关系。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究仅关注单一模态特征对短视频参与度的影响，缺乏对多模态特征整体效应的理解，且缺乏可计算的理论模型。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个基于多模态特征的计算模型来预测短视频的感官和行为参与度，并揭示多模态特征与参与度之间的非线性关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MSV与感官参与正相关，但与行为参与呈倒U型关系：高MSV带来强感官刺激，但中等MSV优化行为参与。
analysis.method: 基于消息感官价值理论，结合多模态特征分析和人工评估，构建计算模型，并在多个数据集上验证。
contributions: 提出了一个基于多模态特征的计算模型来量化短视频的消息感官价值。
揭示了MSV与感官参与和行为参与的不同关系模式（线性与倒U型）。
在三个平台的多个数据集上验证了模型的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 使用1,200个短视频进行模型构建和人工评估，并在两个未见过的数据集（共14,492个视频）上验证。
limitations: 可能未考虑视频内容语义对参与度的影响。
模型可能依赖于特定平台或文化背景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，实验规模较大，但属于特定应用领域，与核心方向关联一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于消息感官价值理论，提出多模态特征计算模型预测短视频的感官和行为参与度，发现MSV与行为参与呈倒U型关系。

papers.title: Online CS-based SAR Edge-Mapping
papers.abstract: With modern defense applications increasingly relying on inexpensive, small Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), a major challenge lies in designing intelligent and computationally efficient onboard Automatic Target Recognition (ATR) algorithms to carry out operational objectives. This is especially critical in Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR), where processing techniques such as ATR are often carried out post data collection, requiring onboard systems to bear the memory burden of storing the back-scattered signals. To alleviate this high cost, we propose an online, direct, edge-mapping technique which bypasses the image reconstruction step to classify scenes and targets. Furthermore, by reconstructing the scene as an edge-map we inherently promote sparsity, requiring fewer measurements and computational power than classic SAR reconstruction algorithms such as backprojection.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在线压缩感知SAR边缘映射方法，跳过图像重建直接分类，降低存储和计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代防御应用中，小型无人机依赖低成本、计算高效的机载自动目标识别算法，但传统SAR处理需在数据采集后离线进行，机载系统需存储大量回波信号，存储和计算负担重。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行完整图像重建的前提下，实现SAR场景的在线目标分类，同时减少测量数和计算量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种在线直接边缘映射技术，通过压缩感知直接重建场景的边缘图，利用边缘图的稀疏性减少测量数和计算量，并跳过图像重建步骤直接进行分类。
contributions: 提出在线CS-based SAR边缘映射方法，绕过图像重建实现直接分类。
利用边缘图的稀疏性，降低测量数和计算功耗，优于传统后向投影算法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定SAR场景或目标类型。
边缘映射的分类精度可能受噪声和稀疏性假设影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定新意，但摘要缺乏实验验证，且与核心关注方向（VLM/视频生成等）距离较远。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在线压缩感知SAR边缘映射方法，跳过图像重建直接分类，降低存储和计算开销。

papers.title: Bias in the Tails: How Name-conditioned Evaluative Framing in Resume Summaries Destabilizes LLM-based Hiring
papers.abstract: Research has documented LLMs' name-based bias in hiring and salary recommendations. In this paper, we instead consider a setting where LLMs generate candidate summaries for downstream assessment. In a large-scale controlled study, we analyze nearly one million resume summaries produced by 4 models under systematic race-gender name perturbations, using synthetic resumes and real-world job postings. By decomposing each summary into resume-grounded factual content and evaluative framing, we find that factual content remains largely stable, while evaluative language exhibits subtle name-conditioned variation concentrated in the extremes of the distribution, especially in open-source models. Our hiring simulation demonstrates how evaluative summary transforms directional harm into symmetric instability that might evade conventional fairness audit, highlighting a potential pathway for LLM-to-LLM automation bias.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成的简历摘要中，评估性语言存在基于姓名的细微偏差，集中在分布极端，导致下游招聘不稳定。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究关注LLM在招聘中的直接姓名偏差，但忽略了LLM生成候选人摘要时可能引入的间接偏差，这种偏差更隐蔽且难以审计。
analysis.problem: LLM在生成简历摘要时，评估性框架是否因候选人姓名（种族-性别）而存在系统性偏差，以及这种偏差如何影响下游招聘决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：事实内容保持稳定，但评估性语言在分布极端出现细微的姓名条件变化，尤其在开源模型中；这种偏差将方向性伤害转化为对称不稳定性，可能逃避传统公平性审计。
analysis.method: 大规模受控研究：使用4个模型、系统种族-性别姓名扰动、合成简历和真实职位，生成近百万份摘要；将摘要分解为简历基础事实内容和评估性框架进行分析。
contributions: 揭示LLM生成摘要中评估性框架存在基于姓名的细微偏差，且集中在分布极端
展示评估性摘要如何将方向性伤害转化为对称不稳定性，可能逃避传统公平性审计
提出LLM-to-LLM自动化偏差的潜在路径
analysis.experiments: 大规模受控实验：4个模型、近百万份简历摘要、系统姓名扰动、合成简历与真实职位。摘要未提供具体实验结果数值。
limitations: 仅使用合成简历，可能无法完全反映真实简历的复杂性
未探讨不同职位类型或行业的影响
未提供缓解偏差的具体方法
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 研究角度新颖，揭示LLM生成摘要中的隐蔽偏差，对公平性审计有重要启示，但实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成的简历摘要中，评估性语言存在基于姓名的细微偏差，集中在分布极端，导致下游招聘不稳定。

papers.title: Fast Amortized Fitting of Scientific Signals Across Time and Ensembles via Transferable Neural Fields
papers.abstract: Neural fields, also known as implicit neural representations (INRs), offer a powerful framework for modeling continuous geometry, but their effectiveness in high-dimensional scientific settings is limited by slow convergence and scaling challenges. In this study, we extend INR models to handle spatiotemporal and multivariate signals and show how INR features can be transferred across scientific signals to enable efficient and scalable representation across time and ensemble runs in an amortized fashion. Across controlled transformation regimes (e.g., geometric transformations and localized perturbations of synthetic fields) and high-fidelity scientific domains-including turbulent flows, fluid-material impact dynamics, and astrophysical systems-we show that transferable features improve not only signal fidelity but also the accuracy of derived geometric and physical quantities, including density gradients and vorticity. In particular, transferable features reduce iterations to reach target reconstruction quality by up to an order of magnitude, increase early-stage reconstruction quality by multiple dB (with gains exceeding 10 dB in some cases), and consistently improve gradient-based physical accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出可迁移神经场实现科学信号的高效摊销拟合，显著加速重建并提升物理量精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经场在科学信号建模中收敛慢、扩展性差，难以高效处理高维时空和多变量数据。
analysis.problem: 如何实现科学信号（如湍流、冲击动力学、天体物理）的快速、可扩展且高保真表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 可迁移特征在不同科学领域（湍流、流体-材料冲击、天体物理）中均能提升信号保真度和衍生物理量（如密度梯度、涡度）的准确性。
analysis.method: 扩展隐式神经表示（INR）以处理时空和多变量信号，并通过跨信号迁移INR特征实现摊销式高效拟合。
contributions: 提出可迁移神经场框架，实现科学信号在时间和系综上的摊销拟合。
在多个高保真科学领域（湍流、冲击动力学、天体物理）中验证了迁移特征在重建质量和物理精度上的显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在合成场的几何变换和局部扰动以及真实科学领域（湍流、流体-材料冲击、天体物理）中评估，可迁移特征将达到目标重建质量的迭代次数减少一个数量级，早期重建质量提升超过10 dB，并持续改善基于梯度的物理精度。
limitations: 可能依赖特定信号间的可迁移性，对差异极大的信号效果未知。
未讨论模型在极高维度或极端噪声下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，在多个科学领域有显著加速和精度提升，但属于物理应用方向，与核心关注方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可迁移神经场实现科学信号的高效摊销拟合，显著加速重建并提升物理量精度。

papers.title: Lucky High Dynamic Range Smartphone Imaging
papers.abstract: While the human eye can perceive an impressive twenty stops of dynamic range, smartphone camera sensors remain limited to about twelve stops despite decades of research. A variety of high dynamic range (HDR) image capture and processing techniques have been proposed, and, in practice, they can extend the dynamic range by 3-5 stops for handheld photography. This paper proposes an approach that robustly captures dynamic range using a handheld smartphone camera and lightweight networks suitable for running on mobile devices. Our method operates indirectly on linear raw pixels in bracketed exposures. Every pixel in the final HDR image is a convex combination of input pixels in the neighborhood, adjusted for exposure, and thus avoids hallucination artifacts typical of recent deep image synthesis networks. We validate our system on both synthetic imagery and unseen real bracketed images -- we confirm zero-shot generalization of the method to smartphone camera captures. Our iterative inference architecture is capable of processing an arbitrary number of bracketed input photos, and we show examples from capture stacks containing 3--9 images. Our training process relies only on synthetic captures yet generalizes to unseen real photos from several cameras. Moreover, we show that this training scheme improves other SOTA methods over their pretrained counterparts.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级手持智能手机HDR成像方法，通过凸组合避免伪影，零样本泛化到真实场景。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能手机相机传感器动态范围有限（约12档），而人眼可感知20档，现有HDR技术虽能扩展3-5档，但存在伪影或计算成本高，难以在移动设备上实时运行。
analysis.problem: 如何利用手持智能手机拍摄的包围曝光图像，通过轻量级网络鲁棒地重建高动态范围图像，避免深度合成网络常见的幻觉伪影。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种迭代推理架构，对包围曝光中的线性原始像素进行间接操作，最终HDR图像的每个像素是邻域输入像素的凸组合（经曝光调整），从而避免伪影；训练仅依赖合成数据，但能零样本泛化到真实手机拍摄图像。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级、可运行于移动设备的HDR成像方法，通过凸组合避免深度合成网络的幻觉伪影。
训练仅使用合成数据，但零样本泛化到多种真实手机相机拍摄的包围曝光图像。
迭代推理架构可处理任意数量的包围曝光输入（3-9张），并提升其他SOTA方法在真实数据上的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在合成图像和未见过的真实包围曝光图像上验证，确认零样本泛化能力；展示了3-9张图像堆栈的处理结果。
limitations: 可能对极端运动或大范围遮挡场景鲁棒性不足。
依赖包围曝光输入，单帧HDR场景不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，轻量级设计有实用价值，但应用方向与VLM/视频生成等核心方向关联较弱。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级手持智能手机HDR成像方法，通过凸组合避免伪影，零样本泛化到真实场景。

papers.title: Semantic Prompting: Agentic Incremental Narrative Refinement through Spatial Semantic Interaction
papers.abstract: Interactive spatial layouts empower users to synthesize information and organize findings for sensemaking. While Large Language Models (LLMs) can automate narrative generation from spatial layouts, current collage-based and re-generation methods struggle to support the incremental spatial refinements inherent to the sensemaking process. We identify three critical gaps in existing spatial-textual generation: interaction-revision misalignment, human-LLM intent misalignment, and lack of granular customization. To address these, we introduce Semantic Prompting, a framework for spatial refinement that perceives semantic interactions, reasons about refinement intent, and performs targeted positional revisions. We implemented S-PRISM to realize this framework. The empirical evaluation demonstrated that S-PRISM effectively enhanced the precision of interaction-revision refinement. A user study ($N=14$) highlighted how participants leveraged S-PRISM for incremental formalization through interactive steering. Results showed that users valued its efficient, adaptable, and trustworthy support, which effectively strengthens human-LLM intent alignment.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义提示框架，通过空间语义交互实现增量式叙事精炼，解决人机意图对齐与细粒度定制问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM叙事生成方法（如拼贴式、重生成式）难以支持用户在空间布局中进行增量式精炼，存在交互-修订错位、人机意图错位和缺乏细粒度定制三个关键缺陷。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在空间布局中感知用户的语义交互、推理精炼意图并执行精准的位置修订，以支持增量式叙事精炼。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Semantic Prompting框架，包含三个步骤：感知语义交互、推理精炼意图、执行目标位置修订；并实现S-PRISM系统。
contributions: 识别了空间-文本生成中的三个关键缺陷：交互-修订错位、人机意图错位、缺乏细粒度定制。
提出Semantic Prompting框架，通过空间语义交互实现增量式叙事精炼。
实现S-PRISM系统并通过实证评估和用户研究验证其有效性。
analysis.experiments: 进行了实证评估和用户研究（N=14），结果显示S-PRISM有效增强了交互-修订精炼的精度，用户认为其高效、适应性强且值得信赖。
limitations: 用户研究样本量较小（N=14），可能影响结论的泛化性。
框架依赖空间布局的语义交互，可能不适用于非空间场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验规模较小，应用场景较窄，建议阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义提示框架，通过空间语义交互实现增量式叙事精炼，解决人机意图对齐与细粒度定制问题。

papers.title: DistortBench: Benchmarking Vision Language Models on Image Distortion Identification
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used in settings where sensitivity to low-level image degradations matters, including content moderation, image restoration, and quality monitoring. Yet their ability to recognize distortion type and severity remains poorly understood. We present DistortBench, a diagnostic benchmark for no-reference distortion perception in VLMs. DistortBench contains 13,500 four-choice questions covering 27 distortion types, six perceptual categories, and five severity levels: 25 distortions inherit KADID-10k calibrations, while two added rotation distortions use monotonic angle-based levels. We evaluate 18 VLMs, including 17 open-weight models from five families and one proprietary model. Despite strong performance on high-level vision-language tasks, the best model reaches only 61.9% accuracy, just below the human majority-vote baseline of 65.7% (average individual: 60.2%), indicating that low-level perceptual understanding remains a major weakness of current VLMs. Our analysis further reveals weak and non-monotonic scaling with model size, performance drops in most base--thinking pairs, and distinct severity-response patterns across model families. We hope DistortBench will serve as a useful benchmark for measuring and improving low-level visual perception in VLMs.

analysis.tldr: DistortBench 基准测试揭示 VLM 在图像失真识别上远逊于人类，最佳模型准确率仅 61.9%。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM 在内容审核、图像恢复等对低层图像退化敏感的任务中应用日益广泛，但其识别失真类型和严重程度的能力尚不明确，缺乏专门的诊断基准。
analysis.problem: 现有 VLM 在低层视觉感知（特别是无参考失真识别）上的能力评估不足，需要系统性的基准来量化其缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：最佳 VLM 准确率（61.9%）低于人类多数投票基线（65.7%），且模型大小与性能呈弱非单调缩放，多数基础-推理对出现性能下降，不同模型家族对严重程度的响应模式各异。
analysis.method: 构建 DistortBench 基准，包含 13,500 道四选一问题，覆盖 27 种失真类型、6 个感知类别和 5 个严重级别，其中 25 种失真沿用 KADID-10k 校准，2 种旋转失真使用单调角度级别。
contributions: 提出 DistortBench，首个针对 VLM 无参考失真感知的诊断基准，包含 27 种失真和 13,500 道题目。
系统评估 18 个 VLM，揭示低层视觉感知是当前 VLM 的主要弱点，并分析缩放规律、推理-基础对性能差异及严重性响应模式。
analysis.experiments: 在 18 个 VLM（17 个开源、1 个闭源）上评估，最佳准确率 61.9%，人类多数投票基线 65.7%，平均个体 60.2%。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖 27 种失真，可能未涵盖所有真实场景中的退化类型。
评估限于四选一格式，可能无法完全反映 VLM 在开放场景中的失真感知能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 针对 VLM 低层视觉感知的专门基准，填补空白，实验系统，但方法本身为基准构建，创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DistortBench 基准测试揭示 VLM 在图像失真识别上远逊于人类，最佳模型准确率仅 61.9%。

papers.title: Biomedical systems biology workflow orchestration and execution with PoSyMed
papers.abstract: The rapid growth of scientific software has created practical barriers for bioinformatics research. Although powerful statistical, artificial intelligence (AI)-based methods are now widely available, their effective use is often hindered by fragmented distribution, inconsistent documentation, complex dependencies, and difficult-to-reproduce execution environments. As a result, reusing published tools and workflow adaptation to own date remains technically demanding and time-intensive, even for experienced users. Here, we present PoSyMed, an open and modular platform for the controlled integration, composition, and execution of bioinformatics tools and workflows. PoSyMed combines a backend-centered platform architecture with formal tool descriptions, controlled container-based build and execution processes, persistent workflow state, and a dialogue-based user interface. Large language models (LLM) are integrated not as autonomous decision-makers, but as human-computer interface with bounded semantic assistants that help identify tools, propose workflow steps, and support parameterization within a typed, validated, and human-supervised execution environment. PoSyMed is designed to improve reproducibility, traceability, and transparency in practical biomedical analysis within one platform. We describe the system architecture and evaluate its behavior across representative biological software scenarios with respect to workflow support, interaction design, and platform extensibility. PoSyMed is publicly available at https://apps.cosy.bio/posymed.

analysis.tldr: PoSyMed是一个开源模块化平台，用于生物信息学工具和工作流的集成、编排与执行，结合LLM作为受控语义助手提升可重复性和易用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物信息学软件快速增长导致工具碎片化、文档不一致、依赖复杂和难以复现，即使有经验的用户也难以高效复用和适配工作流。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一、可复现且用户友好的平台，以集成、编排和执行生物信息学工具和工作流。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PoSyMed采用后端中心平台架构，结合形式化工具描述、基于容器的构建与执行、持久化工作流状态和对话式用户界面；LLM作为受控语义助手辅助工具识别、工作流步骤建议和参数化，而非自主决策。
contributions: 提出PoSyMed开源模块化平台，支持生物信息学工具和工作流的受控集成、组合与执行。
将LLM作为有界语义助手集成到人机界面中，在类型化、验证和人工监督环境下提升工作流构建效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的语义理解准确性，在复杂或罕见场景下可能建议不准确。
平台的可扩展性和对大规模工作流的性能表现尚未在摘要中评估。

analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但摘要未提供实验验证，且与核心关注方向（VLM/视频生成等）距离较远。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PoSyMed是一个开源模块化平台，用于生物信息学工具和工作流的集成、编排与执行，结合LLM作为受控语义助手提升可重复性和易用性。

papers.title: Camera Control for Text-to-Image Generation via Learning Viewpoint Tokens
papers.abstract: Current text-to-image models struggle to provide precise camera control using natural language alone. In this work, we present a framework for precise camera control with global scene understanding in text-to-image generation by learning parametric camera tokens. We fine-tune image generation models for viewpoint-conditioned text-to-image generation on a curated dataset that combines 3D-rendered images for geometric supervision and photorealistic augmentations for appearance and background diversity. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while preserving image quality and prompt fidelity. Unlike prior methods that overfit to object-specific appearance correlations, our viewpoint tokens learn factorized geometric representations that transfer to unseen object categories. Our work shows that text-vision latent spaces can be endowed with explicit 3D camera structure, offering a pathway toward geometrically-aware prompts for text-to-image generation. Project page: https://randdl.github.io/viewtoken_control/

analysis.tldr: 通过学习参数化视角令牌，实现文本到图像生成中的精确相机控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像模型难以仅通过自然语言提供精确的相机控制，限制了生成图像的几何可控性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖对象特定外观关联的情况下，实现文本到图像生成中的精确相机控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

在保持图像质量和提示保真度的同时，达到最先进的相机控制精度，且视角令牌学习到的分解几何表示可泛化到未见对象类别。
