analysis.one_sentence_summary: SpanVLA通过流匹配动作专家和负样本恢复训练，实现了高效且鲁棒的端到端自动驾驶。

papers.title: Face Anything: 4D Face Reconstruction from Any Image Sequence
papers.abstract: Accurate reconstruction and tracking of dynamic human faces from image sequences is challenging because non-rigid deformations, expression changes, and viewpoint variations occur simultaneously, creating significant ambiguity in geometry and correspondence estimation. We present a unified method for high-fidelity 4D facial reconstruction based on canonical facial point prediction, a representation that assigns each pixel a normalized facial coordinate in a shared canonical space. This formulation transforms dense tracking and dynamic reconstruction into a canonical reconstruction problem, enabling temporally consistent geometry and reliable correspondences within a single feed-forward model. By jointly predicting depth and canonical coordinates, our method enables accurate depth estimation, temporally stable reconstruction, dense 3D geometry, and robust facial point tracking within a single architecture. We implement this formulation using a transformer-based model that jointly predicts depth and canonical facial coordinates, trained using multi-view geometry data that non-rigidly warps into the canonical space. Extensive experiments on image and video benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across reconstruction and tracking tasks, achieving approximately 3$\times$ lower correspondence error and faster inference than prior dynamic reconstruction methods, while improving depth accuracy by 16%. These results highlight canonical facial point prediction as an effective foundation for unified feed-forward 4D facial reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于规范面部点预测的统一前馈模型，实现高保真4D面部重建与跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态人脸重建中非刚性形变、表情变化和视角变化同时存在，导致几何和对应估计存在显著歧义，现有方法难以兼顾精度与效率。
analysis.problem: 从任意图像序列中准确重建和跟踪动态人脸，解决几何歧义和对应估计难题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出规范面部点预测表示，将每个像素映射到共享规范空间中的归一化面部坐标，联合预测深度和规范坐标，使用Transformer模型训练，利用多视图几何数据非刚性扭曲到规范空间。
contributions: 提出规范面部点预测作为统一表示，将动态重建转化为规范重建问题。
实现单前馈模型同时完成深度估计、时序稳定重建、密集3D几何和鲁棒面部点跟踪。
在图像和视频基准上达到SOTA，对应误差降低约3倍，推理速度更快，深度精度提升16%。
analysis.experiments: 在图像和视频基准上进行广泛实验，在重建和跟踪任务上达到SOTA，对应误差降低约3倍，推理速度更快，深度精度提升16%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量多视图训练数据。
对极端表情或遮挡的鲁棒性未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与3D视觉方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于规范面部点预测的统一前馈模型，实现高保真4D面部重建与跟踪。

papers.title: ChipCraftBrain: Validation-First RTL Generation via Multi-Agent Orchestration
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise for generating Register-Transfer Level (RTL) code from natural language specifications, but single-shot generation achieves only 60-65% functional correctness on standard benchmarks. Multi-agent approaches such as MAGE reach 95.9% on VerilogEval yet remain untested on harder industrial benchmarks such as NVIDIA's CVDP, lack synthesis awareness, and incur high API costs. We present ChipCraftBrain, a framework combining symbolic-neural reasoning with adaptive multi-agent orchestration for automated RTL generation. Four innovations drive the system: (1) adaptive orchestration over six specialized agents via a PPO policy over a 168-dim state (an alternative world-model MPC planner is also evaluated); (2) a hybrid symbolic-neural architecture that solves K-map and truth-table problems algorithmically while specialized agents handle waveform timing and general RTL; (3) knowledge-augmented generation from a 321-pattern base plus 971 open-source reference implementations with focus-aware retrieval; and (4) hierarchical specification decomposition into dependency-ordered sub-modules with interface synchronization. On VerilogEval-Human, ChipCraftBrain achieves 97.2% mean pass@1 (range 96.15-98.72% across 7 runs, best 154/156), on par with ChipAgents (97.4%, self-reported) and ahead of MAGE (95.9%). On a 302-problem non-agentic subset of CVDP spanning five task categories, we reach 94.7% mean pass@1 (286/302, averaged over 3 runs), a 36-60 percentage-point lift per category over the published single-shot baseline; we additionally lead three of four categories shared with NVIDIA's ACE-RTL despite using roughly 30x fewer per-problem attempts. A RISC-V SoC case study demonstrates hierarchical decomposition generating 8/8 lint-passing modules (689 LOC) validated on FPGA, where monolithic generation fails entirely.

analysis.tldr: 提出ChipCraftBrain框架，通过符号-神经推理与自适应多智能体编排，在RTL生成任务上达到97.2% pass@1，并在工业级CVDP基准上显著超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM单次生成RTL代码的正确率仅60-65%，多智能体方法虽提升但未在工业级基准上验证、缺乏综合感知且API成本高，亟需更高效、准确的自动化RTL生成方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个结合符号推理与多智能体协作的框架，以高正确率、低成本和工业级适用性生成RTL代码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单次生成正确率低；多智能体方法在简单基准上表现好但工业级任务未验证；现有方法缺乏综合感知且成本高。
analysis.method: 提出ChipCraftBrain框架，包含四个创新：1) 基于PPO策略（或MPC规划器）的六专家自适应编排；2) 混合符号-神经架构，算法求解K-map/真值表，专家处理波形时序和通用RTL；3) 知识增强生成，使用321模式库+971开源参考实现及焦点感知检索；4) 层次化规范分解为依赖排序的子模块并同步接口。
contributions: 提出自适应多智能体编排框架ChipCraftBrain，结合PPO策略动态选择专家。
设计混合符号-神经架构，算法求解逻辑问题，专家处理时序和通用RTL。
构建知识增强生成系统，包含大规模模式库和焦点感知检索。
实现层次化规范分解，支持复杂SoC级设计。
analysis.experiments: 在VerilogEval-Human上达到97.2%平均pass@1（7次运行范围96.15-98.72%，最佳154/156），与ChipAgents（97.4%）相当，优于MAGE（95.9%）。在CVDP的302问题子集上达到94.7%平均pass@1（286/302，3次运行平均），每类提升36-60个百分点。RISC-V SoC案例研究显示层次化分解生成8/8 lint-passing模块（689 LOC），在FPGA上验证，而整体生成完全失败。
limitations: PPO策略训练可能依赖特定环境，泛化性需进一步验证。
知识库构建需大量开源参考实现，可能不适用于专有设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且结果显著，但属于硬件设计领域，与核心关注方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ChipCraftBrain框架，通过符号-神经推理与自适应多智能体编排，在RTL生成任务上达到97.2% pass@1，并在工业级CVDP基准上显著超越基线。

papers.title: Unveiling Fine-Grained Visual Traces: Evaluating Multimodal Interleaved Reasoning Chains in Multimodal STEM Tasks
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown promising reasoning abilities, yet evaluating their performance in specialized domains remains challenging. STEM reasoning is a particularly valuable testbed because it provides highly verifiable feedback, but existing benchmarks often permit unimodal shortcuts due to modality redundancy and focus mainly on final-answer accuracy, overlooking the reasoning process itself. To address this challenge, we introduce StepSTEM: a graduate-level benchmark of 283 problems across mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, and engineering for fine-grained evaluation of cross-modal reasoning in MLLMs. StepSTEM is constructed through a rigorous curation pipeline that enforces strict complementarity between textual and visual inputs. We further propose a general step-level evaluation framework for both text-only chain-of-thought and interleaved image-text reasoning, using dynamic programming to align predicted reasoning steps with multiple reference solutions. Experiments across a wide range of models show that current MLLMs still rely heavily on textual reasoning, with even Gemini 3.1 Pro and Claude Opus 4.6 achieving only 38.29% accuracy. These results highlight substantial headroom for genuine cross-modal STEM reasoning and position StepSTEM as a benchmark for fine-grained evaluation of multimodal reasoning. Source code is available at https://github.com/lll-hhh/STEPSTEM.

analysis.tldr: 提出StepSTEM基准，用于细粒度评估多模态大模型在STEM任务中的跨模态推理链。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有STEM基准因模态冗余允许单模态捷径，且仅关注最终答案准确性，忽略推理过程，无法真实评估多模态大模型的跨模态推理能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够细粒度评估多模态大模型在STEM任务中跨模态推理链的基准和评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前多模态大模型仍严重依赖文本推理，即使最强模型（Gemini 3.1 Pro和Claude Opus 4.6）在StepSTEM上准确率仅38.29%，表明跨模态STEM推理仍有很大提升空间。
analysis.method: 构建StepSTEM基准（283个研究生级STEM问题），通过严格筛选确保文本和视觉输入互补；提出基于动态规划的步骤级评估框架，对齐预测推理步骤与多个参考答案。
contributions: 提出StepSTEM基准，包含283个研究生级STEM问题，覆盖数学、物理、化学、生物和工程，确保文本与视觉信息严格互补。
提出通用的步骤级评估框架，支持纯文本思维链和交错图文推理的细粒度评估。
实验表明当前多模态大模型在跨模态STEM推理上仍有显著不足，为未来研究提供基准。
analysis.experiments: 在多种多模态大模型上进行实验，结果显示Gemini 3.1 Pro和Claude Opus 4.6准确率仅38.29%，其他模型表现更差。
limitations: 基准规模较小（283个问题），可能不足以覆盖所有STEM领域。
评估框架依赖动态规划对齐，可能对推理步骤的粒度敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提出细粒度跨模态推理基准，实验揭示当前模型局限，对多模态推理研究有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出StepSTEM基准，用于细粒度评估多模态大模型在STEM任务中的跨模态推理链。

papers.title: A-MAR: Agent-based Multimodal Art Retrieval for Fine-Grained Artwork Understanding
papers.abstract: Understanding artworks requires multi-step reasoning over visual content and cultural, historical, and stylistic context. While recent multimodal large language models show promise in artwork explanation, they rely on implicit reasoning and internalized knowl- edge, limiting interpretability and explicit evidence grounding. We propose A-MAR, an Agent-based Multimodal Art Retrieval framework that explicitly conditions retrieval on structured reasoning plans. Given an artwork and a user query, A-MAR first decomposes the task into a structured reasoning plan that specifies the goals and evidence requirements for each step. Retrieval is then conditionedon this plan, enabling targeted evidence selection and supporting step-wise, grounded explanations. To evaluate agent-based multi- modal reasoning within the art domain, we introduce ArtCoT-QA. This diagnostic benchmark features multi-step reasoning chains for diverse art-related queries, enabling a granular analysis that extends beyond simple final answer accuracy. Experiments on SemArt and Artpedia show that A-MAR consistently outperforms static, non planned retrieval and strong MLLM baselines in final explanation quality, while evaluations on ArtCoT-QA further demonstrate its advantages in evidence grounding and multi-step reasoning ability. These results highlight the importance of reasoning-conditioned retrieval for knowledge-intensive multimodal understanding and position A-MAR as a step toward interpretable, goal-driven AI systems, with particular relevance to cultural industries. The code and data are available at: https://github.com/ShuaiWang97/A-MAR.

analysis.tldr: A-MAR 通过结构化推理计划引导多模态检索，提升艺术品细粒度理解的解释性和证据可溯性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态大模型在艺术品理解中依赖隐式推理和内化知识，缺乏可解释性和显式证据支撑，难以满足文化领域对可溯源性要求。
analysis.problem: 如何实现基于结构化推理计划的可控多模态检索，以支持艺术品细粒度理解中的逐步证据选择和可解释解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 A-MAR 框架，先对用户查询分解为结构化推理计划（指定每步目标和证据需求），再基于该计划进行条件化检索，生成逐步可解释的解释。
contributions: 提出 A-MAR，首个将结构化推理计划显式用于多模态艺术检索的智能体框架。
构建 ArtCoT-QA 诊断基准，支持多步推理链的细粒度评估。
在 SemArt、Artpedia 和 ArtCoT-QA 上验证了方法在解释质量和证据溯因上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在 SemArt、Artpedia 和 ArtCoT-QA 上评估，A-MAR 在最终解释质量上优于静态非计划检索和强 MLLM 基线，在 ArtCoT-QA 上展示了更好的证据溯因和多步推理能力。
limitations: 可能依赖推理计划的质量，复杂查询下计划分解可能不准确。
仅针对艺术领域，泛化到其他知识密集型领域需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，结合推理计划与检索，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: A-MAR 通过结构化推理计划引导多模态检索，提升艺术品细粒度理解的解释性和证据可溯性。

papers.title: Frequency-Forcing: From Scaling-as-Time to Soft Frequency Guidance
papers.abstract: While standard flow-matching models transport noise to data uniformly, incorporating an explicit generation order - specifically, establishing coarse, low-frequency structure before fine detail - has proven highly effective for synthesizing natural images. Two recent works offer distinct paradigms for this. K-Flow imposes a hard frequency constraint by reinterpreting a frequency scaling variable as flow time, running the trajectory inside a transformed amplitude space. Latent Forcing provides a soft ordering mechanism by coupling the pixel flow with an auxiliary semantic latent flow via asynchronous time schedules, leaving the pixel interpolation path itself untouched. Viewed from the angle of improving pixel generation, we observe that forcing - guiding generation with an earlier-maturing auxiliary stream - offers a highly compatible route to scale-ordered generation without rewriting the core flow coordinate. Building on this, we propose Frequency-Forcing, which realizes K-Flow's frequency ordering through Latent Forcing's soft mechanism: a standard pixel flow is guided by an auxiliary low-frequency stream that matures earlier in time. Unlike Latent Forcing, whose scratchpad relies on a heavy pretrained encoder (e.g., DINO), our frequency scratchpad is derived from the data itself via a lightweight learnable wavelet packet transform. We term this a self-forcing signal, which avoids external dependencies while learning a basis better adapted to data statistics than the fixed bases used in hard frequency flows. On ImageNet-256, Frequency-Forcing consistently improves FID over strong pixel- and latent-space baselines, and naturally composes with a semantic stream to yield further gains. This illustrates that forcing-based scale ordering is a versatile, path-preserving alternative to hard frequency flows.

analysis.tldr: 提出Frequency-Forcing，通过软频率引导实现尺度有序生成，无需修改核心流坐标。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准流匹配模型均匀传输噪声，而显式引入生成顺序（先低频结构后细节）对自然图像合成有效，但现有方法存在硬约束或依赖重预训练编码器的局限。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持像素流路径不变的前提下，实现高效且自适应的频率有序生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到通过辅助流引导（forcing）是实现尺度有序生成的兼容路径，且软机制（如Latent Forcing）比硬频率约束更灵活。
analysis.method: 提出Frequency-Forcing，使用轻量可学习小波包变换从数据自身提取低频辅助流，引导标准像素流提前成熟，实现自引导频率排序。
contributions: 提出Frequency-Forcing，结合K-Flow的频率排序与Latent Forcing的软引导机制，无需外部预训练编码器。
引入自引导信号，通过可学习小波包变换适应数据统计特性，优于固定基的硬频率流。
在ImageNet-256上一致提升FID，并能与语义流组合获得进一步增益。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-256上评估，与强像素空间和潜在空间基线相比，Frequency-Forcing一致改善FID。
limitations: 可能仅适用于图像生成任务，未验证其他模态。
可学习小波包变换的额外计算开销未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合两种范式，实验显示有效，但技术细节和泛化性待验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Frequency-Forcing，通过软频率引导实现尺度有序生成，无需修改核心流坐标。

papers.title: IR-Flow: Bridging Discriminative and Generative Image Restoration via Rectified Flow
papers.abstract: In image restoration, single-step discriminative mappings often lack fine details via expectation learning, whereas generative paradigms suffer from inefficient multi-step sampling and noise-residual coupling. To address this dilemma, we propose IR-Flow, a novel image restoration method based on Rectified Flow that serves as a unified framework bridging the gap between discriminative and generative paradigms. Specifically, we first construct multilevel data distribution flows, which expand the ability of models to learn from and adapt to various levels of degradation. Subsequently, cumulative velocity fields are proposed to learn transport trajectories across varying degradation levels, guiding intermediate states toward the clean target, while a multi-step consistency constraint is presented to enforce trajectory coherence and boost few-step restoration performance. We show that directly establishing a linear transport flow between degraded and clean image domains not only enables fast inference but also improves adaptability to out-of-distribution degradations. Extensive evaluations on deraining, denoising and raindrop removal tasks demonstrate that IR-Flow achieves competitive quantitative results with only a few sampling steps, offering an efficient and flexible framework that maintains an excellent distortion-perception balance. Our code is available at https://github.com/fanzh03/IR-Flow.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Rectified Flow的统一图像恢复框架IR-Flow，融合判别式与生成式范式优势，实现少步高效推理并保持失真-感知平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 单步判别式映射因期望学习缺乏细节，而生成式方法存在多步采样效率低和噪声-残差耦合问题，亟需一种兼顾效率与质量的统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能快速推理又能生成高质量细节、同时适应多种退化类型的图像恢复方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Rectified Flow构建多级数据分布流和累积速度场，学习不同退化水平间的传输轨迹，并引入多步一致性约束增强轨迹连贯性。
contributions: 提出IR-Flow，一个基于Rectified Flow的统一图像恢复框架，桥接判别式与生成式范式。
设计多级数据分布流和累积速度场，实现跨退化水平的有效传输，并利用多步一致性约束提升少步恢复性能。
analysis.experiments: 在去雨、去噪和雨滴去除任务上进行了广泛评估，仅用少量采样步骤即达到有竞争力的定量结果，并保持良好的失真-感知平衡。
limitations: 可能对极端退化或复杂场景的泛化能力有限。
多步一致性约束可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合判别式与生成式优势，实验充分且代码开源，对图像恢复领域有较高价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Rectified Flow的统一图像恢复框架IR-Flow，融合判别式与生成式范式优势，实现少步高效推理并保持失真-感知平衡。

papers.title: MMControl: Unified Multi-Modal Control for Joint Audio-Video Generation
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have enabled high-quality joint audio-video generation, producing videos with synchronized audio within a single model. However, existing controllable generation frameworks are typically restricted to video-only control. This restricts comprehensive controllability and often leads to suboptimal cross-modal alignment. To bridge this gap, we present MMControl, which enables users to perform Multi-Modal Control in joint audio-video generation. MMControl introduces a dual-stream conditional injection mechanism. It incorporates both visual and acoustic control signals, including reference images, reference audio, depth maps, and pose sequences, into a joint generation process. These conditions are injected through bypass branches into a joint audio-video Diffusion Transformer, enabling the model to simultaneously generate identity-consistent video and timbre-consistent audio under structural constraints. Furthermore, we introduce modality-specific guidance scaling, which allows users to independently and dynamically adjust the influence strength of each visual and acoustic condition at inference time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MMControl achieves fine-grained, composable control over character identity, voice timbre, body pose, and scene layout in joint audio-video generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出MMControl，首个支持多模态条件（图像、音频、深度图、姿态）联合控制音视频生成的框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可控生成框架仅支持视频单模态控制，导致联合音视频生成中跨模态对齐效果差，用户无法同时控制视觉和听觉属性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现联合音视频生成中视觉与听觉条件的统一、灵活控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 双流条件注入机制：通过旁路分支将视觉（参考图像、深度图、姿态序列）和听觉（参考音频）控制信号注入联合音视频扩散Transformer；引入模态特定引导缩放，允许用户独立动态调整各条件强度。
contributions: 首个支持多模态条件联合控制的音视频生成框架MMControl。
提出双流条件注入机制和模态特定引导缩放，实现细粒度、可组合的控制。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量多模态条件输入，实际应用中获取困难。
引导缩放机制可能增加推理调参复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，首个多模态控制音视频生成框架，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MMControl，首个支持多模态条件（图像、音频、深度图、姿态）联合控制音视频生成的框架。

papers.title: Learning Hybrid-Control Policies for High-Precision In-Contact Manipulation Under Uncertainty
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning-based control policies have been frequently demonstrated to be more effective than analytical techniques for many manipulation tasks. Commonly, these methods learn neural control policies that predict end-effector pose changes directly from observed state information. For tasks like inserting delicate connectors which induce force constraints, pose-based policies have limited explicit control over force and rely on carefully tuned low-level controllers to avoid executing damaging actions. In this work, we present hybrid position-force control policies that learn to dynamically select when to use force or position control in each control dimension. To improve learning efficiency of these policies, we introduce Mode-Aware Training for Contact Handling (MATCH) which adjusts policy action probabilities to explicitly mirror the mode selection behavior in hybrid control. We validate MATCH's learned policy effectiveness using fragile peg-in-hole tasks under extreme localization uncertainty. We find MATCH substantially outperforms pose-control policies -- solving these tasks with up to 10% higher success rates and 5x fewer peg breaks than pose-only policies under common types of state estimation error. MATCH also demonstrates data efficiency equal to pose-control policies, despite learning in a larger and more complex action space. In over 1600 sim-to-real experiments, we find MATCH succeeds twice as often as pose policies in high noise settings (33% vs.~68%) and applies ~30% less force on average compared to variable impedance policies on a Franka FR3 in laboratory conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合位置-力控制策略MATCH，在不确定性下实现高精度接触操作，成功率更高且力更小。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于强化学习的控制策略在操作任务中常优于解析方法，但基于位姿的策略对力控制有限，依赖精细调参的低层控制器，易执行破坏性动作。
analysis.problem: 如何学习混合位置-力控制策略，在不确定性下动态选择每个控制维度的力或位置控制，以提高高精度接触操作的成功率和安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合位置-力控制策略，并引入Mode-Aware Training for Contact Handling (MATCH)，通过调整策略动作概率显式反映混合控制中的模式选择行为。
contributions: 提出混合位置-力控制策略，动态选择每个控制维度的力或位置控制。
引入MATCH训练方法，提高混合策略的学习效率。
在脆弱插销任务中，MATCH相比纯位姿策略成功率提高10%，断针次数减少5倍，且数据效率相当。
analysis.experiments: 在超过1600次仿真到真实实验中，MATCH在高噪声设置下成功率是位姿策略的两倍（33% vs. 68%），在Franka FR3实验室条件下平均施加力比可变阻抗策略少约30%。
limitations: 可能仅在特定接触任务（如插销）上验证，泛化性未知。
混合控制策略的动作空间更大，可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与机器人操作方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合位置-力控制策略MATCH，在不确定性下实现高精度接触操作，成功率更高且力更小。

papers.title: MedFlowSeg: Flow Matching for Medical Image Segmentation with Frequency-Aware Attention
papers.abstract: Flow matching has recently emerged as a principled framework for learning continuous-time transport maps, enabling efficient ODE-based sampling without relying on stochastic diffusion processes. While generative modeling has shown promise for medical image segmentation, particularly in capturing uncertainty and complex anatomical variability, existing approaches are predominantly based on diffusion models, which require iterative sampling and incur substantial computational overhead. In this work, we propose MedFlowSeg, a conditional flow matching framework that formulates medical image segmentation as learning a time-dependent vector field that transports a simple prior distribution to the target segmentation distribution. Compared to diffusion-based methods, our formulation enables more efficient inference through solving an ordinary differential equation, while preserving the flexibility of generative modeling. To effectively incorporate conditional information, we introduce a dual-conditioning mechanism. Specifically, we propose a Dual-Branch Spatial Attention (DB-SA) module to inject multi-frequency structural priors, and a Frequency-Aware Attention (FA-Attention) module to model interactions between spatial and spectral representations via discrepancy-aware fusion and time-dependent modulation. These components improve the alignment between noisy intermediate states and clean semantic features, leading to better structural consistency and boundary delineation. We conduct extensive experiments across multiple medical imaging modalities, where MedFlowSeg consistently outperforms prior state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines, including diffusion-based and flow-based methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于条件流匹配的医学图像分割框架MedFlowSeg，通过频率感知注意力实现高效推理与高精度分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学图像分割方法多基于扩散模型，迭代采样计算开销大，而流匹配框架可提供更高效的ODE采样，同时保持生成建模的灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高效的生成式医学图像分割框架，在降低推理成本的同时提升分割质量（特别是结构一致性和边界清晰度）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MedFlowSeg，采用条件流匹配学习时间相关向量场；设计双分支空间注意力模块注入多频结构先验，以及频率感知注意力模块通过差异感知融合和时间相关调制建模空间与频谱交互。
contributions: 首次将条件流匹配应用于医学图像分割，实现高效ODE推理。
提出双分支空间注意力和频率感知注意力机制，提升结构一致性和边界分割质量。
analysis.experiments: 在多种医学影像模态上实验，MedFlowSeg持续优于包括扩散和流方法在内的先前SOTA。
limitations: 可能对复杂解剖结构的分割边界仍存在模糊。
流匹配框架在极低采样步数下的性能退化未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（流匹配+频率注意力），实验充分且SOTA，与医学图像分割方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于条件流匹配的医学图像分割框架MedFlowSeg，通过频率感知注意力实现高效推理与高精度分割。

papers.title: InHabit: Leveraging Image Foundation Models for Scalable 3D Human Placement
papers.abstract: Training embodied agents to understand 3D scenes as humans do requires large-scale data of people meaningfully interacting with diverse environments, yet such data is scarce. Real-world motion capture is costly and limited to controlled settings, while existing synthetic datasets rely on simple geometric heuristics that ignore rich scene context. In contrast, 2D foundation models trained on internet-scale data have implicitly acquired commonsense knowledge of human-environment interactions. To transfer this knowledge into 3D, we introduce InHabit, a fully automatic and scalable data generator for populating 3D scenes with interacting humans. InHabit follows a render-generate-lift principle: given a rendered 3D scene, a vision-language model proposes contextually meaningful actions, an image-editing model inserts a human, and an optimization procedure lifts the edited result into physically plausible SMPL-X bodies aligned with the scene geometry. Applied to Habitat-Matterport3D, InHabit produces the first large-scale photorealistic 3D human-scene interaction dataset, containing 78K samples across 800 building-scale scenes with complete 3D geometry, SMPL-X bodies, and RGB images. Augmenting standard training data with our samples improves RGB-based 3D human-scene reconstruction and contact estimation, and in a perceptual user study our data is preferred in 78% of cases over the state of the art.

analysis.tldr: 利用2D基础模型自动生成大规模3D人-场景交互数据集，提升3D人体放置与重建性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 训练具身代理理解3D场景需要大量人-环境交互数据，但真实动捕成本高且局限于受控环境，现有合成数据集依赖简单几何启发式，忽略丰富场景上下文。
analysis.problem: 如何自动、可扩展地生成包含物理合理且上下文相关的人-场景交互的3D数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2D基础模型隐式学习了人-环境交互的常识知识，可迁移到3D。
analysis.method: 提出InHabit框架，遵循渲染-生成-提升原则：渲染3D场景，用视觉语言模型提议上下文相关的动作，用图像编辑模型插入人体，通过优化将编辑结果提升为物理合理的SMPL-X人体，并与场景几何对齐。
contributions: 提出InHabit，一种全自动、可扩展的3D场景人体放置数据生成器。
生成首个大规模逼真3D人-场景交互数据集（78K样本，覆盖800个建筑级场景），包含完整3D几何、SMPL-X人体和RGB图像。
实验证明该数据可提升RGB-based 3D人体-场景重建和接触估计性能，用户研究显示78%情况下优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Habitat-Matterport3D上生成数据集，用于RGB-based 3D人体-场景重建和接触估计任务，并进行了用户偏好研究。
limitations: 依赖2D基础模型的质量和多样性，可能引入偏差。
优化过程可能无法处理极端复杂的场景几何。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，生成大规模数据集有显著应用价值，实验充分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用2D基础模型自动生成大规模3D人-场景交互数据集，提升3D人体放置与重建性能。

papers.title: Multi-Cycle Spatio-Temporal Adaptation in Human-Robot Teaming
papers.abstract: Effective human-robot teaming is crucial for the practical deployment of robots in human workspaces. However, optimizing joint human-robot plans remains a challenge due to the difficulty of modeling individualized human capabilities and preferences. While prior research has leveraged the multi-cycle structure of domains like manufacturing to learn an individual's tendencies and adapt plans over repeated interactions, these techniques typically consider task-level and motion-level adaptation in isolation. Task-level methods optimize allocation and scheduling but often ignore spatial interference in close-proximity scenarios; conversely, motion-level methods focus on collision avoidance while ignoring the broader task context. This paper introduces RAPIDDS, a framework that unifies these approaches by modeling an individual's spatial behavior (motion paths) and temporal behavior (time required to complete tasks) over multiple cycles. RAPIDDS then jointly adapts task schedules and steers diffusion models of robot motions to maximize efficiency and minimize proximity accounting for these individualized models. We demonstrate the importance of this dual adaptation through an ablation study in simulation and a physical robot scenario using a 7-DOF robot arm. Finally, we present a user study (n=32) showing significant plan improvement compared to non-adaptive systems across both objective metrics, such as efficiency and proximity, and subjective measures, including fluency and user preference. See this paper's companion video at: https://youtu.be/55Q3lq1fINs.

analysis.tldr: 提出RAPIDDS框架，统一任务级与运动级适应，通过多周期时空建模优化人机协作计划。
analysis.research_motivation: 人机协作中，个体能力与偏好难以建模，现有方法将任务级与运动级适应分离，导致效率低或空间干扰。
analysis.problem: 如何联合优化任务调度与机器人运动，以同时提升效率并减少人机近距离空间干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 任务级方法忽略空间干扰，运动级方法忽略任务上下文，两者分离导致次优。
analysis.method: RAPIDDS框架：建模个体空间行为（运动路径）与时间行为（任务时长），联合适应任务调度与扩散模型驱动的机器人运动。
contributions: 提出统一任务级与运动级适应的多周期时空适应框架RAPIDDS
通过消融实验、物理机器人场景和用户研究（n=32）验证了双适应的重要性
analysis.experiments: 在仿真和7-DOF机械臂物理场景中进行消融实验，并开展32人用户研究，显示相比非自适应系统在效率、接近度、流畅性和用户偏好上均有显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖多周期交互数据，初始周期适应效果有限
未提及对更复杂任务或多人协作场景的扩展性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验充分，用户研究验证有效，与机器人操作方向强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RAPIDDS框架，统一任务级与运动级适应，通过多周期时空建模优化人机协作计划。

papers.title: Chat2Workflow: A Benchmark for Generating Executable Visual Workflows with Natural Language
papers.abstract: At present, executable visual workflows have emerged as a mainstream paradigm in real-world industrial deployments, offering strong reliability and controllability. However, in current practice, such workflows are almost entirely constructed through manual engineering: developers must carefully design workflows, write prompts for each step, and repeatedly revise the logic as requirements evolve-making development costly, time-consuming, and error-prone. To study whether large language models can automate this multi-round interaction process, we introduce Chat2Workflow, a benchmark for generating executable visual workflows directly from natural language, and propose a robust agentic framework to mitigate recurrent execution errors. Chat2Workflow is built from a large collection of real-world business workflows, with each instance designed so that the generated workflow can be transformed and directly deployed to practical workflow platforms such as Dify and Coze. Experimental results show that while state-of-the-art language models can often capture high-level intent, they struggle to generate correct, stable, and executable workflows, especially under complex or changing requirements. Although our agentic framework yields up to 5.34% resolve rate gains, the remaining real-world gap positions Chat2Workflow as a foundation for advancing industrial-grade automation. Code is available at https://github.com/zjunlp/Chat2Workflow.

analysis.tldr: 提出Chat2Workflow基准，评估LLM从自然语言生成可执行视觉工作流的能力，并设计智能体框架缓解执行错误。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前可执行视觉工作流依赖人工构建，成本高、耗时且易出错，亟需自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 研究大语言模型能否从自然语言直接生成可部署的、正确的、稳定的可执行视觉工作流。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有LLM能捕捉高层意图，但在复杂或变化需求下难以生成正确、稳定、可执行的工作流。
analysis.method: 构建基于真实业务工作流的Chat2Workflow基准，并提出一个鲁棒的智能体框架来缓解重复执行错误。
contributions: 提出Chat2Workflow基准，包含大量真实业务工作流，支持直接部署到Dify、Coze等平台。
设计智能体框架，在基准上获得最高5.34%的解决率提升，揭示了当前LLM在工业级自动化中的差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 智能体框架提升有限，真实场景差距仍大。
基准可能未覆盖所有工业工作流类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准聚焦工业级自动化，具有实际应用价值，但方法提升有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Chat2Workflow基准，评估LLM从自然语言生成可执行视觉工作流的能力，并设计智能体框架缓解执行错误。

papers.title: An AI Agent Execution Environment to Safeguard User Data
papers.abstract: AI agents promise to serve as general-purpose personal assistants for their users, which requires them to have access to private user data (e.g., personal and financial information). This poses a serious risk to security and privacy. Adversaries may attack the AI model (e.g., via prompt injection) to exfiltrate user data. Furthermore, sharing private data with an AI agent requires users to trust a potentially unscrupulous or compromised AI model provider with their private data. This paper presents GAAP (Guaranteed Accounting for Agent Privacy), an execution environment for AI agents that guarantees confidentiality for private user data. Through dynamic and directed user prompts, GAAP collects permission specifications from users describing how their private data may be shared, and GAAP enforces that the agent's disclosures of private user data, including disclosures to the AI model and its provider, comply with these specifications. Crucially, GAAP provides this guarantee deterministically, without trusting the agent with private user data, and without requiring any AI model or the user prompt to be free of attacks. GAAP enforces the user's permission specification by tracking how the AI agent accesses and uses private user data. It augments Information Flow Control with novel persistent data stores and annotations that enable it to track the flow of private information both across execution steps within a single task, and also over multiple tasks separated in time. Our evaluation confirms that GAAP blocks all data disclosure attacks, including those that make other state-of-the-art systems disclose private user data to untrusted parties, without a significant impact on agent utility.

analysis.tldr: GAAP是一个AI代理执行环境，通过动态权限规范和细粒度信息流控制，确定性保障用户隐私数据不被泄露。
analysis.research_motivation: AI代理需要访问用户隐私数据（如个人和财务信息），但面临提示注入攻击和不可信模型提供商的隐私泄露风险，现有系统无法提供强安全保证。
analysis.problem: 如何在不可信AI模型和攻击存在的情况下，确定性保证AI代理对用户隐私数据的合规使用与披露。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有最先进系统在攻击下仍会泄露用户数据，而GAAP能阻断所有数据泄露攻击。
analysis.method: GAAP通过动态用户提示收集权限规范，并增强信息流控制（IFC）以跟踪跨步骤和跨任务的私有数据流，强制执行权限规范。
contributions: 提出GAAP执行环境，通过动态权限规范和增强IFC实现用户数据隐私的确定性保障。
引入持久数据存储和注释机制，支持跨任务的信息流跟踪。
实验证明GAAP能阻断所有数据泄露攻击，且对代理效用影响小。
analysis.experiments: 评估表明GAAP能阻断所有数据泄露攻击，包括使其他最先进系统泄露数据的攻击，且对代理效用无显著影响。
limitations: 可能依赖用户准确提供权限规范，用户疏忽可能导致隐私泄露。
持久数据存储和注释可能增加系统复杂性和性能开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，解决AI代理隐私保护关键问题，实验验证有效，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GAAP是一个AI代理执行环境，通过动态权限规范和细粒度信息流控制，确定性保障用户隐私数据不被泄露。

papers.title: A Dual Perspective on Synthetic Trajectory Generators: Utility Framework and Privacy Vulnerabilities
papers.abstract: Human mobility data are used in numerous applications, ranging from public health to urban planning. Human mobility is inherently sensitive, as it can contain information such as religious beliefs and political affiliations. Historically, it has been proposed to modify the information using techniques such as aggregation, obfuscation, or noise addition, to adequately protect privacy and eliminate concerns. As these methods come at a great cost in utility, new methods leveraging development in generative models, were introduced. The extent to which such methods answer the privacy-utility trade-off remains an open problem. In this paper, we introduced a first step towards solving it, by the introduction and application of a new framework for utility evaluation. Furthermore, we provide evidence that privacy evaluation remains a great challenge to consider and that it should be tackled through adversarial evaluation in accordance with the current EU regulation. We propose a new membership inference attack against a subcategory of generative models, even though this subcategory was deemed private due to its resistance over the trajectory user-linking problem.

analysis.tldr: 提出轨迹生成模型的效用评估框架，并揭示其隐私漏洞。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类移动轨迹数据敏感且应用广泛，传统隐私保护方法（如聚合、加噪）严重损害效用，而生成模型虽被引入但隐私-效用权衡尚未解决。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估轨迹生成模型的效用，并揭示其隐私脆弱性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使某些生成模型被认为对轨迹用户链接问题具有抵抗力，仍可能遭受成员推断攻击，隐私评估仍需对抗性方法。
analysis.method: 提出一个效用评估框架，并设计针对生成模型子类的新成员推断攻击。
contributions: 提出并应用了轨迹生成模型的效用评估新框架。
揭示了隐私评估的挑战，并设计了一种新的成员推断攻击，证明即使被认为私密的子类也存在漏洞。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 效用框架可能仅适用于特定类型的轨迹数据或生成模型。
成员推断攻击可能不适用于所有生成模型子类。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出了新的效用框架和隐私攻击，但摘要未提供实验细节，创新性和实用性待验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轨迹生成模型的效用评估框架，并揭示其隐私漏洞。

papers.title: Environmental Sound Deepfake Detection Using Deep-Learning Framework
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose a deep-learning framework for environmental sound deepfake detection (ESDD) -- the task of identifying whether the sound scene and sound event in an input audio recording is fake or not. To this end, we conducted extensive experiments to explore how individual spectrograms, a wide range of network architectures and pre-trained models, ensemble of spectrograms or network architectures affect the ESDD task performance. The experimental results on the benchmark datasets of EnvSDD and ESDD-Challenge-TestSet indicate that detecting deepfake audio of sound scene and detecting deepfake audio of sound event should be considered as individual tasks. We also indicate that the approach of finetuning a pre-trained model is more effective compared with training a model from scratch for the ESDD task. Eventually, our best model, which was finetuned from the pre-trained WavLM model with the proposed three-stage training strategy, achieve the Accuracy of 0.98, F1 Score of 0.95, AuC of 0.99 on EnvSDD Test subset and the Accuracy of 0.88, F1 Score of 0.77, and AuC of 0.92 on ESDD-Challenge-TestSet dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于预训练WavLM微调的环境声音深度伪造检测框架，在双任务上取得高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 环境声音深度伪造（如场景/事件伪造）缺乏有效检测方法，现有研究多聚焦语音伪造，而环境声音的伪造检测更具挑战性且未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何准确检测环境音频中的声音场景和声音事件是否被伪造（即ESDD任务）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，声音场景伪造检测和声音事件伪造检测应视为独立任务；微调预训练模型比从头训练更有效。
analysis.method: 基于预训练WavLM模型，采用三阶段训练策略进行微调，结合多种频谱图和网络架构的集成实验。
contributions: 系统研究了频谱图、网络架构、预训练模型及集成方法对ESDD任务的影响
提出三阶段微调策略，在EnvSDD和ESDD-Challenge-TestSet上达到SOTA性能
analysis.experiments: 在EnvSDD和ESDD-Challenge-TestSet基准数据集上评估，最佳模型在EnvSDD上Accuracy=0.98, F1=0.95, AuC=0.99；在ESDD-Challenge-TestSet上Accuracy=0.88, F1=0.77, AuC=0.92。
limitations: 仅针对环境声音，未验证对语音或音乐伪造的泛化能力
依赖预训练模型，可能对未见过的伪造类型鲁棒性不足
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，但实验充分且性能优异，适合关注音频伪造检测的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于预训练WavLM微调的环境声音深度伪造检测框架，在双任务上取得高精度。

papers.title: CoCo-SAM3: Harnessing Concept Conflict in Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: SAM3 advances open-vocabulary semantic segmentation by introducing a prompt-driven mask generation paradigm. However, in multi-class open-vocabulary scenarios, masks generated independently from different category prompts lack a unified and inter-class comparable evidence scale, often resulting in overlapping coverage and unstable competition. Moreover, synonymous expressions of the same concept tend to activate inconsistent semantic and spatial evidence, leading to intra-class drift that exacerbates inter-class conflicts and compromises overall inference stability. To address these issues, we propose CoCo-SAM3 (Concept-Conflict SAM3), which explicitly decouples inference into intra-class enhancement and inter-class competition. Our method first aligns and aggregates evidence from synonymous prompts to strengthen concept consistency. It then performs inter-class competition on a unified comparable scale, enabling direct pixel-wise comparisons among all candidate classes. This mechanism stabilizes multi-class inference and effectively mitigates inter-class conflicts. Without requiring any additional training, CoCo-SAM3 achieves consistent improvements across eight open-vocabulary semantic segmentation benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: CoCo-SAM3通过显式解耦类内增强和类间竞争，无需额外训练即可提升开放词汇语义分割的多类推理稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放词汇语义分割中，多类场景下独立生成的掩码缺乏统一证据尺度，导致重叠和竞争不稳定；同义表达引发类内漂移，加剧类间冲突。
analysis.problem: 多类开放词汇语义分割中，不同类别提示独立生成掩码导致的证据尺度不一致和类间冲突问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，多类开放词汇场景中，从不同类别提示独立生成的掩码缺乏统一且可类比的证据尺度，导致重叠覆盖和不稳定竞争；同义表达激活不一致的语义和空间证据，造成类内漂移，加剧类间冲突。
analysis.method: 提出CoCo-SAM3，将推理显式解耦为类内增强和类间竞争：先对齐和聚合同义提示的证据以增强概念一致性，再在统一可比尺度上进行类间竞争，实现逐像素直接比较。
contributions: 提出显式解耦类内增强和类间竞争的推理范式，无需额外训练即可提升多类开放词汇分割的稳定性。
在八个开放词汇语义分割基准上取得一致改进。
analysis.experiments: 在八个开放词汇语义分割基准上进行了实验，CoCo-SAM3取得一致改进。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型SAM3的初始质量。
未讨论对极度细粒度类别或罕见概念的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且无需训练，在多个基准上验证有效，与VLM方向强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CoCo-SAM3通过显式解耦类内增强和类间竞争，无需额外训练即可提升开放词汇语义分割的多类推理稳定性。

papers.title: Safety-Critical Contextual Control via Online Riemannian Optimization with World Models
papers.abstract: Modern world models are becoming too complex to admit explicit dynamical descriptions. We study safety-critical contextual control, where a Planner must optimize a task objective using only feasibility samples from a black-box Simulator, conditioned on a context signal $ξ_t$. We develop a sample-based Penalized Predictive Control (PPC) framework grounded in online Riemannian optimization, in which the Simulator compresses the feasibility manifold into a score-based density $\hat{p}(u \mid ξ_t)$ that endows the action space with a Riemannian geometry guiding the Planner's gradient descent. The barrier curvature $κ(ξ_t)$, the minimum curvature of the conditional log-density $-\ln\hat{p}(\cdot\midξ_t)$, governs both convergence rate and safety margin, replacing the Lipschitz constant of the unknown dynamics. Our main result is a contextual safety bound showing that the distance from the true feasibility manifold is controlled by the score estimation error and a ratio that depends on $κ(ξ_t)$, both of which improve with richer context. Simulations on a dynamic navigation task confirm that contextual PPC substantially outperforms marginal and frozen density models, with the advantage growing after environment shifts.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于在线黎曼优化的惩罚预测控制框架，利用世界模型隐式编码的可行性流形实现安全关键上下文控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代世界模型过于复杂，无法显式描述动力学，而安全关键控制需要仅从黑箱模拟器的可行性样本中优化任务目标，现有方法难以处理上下文依赖的约束。
analysis.problem: 如何仅利用黑箱模拟器的可行性样本，在上下文信号条件下，安全地优化控制任务目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出基于在线黎曼优化的PPC框架，利用世界模型隐式编码的可行性流形进行安全关键控制。

analysis.experiments: 在动态导航任务上的仿真表明，上下文PPC显著优于边缘和冻结密度模型，且在环境变化后优势扩大。
limitations: 依赖分数估计的准确性，估计误差可能影响安全边界。

papers.title: SafetyALFRED: Evaluating Safety-Conscious Planning of Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models are increasingly adopted as autonomous agents in interactive environments, yet their ability to proactively address safety hazards remains insufficient. We introduce SafetyALFRED, built upon the embodied agent benchmark ALFRED, augmented with six categories of real-world kitchen hazards. While existing safety evaluations focus on hazard recognition through disembodied question answering (QA) settings, we evaluate eleven state-of-the-art models from the Qwen, Gemma, and Gemini families on not only hazard recognition, but also active risk mitigation through embodied planning. Our experimental results reveal a significant alignment gap: while models can accurately recognize hazards in QA settings, average mitigation success rates for these hazards are low in comparison. Our findings demonstrate that static evaluations through QA are insufficient for physical safety, thus we advocate for a paradigm shift toward benchmarks that prioritize corrective actions in embodied contexts. We open-source our code and dataset under https://github.com/sled-group/SafetyALFRED.git

analysis.tldr: 提出SafetyALFRED基准，揭示多模态大模型在具身环境中安全规划能力不足，存在识别与缓解之间的对齐差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在交互环境中作为自主代理应用日益广泛，但其主动应对安全风险的能力仍不足，现有安全评估多局限于非具身问答场景，缺乏对实际物理环境中风险缓解能力的评测。
analysis.problem: 评估多模态大模型在具身环境中识别和主动缓解安全风险的能力，并揭示静态问答评估与动态规划表现之间的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在问答设置中能准确识别危险，但在具身规划中平均缓解成功率较低，存在显著的对齐差距。
analysis.method: 基于ALFRED基准构建SafetyALFRED，引入六类真实厨房危险场景，评估模型在危险识别和主动风险缓解（通过具身规划）两方面的表现。
contributions: 提出SafetyALFRED基准，扩展ALFRED以包含六类真实厨房危险，用于评估多模态大模型的安全意识规划。
通过实验揭示模型在危险识别与主动缓解之间存在显著对齐差距，证明静态问答评估不足以衡量物理安全。
analysis.experiments: 评估了Qwen、Gemma、Gemini系列的11个最新模型，包括危险识别和具身规划中的风险缓解成功率。
limitations: 仅针对厨房环境，可能不适用于其他场景。
未提供具体缓解策略或模型改进方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出具身安全规划基准，揭示重要对齐差距，方法清晰，实验充分，对安全对齐领域有较高价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SafetyALFRED基准，揭示多模态大模型在具身环境中安全规划能力不足，存在识别与缓解之间的对齐差距。

papers.title: CoInteract: Physically-Consistent Human-Object Interaction Video Synthesis via Spatially-Structured Co-Generation
papers.abstract: Synthesizing human--object interaction (HOI) videos has broad practical value in e-commerce, digital advertising, and virtual marketing. However, current diffusion models, despite their photorealistic rendering capability, still frequently fail on (i) the structural stability of sensitive regions such as hands and faces and (ii) physically plausible contact (e.g., avoiding hand--object interpenetration). We present CoInteract, an end-to-end framework for HOI video synthesis conditioned on a person reference image, a product reference image, text prompts, and speech audio. CoInteract introduces two complementary designs embedded into a Diffusion Transformer (DiT) backbone. First, we propose a Human-Aware Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) that routes tokens to lightweight, region-specialized experts via spatially supervised routing, improving fine-grained structural fidelity with minimal parameter overhead. Second, we propose Spatially-Structured Co-Generation, a dual-stream training paradigm that jointly models an RGB appearance stream and an auxiliary HOI structure stream to inject interaction geometry priors. During training, the HOI stream attends to RGB tokens and its supervision regularizes shared backbone weights; at inference, the HOI branch is removed for zero-overhead RGB generation. Experimental results demonstrate that CoInteract significantly outperforms existing methods in structural stability, logical consistency, and interaction realism.

analysis.tldr: CoInteract 通过人感知 MoE 和空间结构化协同生成，实现物理一致的人-物交互视频合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型在合成人-物交互视频时，常出现手部、面部等敏感区域结构不稳定以及手-物穿透等物理不合理的接触问题，限制了其在电商、广告等领域的实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何生成结构稳定、物理接触合理的人-物交互视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前扩散模型在 HOI 视频合成中，对敏感区域（如手、脸）的结构保持能力不足，且难以避免手-物相互穿透，导致交互不真实。
analysis.method: 提出 CoInteract 框架，基于 Diffusion Transformer (DiT) 骨干，包含两个互补设计：1) 人感知混合专家 (Human-Aware MoE)，通过空间监督路由将 token 分配给区域专用专家，提升细粒度结构保真度；2) 空间结构化协同生成 (Spatially-Structured Co-Generation)，双流训练范式，联合建模 RGB 外观流和辅助 HOI 结构流，注入交互几何先验，推理时移除 HOI 分支实现零开销 RGB 生成。
contributions: 提出人感知混合专家 (Human-Aware MoE)，通过空间监督路由提升敏感区域的结构稳定性。
提出空间结构化协同生成 (Spatially-Structured Co-Generation)，双流训练注入交互几何先验，推理时无额外开销。
在 HOI 视频合成任务上显著优于现有方法，在结构稳定性、逻辑一致性和交互真实感方面表现更佳。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在结构稳定性、逻辑一致性和交互真实感方面显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的人-物交互几何先验数据。
推理时移除 HOI 分支可能损失部分几何信息。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: CoInteract 通过人感知 MoE 和空间结构化协同生成，实现物理一致的人-物交互视频合成。

papers.title: Towards Streaming Target Speaker Extraction via Chunk-wise Interleaved Splicing of Autoregressive Language Model
papers.abstract: While generative models have set new benchmarks for Target Speaker Extraction (TSE), their inherent reliance on global context precludes deployment in real-time applications. Direct adaptation to streaming scenarios often leads to catastrophic inference performance degradation due to the severe mismatch between training and streaming inference. To bridge this gap, we present the first autoregressive (AR) models tailored for streaming TSE. Our approach introduces a Chunk-wise Interleaved Splicing Paradigm that ensures highly efficient and stable streaming inference. To ensure the coherence between the extracted speech segments, we design a historical context refinement mechanism that mitigates boundary discontinuities by leveraging historical information. Experiments on Libri2Mix show that while AR generative baseline exhibits performance degradation at low latencies, our approach maintains 100% stability and superior intelligibility. Furthermore, our streaming results are comparable to or even surpass offline baselines. Additionally, our model achieves a Real-Time-Factor (RTF) of 0.248 on consumer-level GPUs. This work provides empirical evidence that AR generative backbones are viable for latency-sensitive applications through the Chunk-wise Interleaved Splicing Paradigm.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个面向流式目标说话人提取的自回归模型，通过分块交错拼接范式实现高效稳定推理。

提出分块交错拼接范式和历史上下文精炼机制，实现高效稳定推理。

papers.title: Time Series Augmented Generation for Financial Applications
papers.abstract: Evaluating the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) for complex, quantitative financial tasks is a critical and unsolved challenge. Standard benchmarks often fail to isolate an agent's core ability to parse queries and orchestrate computations. To address this, we introduce a novel evaluation methodology and benchmark designed to rigorously measure an LLM agent's reasoning for financial time-series analysis. We apply this methodology in a large-scale empirical study using our framework, Time Series Augmented Generation (TSAG), where an LLM agent delegates quantitative tasks to verifiable, external tools. Our benchmark, consisting of 100 financial questions, is used to compare multiple SOTA agents (e.g., GPT-4o, Llama 3, Qwen2) on metrics assessing tool selection accuracy, faithfulness, and hallucination. The results demonstrate that capable agents can achieve near-perfect tool-use accuracy with minimal hallucination, validating the tool-augmented paradigm. Our primary contribution is this evaluation framework and the corresponding empirical insights into agent performance, which we release publicly to foster standardized research on reliable financial AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出时间序列增强生成（TSAG）框架和金融基准，评估LLM代理在金融时间序列分析中的推理能力。

papers.title: CreatiParser: Generative Image Parsing of Raster Graphic Designs into Editable Layers
papers.abstract: Graphic design images consist of multiple editable layers, such as text, background, and decorative elements, while most generative models produce rasterized outputs without explicit layer structures, limiting downstream editing. Existing graphic design parsing methods typically rely on multi-stage pipelines combining layout prediction, matting, and inpainting, which suffer from error accumulation and limited controllability. We propose a hybrid generative framework for raster-to-layer graphic design parsing that decomposes a design image into editable text, background, and sticker layers. Text regions are parsed using a vision-language model into a text rendering protocol, enabling faithful reconstruction and flexible re-editing, while background and sticker layers are generated using a multi-branch diffusion architecture with RGBA support. We further introduce ParserReward and integrate it with Group Relative Policy Optimization to align generation quality with human design preferences. Extensive experiments on two challenging datasets, \emph{i.e.,} the Parser-40K and Crello datasets, demonstrate superior performance over existing methods, \emph{eg.,} achieving an overall average improvement of 23.7\% across all metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合生成框架CreatiParser，将栅格化图形设计分解为可编辑的文本、背景和贴纸层。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成模型输出栅格化图像缺乏显式图层结构，限制了编辑能力；传统解析方法采用多阶段流水线，存在误差累积和可控性差的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何将栅格化图形设计图像解析为可编辑的独立图层（文本、背景、贴纸）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多阶段流水线（布局预测+抠图+修复）导致误差累积，且对生成质量的控制有限。
analysis.method: 混合生成框架：视觉-语言模型解析文本区域为渲染协议；多分支扩散架构生成带RGBA通道的背景和贴纸层；引入ParserReward结合GRPO对齐人类设计偏好。
contributions: 提出首个混合生成框架实现栅格到图层的设计解析，支持文本、背景、贴纸的分离与编辑。
引入ParserReward和GRPO优化生成质量，在Parser-40K和Crello数据集上平均提升23.7%。

papers.title: MOSA: Motion-Guided Semantic Alignment for Dynamic Scene Graph Generation
papers.abstract: Dynamic Scene Graph Generation (DSGG) aims to structurally model objects and their dynamic interactions in video sequences for high-level semantic understanding. However, existing methods struggle with fine-grained relationship modeling, semantic representation utilization, and the ability to model tail relationships. To address these issues, this paper proposes a motion-guided semantic alignment method for DSGG (MoSA). First, a Motion Feature Extractor (MFE) encodes object-pair motion attributes such as distance, velocity, motion persistence, and directional consistency. Then, these motion attributes are fused with spatial relationship features through the Motion-guided Interaction Module (MIM) to generate motion-aware relationship representations. To further enhance semantic discrimination capabilities, the cross-modal Action Semantic Matching (ASM) mechanism aligns visual relationship features with text embeddings of relationship categories. Finally, a category-weighted loss strategy is introduced to emphasize learning of tail relationships. Extensive and rigorous testing shows that MoSA performs optimally on the Action Genome dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出运动引导语义对齐方法MoSA，通过运动特征提取和跨模态语义匹配提升动态场景图生成中细粒度关系建模与尾部关系学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态场景图生成（DSGG）对视频中对象及其动态交互进行结构化建模，但现有方法在细粒度关系建模、语义表示利用和尾部关系学习方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合运动特征与空间关系，并利用语义对齐提升动态场景图中关系识别的准确性和尾部关系的学习能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在细粒度关系建模、语义表示利用和尾部关系建模方面存在瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出MoSA方法，包含运动特征提取器（MFE）编码对象对运动属性，运动引导交互模块（MIM）融合运动与空间特征，跨模态动作语义匹配（ASM）对齐视觉关系与文本嵌入，以及类别加权损失策略强调尾部关系学习。
contributions: 提出运动引导交互模块融合运动与空间特征生成运动感知关系表示。
引入跨模态动作语义匹配机制对齐视觉关系与文本嵌入，增强语义判别能力。
设计类别加权损失策略提升尾部关系学习效果。
analysis.experiments: 在Action Genome数据集上进行广泛测试，MoSA表现最优。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量运动特征提取，对复杂运动场景泛化性需验证。
跨模态匹配可能受限于关系类别文本描述的丰富性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验仅在一个数据集上，贡献增量，适合阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出运动引导语义对齐方法MoSA，通过运动特征提取和跨模态语义匹配提升动态场景图生成中细粒度关系建模与尾部关系学习。

papers.title: GRAFT: Geometric Refinement and Fitting Transformer for Human Scene Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Reconstructing physically plausible 3D human-scene interactions (HSI) from a single image currently presents a trade-off: optimization based methods offer accurate contact but are slow (~20s), while feed-forward approaches are fast yet lack explicit interaction reasoning, producing floating and interpenetration artifacts. Our key insight is that geometry-based human--scene fitting can be amortized into fast feed-forward inference. We present GRAFT (Geometric Refinement And Fitting Transformer), a learned HSI prior that predicts Interaction Gradients: corrective parameter updates that iteratively refine human meshes by reasoning about their 3D relationship to the surrounding scene. GRAFT encodes the interaction state into compact body-anchored tokens, each grounded in the scene geometry via Geometric Probes that capture spatial relationships with nearby surfaces. A lightweight transformer recurrently updates human meshes and re-probes the scene, ensuring the final pose aligns with both learned priors and observed geometry. GRAFT operates either as an end-to-end reconstructor using image features, or with geometry alone as a transferable plug-and-play HSI prior that improves feed-forward methods without retraining. Experiments show GRAFT improves interaction quality by up to 113% over state-of-the-art feed-forward methods and matches optimization-based interaction quality at ${\sim}50{\times}$ lower runtime, while generalizing seamlessly to in-the-wild multi-person scenes and being preferred in 64.8% of three-way user study. Project page: https://pradyumnaym.github.io/graft .

analysis.tldr: GRAFT通过几何感知的Transformer将人体-场景交互优化加速至前馈推理速度，同时保持高接触质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单图像人体-场景重建方法在速度与交互质量之间存在权衡：优化方法准确但慢，前馈方法快但缺乏交互推理导致漂浮和穿透伪影。
analysis.problem: 如何实现快速且物理合理的人体-场景交互重建，消除漂浮和穿透伪影。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 优化方法准确但慢（~20s），前馈方法快但产生漂浮和穿透伪影。
analysis.method: 提出GRAFT，一种学习到的HSI先验，通过几何探针将交互状态编码为身体锚定令牌，并利用轻量Transformer循环更新人体网格，预测交互梯度进行校正。
contributions: 提出GRAFT，将几何人体-场景拟合摊销为快速前馈推理。
引入交互梯度和几何探针，实现高效且可迁移的HSI先验。
analysis.experiments: 在单图像和多人物场景上评估，GRAFT相比最先进前馈方法交互质量提升高达113%，匹配优化方法质量但速度快约50倍，用户偏好64.8%。
limitations: 可能依赖场景几何的准确获取。
对于极端遮挡或复杂交互可能仍有局限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与3D视觉和场景理解高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GRAFT通过几何感知的Transformer将人体-场景交互优化加速至前馈推理速度，同时保持高接触质量。

papers.title: SAGE: Training-Free Semantic Evidence Composition for Edge-Cloud Inference under Hard Uplink Budgets
papers.abstract: Edge-cloud hybrid inference offloads difficult inputs to a powerful remote model, but the uplink channel imposes hard per-request constraints on the number of bits that can be transmitted. We show that selecting transmitted content based solely on attention-based importance, the standard approach in collaborative inference, is inherently limited under hard budgets. Two findings support this claim. First, replacing high-importance units with low-importance but complementary ones improves server accuracy. This shows that what matters is not individual importance but how well the transmitted set covers diverse aspects of the input. Second, spatially uniform selection without any content information achieves competitive accuracy at moderate budgets. This confirms that spatial coverage alone carries independent value. Based on this analysis, we propose SAGE (Semantic Attention-Guided Evidence), a principled, training-free method that combines importance filtering with embedding-diversity sampling. SAGE achieves 93% of the server ceiling in offloaded accuracy while transmitting fewer than half of the available evidence units on ImageNet-1K, substantially outperforming importance-only composition.

analysis.tldr: 提出无训练语义证据组合方法SAGE，在硬上行链路预算下通过结合重要性过滤与嵌入多样性采样提升边缘-云推理精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 边缘-云混合推理中，上行链路对每请求传输比特数有严格限制，现有基于注意力重要性的内容选择方法在硬预算下性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在硬上行链路预算下，从输入中选择最有效的证据单元子集以最大化远程模型推理精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现两个现象：1) 用低重要性但互补的单元替换高重要性单元可提升精度，说明覆盖输入多样方面比个体重要性更重要；2) 无内容信息的空间均匀选择在中等预算下达到竞争精度，表明空间覆盖本身具有独立价值。
analysis.method: SAGE：一种无训练方法，结合重要性过滤与嵌入多样性采样，先基于注意力重要性筛选候选单元，再通过嵌入多样性采样确保所选单元覆盖输入的不同语义方面。
contributions: 揭示硬预算下基于注意力重要性的内容选择存在固有局限，并证明多样性和空间覆盖的重要性。
提出SAGE方法，无需训练即可在硬预算下显著优于仅基于重要性的方法，在ImageNet-1K上以少于一半的证据单元达到93%的服务器上限精度。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-1K数据集上评估，与仅基于重要性的方法对比，SAGE在传输少于一半证据单元时达到93%的服务器上限精度。摘要未提供其他数据集或消融实验细节。
limitations: 仅在图像分类任务上验证，未涉及其他模态或任务。
方法依赖预训练模型的注意力图和嵌入，可能受模型架构影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验有效，但仅限图像分类，应用范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无训练语义证据组合方法SAGE，在硬上行链路预算下通过结合重要性过滤与嵌入多样性采样提升边缘-云推理精度。

papers.title: Volume Transformer: Revisiting Vanilla Transformers for 3D Scene Understanding
papers.abstract: Transformers have become a common foundation across deep learning, yet 3D scene understanding still relies on specialized backbones with strong domain priors. This keeps the field isolated from the broader Transformer ecosystem, limiting the transfer of new advances as well as the benefits of increasingly optimized software and hardware stacks. To bridge this gap, we adapt the vanilla Transformer encoder to 3D scenes with minimal modifications. Given an input 3D scene, we partition it into volumetric patch tokens, process them with full global self-attention, and inject positional information via a 3D extension of rotary positional embeddings. We call the resulting model the Volume Transformer (Volt) and apply it to 3D semantic segmentation. Naively training Volt on standard 3D benchmarks leads to shortcut learning, highlighting the limited scale of current 3D supervision. To overcome this, we introduce a data-efficient training recipe based on strong 3D augmentations, regularization, and distillation from a convolutional teacher, making Volt competitive with state-of-the-art methods. We then scale supervision through joint training on multiple datasets and show that Volt benefits more from increased scale than domain-specific 3D backbones, achieving state-of-the-art results across indoor and outdoor datasets. Finally, when used as a drop-in backbone in a standard 3D instance segmentation pipeline, Volt again sets a new state of the art, highlighting its potential as a simple, scalable, general-purpose backbone for 3D scene understanding.

analysis.tldr: 将标准Transformer编码器适配到3D场景理解，通过体素化、全局自注意力和3D旋转位置编码，结合数据高效训练策略，实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D场景理解仍依赖具有强领域先验的专用骨干网络，与更广泛的Transformer生态隔离，限制了新进展的迁移和软硬件优化收益。
analysis.problem: 如何用最小修改的vanilla Transformer编码器处理3D场景，并解决3D监督数据规模有限导致的捷径学习问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在标准3D基准上直接训练Volt会导致捷径学习，表明当前3D监督数据规模有限。
analysis.method: 将3D场景划分为体素块标记，使用全局自注意力处理，通过3D旋转位置编码注入位置信息；引入基于强3D数据增强、正则化和卷积教师蒸馏的数据高效训练策略。
contributions: 提出Volume Transformer (Volt)，将vanilla Transformer编码器适配到3D场景理解，仅需最小修改。
发现并解决了直接训练时的捷径学习问题，提出数据高效训练策略。
通过多数据集联合训练展示Volt比专用3D骨干网络更受益于规模扩展，在室内外数据集上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在3D语义分割和实例分割任务上评估，室内外数据集均达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能对体素分辨率敏感，高分辨率下计算成本高。
训练策略依赖卷积教师蒸馏，可能限制完全端到端训练。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简洁有效，实验充分，在3D场景理解领域有潜力成为通用骨干，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将标准Transformer编码器适配到3D场景理解，通过体素化、全局自注意力和3D旋转位置编码，结合数据高效训练策略，实现SOTA。

papers.title: AblateCell: A Reproduce-then-Ablate Agent for Virtual Cell Repositories
papers.abstract: Systematic ablations are essential to attribute performance gains in AI Virtual Cells, yet they are rarely performed because biological repositories are under-standardized and tightly coupled to domain-specific data and formats. While recent coding agents can translate ideas into implementations, they typically stop at producing code and lack a verifier that can reproduce strong baselines and rigorously test which components truly matter. We introduce AblateCell, a reproduce-then-ablate agent for virtual cell repositories that closes this verification gap. AblateCell first reproduces reported baselines end-to-end by auto-configuring environments, resolving dependency and data issues, and rerunning official evaluations while emitting verifiable artifacts. It then conducts closed-loop ablation by generating a graph of isolated repository mutations and adaptively selecting experiments under a reward that trades off performance impact and execution cost. Evaluated on three single-cell perturbation prediction repositories (CPA, GEARS, BioLORD), AblateCell achieves 88.9% (+29.9% to human expert) end-to-end workflow success and 93.3% (+53.3% to heuristic) accuracy in recovering ground-truth critical components. These results enable scalable, repository-grounded verification and attribution directly on biological codebases.

analysis.tldr: 提出AblateCell，一个先复现后消融的智能体，用于虚拟细胞仓库的组件归因验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物仓库缺乏标准化且与领域特定数据格式紧密耦合，导致系统性消融实验难以进行；现有编码智能体只生成代码，缺乏验证器来复现强基线并测试组件重要性。
analysis.problem: 如何自动复现虚拟细胞仓库的基线结果，并高效执行消融实验以归因性能增益。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: AblateCell采用两阶段流程：先通过自动配置环境、解决依赖和数据问题、重新运行官方评估并生成可验证工件来端到端复现基线；然后通过生成隔离仓库突变的图，并在奖励（权衡性能影响和执行成本）下自适应选择实验进行闭环消融。
contributions: 提出AblateCell，首个先复现后消融的智能体，用于虚拟细胞仓库的验证和归因。
在三个单细胞扰动预测仓库上实现88.9%的端到端工作流成功率（比人类专家高29.9%）和93.3%的关键组件恢复准确率（比启发式高53.3%）。
analysis.experiments: 在CPA、GEARS、BioLORD三个单细胞扰动预测仓库上评估，AblateCell达到88.9%端到端工作流成功率和93.3%关键组件恢复准确率。
limitations: 可能依赖仓库的代码质量和文档完整性。
消融实验的奖励设计可能无法完全覆盖所有重要组件。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，但领域较专（虚拟细胞仓库），与核心VLM/LLM方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AblateCell，一个先复现后消融的智能体，用于虚拟细胞仓库的组件归因验证。

papers.title: Cross-Model Consistency of AI-Generated Exercise Prescriptions: A Repeated Generation Study Across Three Large Language Models
papers.abstract: This study compared repeated generation consistency of exercise prescription outputs across three large language models (LLMs), specifically GPT-4.1, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and Gemini 2.5 Flash, under temperature=0 conditions. Each model generated prescriptions for six clinical scenarios 20 times, yielding 360 total outputs analyzed across four dimensions: semantic similarity, output reproducibility, FITT classification, and safety expression. Mean semantic similarity was highest for GPT-4.1 (0.955), followed by Gemini 2.5 Flash (0.950) and Claude Sonnet 4.6 (0.903), with significant inter-model differences confirmed (H = 458.41, p < .001). Critically, these scores reflected fundamentally different generative behaviors: GPT-4.1 produced entirely unique outputs (100%) with stable semantic content, while Gemini 2.5 Flash showed pronounced output repetition (27.5% unique outputs), indicating that its high similarity score derived from text duplication rather than consistent reasoning. Identical decoding settings thus yielded fundamentally different consistency profiles, a distinction that single-output evaluations cannot capture. Safety expression reached ceiling levels across all models, confirming its limited utility as a differentiating metric. These results indicate that model selection constitutes a clinical rather than merely technical decision, and that output behavior under repeated generation conditions should be treated as a core criterion for reliable deployment of LLM-based exercise prescription systems.

analysis.tldr: GPT-4.1、Claude Sonnet 4.6和Gemini 2.5 Flash在零温度下重复生成运动处方时，语义相似度虽高但生成行为差异显著，GPT-4.1输出完全唯一而Gemini 2.5 Flash存在大量文本重复。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在临床运动处方生成中的应用日益增多，但现有评估多基于单次输出，忽略了重复生成的一致性这一关键可靠性指标，可能导致模型选择不当。
analysis.problem: 比较不同LLM在零温度条件下重复生成运动处方时的一致性，揭示语义相似度背后的生成行为差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GPT-4.1语义相似度最高（0.955）且输出完全唯一（100%），Gemini 2.5 Flash相似度次之（0.950）但仅27.5%输出唯一，表明高相似度源于文本重复而非稳定推理；Claude Sonnet 4.6相似度最低（0.903）。安全性表达在所有模型中均达天花板，无区分度。
analysis.method: 对GPT-4.1、Claude Sonnet 4.6和Gemini 2.5 Flash在温度=0下，针对6个临床场景各重复生成20次运动处方，共360个输出，从语义相似度、输出可重复性、FITT分类和安全性表达四个维度分析。
contributions: 首次系统比较LLM在零温度下重复生成运动处方的一致性，揭示语义相似度不能反映真实生成行为。
提出输出唯一性作为评估LLM可靠性的关键指标，并指出模型选择是临床决策而非纯技术选择。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅涉及三个LLM，可能不适用于其他模型。
仅针对运动处方场景，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简单但问题新颖，对临床LLM部署有启示，但实验细节不足。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GPT-4.1、Claude Sonnet 4.6和Gemini 2.5 Flash在零温度下重复生成运动处方时，语义相似度虽高但生成行为差异显著，GPT-4.1输出完全唯一而Gemini 2.5 Flash存在大量文本重复。

papers.title: PC2Model: ISPRS benchmark on 3D point cloud to model registration
papers.abstract: Point cloud registration involves aligning one point cloud with another or with a three-dimensional (3D) model, enabling the integration of multimodal data into a unified representation. This is essential in applications such as construction monitoring, autonomous driving, robotics, and virtual or augmented reality (VR/AR). With the increasing accessibility of point cloud acquisition technologies, such as Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) and structured light scanning, along with recent advances in deep learning, the research focus has increasingly shifted towards downstream tasks, particularly point cloud-to-model (PC2Model) registration. While data-driven methods aim to automate this process, they struggle with sparsity, noise, clutter, and occlusions in real-world scans, which limit their performance. To address these challenges, this paper introduces the PC2Model benchmark, a publicly available dataset designed to support the training and evaluation of both classical and data-driven methods. Developed under the leadership of ICWG II/Ib, the PC2Model benchmark adopts a hybrid design that combines simulated point clouds with, in some cases, real-world scans and their corresponding 3D models. Simulated data provide precise ground truth and controlled conditions, while real-world data introduce sensor and environmental artefacts. This design supports robust training and evaluation across domains and enables the systematic analysis of model transferability from simulated to real-world scenarios. The dataset is publicly accessible at: https://zenodo.org/records/17581812

analysis.tldr: PC2Model 基准数据集用于评估点云到模型配准方法，结合模拟与真实数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 点云配准在建筑监测、自动驾驶、机器人等领域至关重要，但现有数据驱动方法在真实扫描中的稀疏、噪声、遮挡等挑战下性能受限，缺乏统一的基准来评估和推动方法发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个公开、混合模拟与真实数据的基准数据集，以支持点云到模型配准方法的训练、评估和跨域迁移分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数据驱动方法在真实扫描中因稀疏、噪声、杂乱和遮挡而表现不佳，模拟数据与真实数据之间存在领域差异。
analysis.method: 构建 PC2Model 基准数据集，采用混合设计：模拟点云提供精确真值和受控条件，真实扫描引入传感器和环境伪影，支持跨域训练和迁移性分析。
contributions: 提出了一个公开的 PC2Model 基准数据集，用于点云到模型配准任务。
数据集采用模拟与真实数据混合设计，支持鲁棒训练和跨域迁移评估。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限，未提及具体样本数量。
仅关注点云到模型配准，未覆盖其他配准类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提供了有价值的基准数据集，但方法创新有限，实验细节缺失。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PC2Model 基准数据集用于评估点云到模型配准方法，结合模拟与真实数据。

papers.title: RoLegalGEC: Legal Domain Grammatical Error Detection and Correction Dataset for Romanian
papers.abstract: The importance of clear and correct text in legal documents cannot be understated, and, consequently, a grammatical error correction tool meant to assist a professional in the law must have the ability to understand the possible errors in the context of a legal environment, correcting them accordingly, and implicitly needs to be trained in the same environment, using realistic legal data. However, the manually annotated data required by such a process is in short supply for languages such as Romanian, much less for a niche domain. The most common approach is the synthetic generation of parallel data; however, it requires a structured understanding of the Romanian grammar. In this paper, we introduce, to our knowledge, the first Romanian-language parallel dataset for the detection and correction of grammatical errors in the legal domain, RoLegalGEC, which aggregates 350,000 examples of errors in legal passages, along with error annotations. Moreover, we evaluate several neural network models that transform the dataset into a valuable tool for both detecting and correcting grammatical errors, including knowledge-distillation Transformers, sequence tagging architectures for detection, and a variety of pre-trained text-to-text Transformer models for correction. We consider that the set of models, together with the novel RoLegalGEC dataset, will enrich the resource base for further research on Romanian.

analysis.tldr: 首个罗马尼亚语法律领域语法错误检测与校正数据集及模型评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 法律文档中清晰正确的文本至关重要，但罗马尼亚语等语言缺乏法律领域的人工标注语法错误数据，现有方法多依赖合成数据，需要结构化理解罗马尼亚语法。
analysis.problem: 罗马尼亚语法律领域缺乏用于语法错误检测与校正的并行数据集和专用模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了包含35万条法律段落错误示例的并行数据集RoLegalGEC，并评估了知识蒸馏Transformer、序列标注架构和多种预训练文本到文本Transformer模型用于检测和校正。
contributions: 首个罗马尼亚语法律领域语法错误检测与校正并行数据集RoLegalGEC，含35万条错误示例及标注。
评估了多种神经网络模型（知识蒸馏Transformer、序列标注、预训练文本到文本模型）在该数据集上的性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖罗马尼亚语法律领域，泛化性未知。
合成数据可能无法完全模拟真实错误分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个罗马尼亚语法律领域GEC数据集，但摘要未提供实验结果，技术贡献中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个罗马尼亚语法律领域语法错误检测与校正数据集及模型评估。

papers.title: Structure-Semantic Decoupled Modulation of Global Geospatial Embeddings for High-Resolution Remote Sensing Mapping
papers.abstract: Fine-grained high-resolution remote sensing mapping typically relies on localized visual features, which restricts cross-domain generalizability and often leads to fragmented predictions of large-scale land covers. While global geospatial foundation models offer powerful, generalizable representations, directly fusing their high-dimensional implicit embeddings with high-resolution visual features frequently triggers feature interference and spatial structure degradation due to a severe semantic-spatial gap. To overcome these limitations, we propose a Structure-Semantic Decoupled Modulation (SSDM) framework, which decouples global geospatial representations into two complementary cross-modal injection pathways. First, the structural prior modulation branch introduces the macroscopic receptive field priors from global representations into the self-attention modules of the high-resolution encoder. By guiding local feature extraction with holistic structural constraints, it effectively suppresses prediction fragmentation caused by high-frequency detail noise and excessive intra-class variance. Second, the global semantic injection branch explicitly aligns holistic context with the deep high-resolution feature space and directly supplements global semantics via cross-modal integration, thereby significantly enhancing the semantic consistency and category-level discrimination of complex land covers. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to existing cross-modal fusion approaches. By unleashing the potential of global embeddings, SSDM consistently improves high-resolution mapping accuracy across diverse scenarios, providing a universal and effective paradigm for integrating geospatial foundation models into high-resolution vision tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构-语义解耦调制框架，融合全局地理空间嵌入与高分辨率视觉特征，提升遥感制图精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率遥感制图依赖局部视觉特征，导致跨域泛化性差且大尺度地物预测碎片化；全局地理空间基础模型虽提供强表征，但直接融合会因语义-空间鸿沟引发特征干扰和空间结构退化。

analysis.method: 提出结构-语义解耦调制（SSDM）框架，包含两个互补的跨模态注入路径：结构先验调制分支将全局表征的宏观感受野先验引入高分辨率编码器的自注意力模块，抑制预测碎片化；全局语义注入分支通过跨模态集成对齐全局上下文并补充全局语义，增强语义一致性和类别判别力。

通过结构先验调制和全局语义注入，有效缓解特征干扰和空间结构退化，提升高分辨率遥感制图精度。
在多种场景下实现跨模态融合方法的最优性能，为地理空间基础模型融入高分辨率视觉任务提供通用范式。

papers.title: SmartPhotoCrafter: Unified Reasoning, Generation and Optimization for Automatic Photographic Image Editing
papers.abstract: Traditional photographic image editing typically requires users to possess sufficient aesthetic understanding to provide appropriate instructions for adjusting image quality and camera parameters. However, this paradigm relies on explicit human instruction of aesthetic intent, which is often ambiguous, incomplete, or inaccessible to non-expert users. In this work, we propose SmartPhotoCrafter, an automatic photographic image editing method which formulates image editing as a tightly coupled reasoning-to-generation process. The proposed model first performs image quality comprehension and identifies deficiencies by the Image Critic module, and then the Photographic Artist module realizes targeted edits to enhance image appeal, eliminating the need for explicit human instructions. A multi-stage training pipeline is adopted: (i) Foundation pretraining to establish basic aesthetic understanding and editing capabilities, (ii) Adaptation with reasoning-guided multi-edit supervision to incorporate rich semantic guidance, and (iii) Coordinated reasoning-to generation reinforcement learning to jointly optimize reasoning and generation. During training, SmartPhotoCrafter emphasizes photo-realistic image generation, while supporting both image restoration and retouching tasks with consistent adherence to color- and tone-related semantics. We also construct a stage-specific dataset, which progressively builds reasoning and controllable generation, effective cross-module collaboration, and ultimately high-quality photographic enhancement. Experiments demonstrate that SmartPhotoCrafter outperforms existing generative models on the task of automatic photographic enhancement, achieving photo-realistic results while exhibiting higher tonal sensitivity to retouching instructions. Project page: https://github.com/vivoCameraResearch/SmartPhotoCrafter.

analysis.tldr: 提出SmartPhotoCrafter，将摄影图像编辑建模为推理到生成的紧密耦合过程，无需用户明确指令即可自动提升图像质量。

papers.title: Impact of large language models on peer review opinions from a fine-grained perspective: Evidence from top conference proceedings in AI
papers.abstract: With the rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), the academic community has faced unprecedented disruptions, particularly in the realm of academic communication. The primary function of peer review is improving the quality of academic manuscripts, such as clarity, originality and other evaluation aspects. Although prior studies suggest that LLMs are beginning to influence peer review, it remains unclear whether they are altering its core evaluative functions. Moreover, the extent to which LLMs affect the linguistic form, evaluative focus, and recommendation-related signals of peer-review reports has yet to be systematically examined. In this study, we examine the changes in peer review reports for academic articles following the emergence of LLMs, emphasizing variations at fine-grained level. Specifically, we investigate linguistic features such as the length and complexity of words and sentences in review comments, while also automatically annotating the evaluation aspects of individual review sentences. We also use a maximum likelihood estimation method, previously established, to identify review reports that potentially have modified or generated by LLMs. Finally, we assess the impact of evaluation aspects mentioned in LLM-assisted review reports on the informativeness of recommendation for paper decision-making. The results indicate that following the emergence of LLMs, peer review texts have become longer and more fluent, with increased emphasis on summaries and surface-level clarity, as well as more standardized linguistic patterns, particularly reviewers with lower confidence score. At the same time, attention to deeper evaluative dimensions, such as originality, replicability, and nuanced critical reasoning, has declined.

analysis.tldr: LLM使同行评审文本更长更流畅，但削弱了对原创性等深层维度的关注。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM正在影响学术交流，但尚不清楚是否改变了同行评审的核心评价功能，需要系统分析其对评审报告语言形式、评价焦点和推荐信号的影响。
analysis.problem: 量化LLM出现前后同行评审报告在细粒度层面的变化，包括语言特征、评价方面和LLM辅助信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM出现后，评审文本变长、更流畅，更强调总结和表面清晰度，语言模式更标准化（尤其低信心评审者），但对原创性、可复现性和细致批判性推理等深层评价维度的关注下降。
analysis.method: 分析评审报告的语言特征（词句长度、复杂度），自动标注评价方面，使用最大似然估计识别可能由LLM修改或生成的报告，并评估评价方面对推荐信息量的影响。
contributions: 从细粒度视角系统揭示了LLM对同行评审报告语言和评价焦点的影响
发现LLM导致评审更注重表面质量而削弱深层评价维度

papers.title: TransSplat: Unbalanced Semantic Transport for Language-Driven 3DGS Editing
papers.abstract: Language-driven 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) editing provides a more convenient approach for modifying complex scenes in VR/AR. Standard pipelines typically adopt a two-stage strategy: first editing multiple 2D views, and then optimizing the 3D representation to match these edited observations. Existing methods mainly improve view consistency through multi-view feature fusion, attention filtering, or iterative recalibration. However, they fail to explicitly address a more fundamental issue: the semantic correspondence between edited 2D evidence and 3D Gaussians. To tackle this problem, we propose TransSplat, which formulates language-driven 3DGS editing as a multi-view unbalanced semantic transport problem. Specifically, our method establishes correspondences between visible Gaussians and view-specific editing prototypes, thereby explicitly characterizing the semantic relationship between edited 2D evidence and 3D Gaussians. It further recovers a cross-view shared canonical 3D edit field to guide unified 3D appearance updates. In addition, we use transport residuals to suppress erroneous edits in non-target regions, mitigating edit leakage and improving local control precision. Qualitative and quantitative results show that, compared with existing 3D editing methods centered on enhancing view consistency, TransSplat achieves superior performance in local editing accuracy and structural consistency.

analysis.tldr: 提出将语言驱动的3DGS编辑建模为多视图不平衡语义传输问题，提升局部编辑精度与结构一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言驱动3DGS编辑方法主要关注多视图一致性增强，但忽略了编辑后的2D证据与3D高斯之间的语义对应这一根本问题，导致编辑精度和局部控制不足。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法通过多视图特征融合、注意力过滤或迭代重校准来提升视图一致性，但未能解决语义对应问题，导致编辑泄漏和局部控制精度差。
analysis.method: 将语言驱动3DGS编辑建模为多视图不平衡语义传输问题，建立可见高斯与视图特定编辑原型之间的对应关系，恢复跨视图共享的规范3D编辑场，并利用传输残差抑制非目标区域的错误编辑。
contributions: 首次将语言驱动3DGS编辑形式化为多视图不平衡语义传输问题，显式建模2D-3D语义对应。
提出传输残差机制抑制编辑泄漏，提升局部控制精度。
