papers.title: Is Four Enough? Automated Reasoning Approaches and Dual Bounds for Condorcet Dimensions of Elections
papers.abstract: In an election where $n$ voters rank $m$ candidates, a Condorcet winning set is a committee of $k$ candidates such that for any outside candidate, a majority of voters prefer some committee member. Condorcet's paradox shows that some elections admit no Condorcet winning sets with a single candidate (i.e., $k=1$), and the same can be shown for $k=2$. On the other hand, recent work proves that a set of size $k=5$ exists for every election. This leaves an important theoretical gap between the best known lower bound $(k\geq 3)$ and upper bound $(k \leq 5)$ for the number of candidates needed to guarantee existence. We aim to close the gap between the existence guarantees and impossibility results for Condorcet winning sets. We explore an automated reasoning approach to tighten these bounds. We design a mixed-integer linear program (MILP) to search for elections that would serve as counter-examples to conjectured bounds. We employ a number of optimizations, such as symmetry breaking, subsampling, and constraint generation, to enhance the search and model effectively infinite electorates. Furthermore, we analyze the dual of the linear programming relaxation as a path towards obtaining a new upper bound. Despite extensive search on moderate-sized elections, we fail to find any election requiring a committee larger than size 3. Motivated by our experimental results in this direction, we simplify the dual linear program and formulate a conjecture which, if true, implies that a winning set of size 4 always exists. Our automated reasoning results provide strong empirical evidence that the Condorcet dimension of any election may be smaller than currently known upper bounds, at least for small instances. We offer a general-purpose framework for searching elections in ranked voting and a new, concrete analytical path via duality toward proving that smaller committees suffice.

analysis.tldr: 通过混合整数线性规划和线性规划对偶分析，探索Condorcet赢家集的最小保证大小，实验表明大小为4可能总是足够。
analysis.research_motivation: Condorcet赢家集的存在性保证与不可能性结果之间存在理论空白（已知下界k≥3，上界k≤5），需要缩小这一差距。

papers.title: RF-HiT: Rectified Flow Hierarchical Transformer for General Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Accurate medical image segmentation requires both long-range contextual reasoning and precise boundary delineation, a task where existing transformer- and diffusion-based paradigms are frequently bottlenecked by quadratic computational complexity and prohibitive inference latency. We propose RF-HiT, a Rectified Flow Hierarchical Transformer that integrates an hourglass transformer backbone with a multi-scale hierarchical encoder for anatomically guided feature conditioning. Unlike prior diffusion-based approaches, RF-HiT leverages rectified flow with efficient transformer blocks to achieve linear complexity while requiring only a few discretization steps. The model further fuses conditioning features across resolutions via learnable interpolation, enabling effective multi-scale representation with minimal computational overhead. As a result, RF-HiT achieves a strong efficiency-performance trade-off, requiring only 10.14 GFLOPs, 13.6M parameters, and inference in as few as three steps. Despite its compact design, RF-HiT attains 91.27% mean Dice on ACDC and 87.40% on BraTS 2021, achieving performance comparable to or exceeding that of significantly more intensive architectures. This demonstrates its strong potential as a robust, computationally efficient foundation for real-time clinical segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出RF-HiT，一种结合整流流与层次化Transformer的医学图像分割模型，实现线性复杂度与高效推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Transformer和扩散模型在医学图像分割中面临二次计算复杂度和高推理延迟的瓶颈，难以满足实时临床需求。

contributions: 提出RF-HiT，首个将整流流与层次化Transformer结合用于通用医学图像分割的模型。
实现线性复杂度，仅需少量离散化步骤（如3步）即可完成推理，参数13.6M，GFLOPs 10.14。
在ACDC和BraTS 2021上达到91.27%和87.40%的平均Dice，性能媲美或超越更复杂的架构。

papers.title: Lyapunov-Certified Direct Switching Theory for Q-Learning
papers.abstract: Q-learning is a fundamental algorithmic primitive in reinforcement learning. This paper develops a new framework for analyzing Q-learning from a switching-system viewpoint. In particular, we derive a direct stochastic switching-system representation of the Q-learning error. The key observation is that the Bellman maximization error can be expressed exactly as an average of action-wise Q-errors under a suitable stochastic policy. The resulting recursion has a switched linear conditional-mean drift and martingale-difference noise. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first convergence-rate analysis of standard Q-learning whose leading exponential rate is expressed through the joint spectral radius (JSR) of a direct switching family. Since the JSR is the exact worst-case exponential rate of the associated switched linear drift, the resulting rate is among the tightest drift-based rates that can be certified for this Q-learning representation. Building on this representation, we prove finite-time bounds based on a product-defined JSR-induced Lyapunov function and also give an optional common quadratic Lyapunov certificate. The quadratic certificate is only a sufficient condition and hence applies only to instances for which the certificate is feasible, whereas the JSR-induced Lyapunov construction applies to the full direct switching family whenever its JSR is below one. When feasible, the quadratic certificate replaces product-based verification by a computable matrix inequality and gives a simpler stochastic bound. We further extend the framework to Markovian observation models.

analysis.tldr: 从切换系统视角为Q-learning建立直接切换理论，利用联合谱半径导出紧致指数收敛率。
analysis.research_motivation: Q-learning的收敛率分析长期缺乏紧致上界，现有方法多基于间接表示或保守的Lyapunov函数，难以刻画其真实指数收敛速度。
analysis.problem: 如何从切换系统角度直接表示Q-learning误差，并利用联合谱半径（JSR）导出紧致的指数收敛率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Bellman最大化误差可精确表示为动作-wise Q误差在随机策略下的平均，从而得到具有切换线性条件均值漂移和鞅差噪声的递归形式。
analysis.method: 将Q-learning误差建模为直接随机切换系统，利用联合谱半径（JSR）刻画最坏情况指数率，并构造JSR诱导的Lyapunov函数证明有限时间界；同时给出可选的公共二次Lyapunov证书。
contributions: 首次将标准Q-learning的指数收敛率通过直接切换族的联合谱半径表达，得到最紧的漂移基收敛率。
基于JSR诱导的Lyapunov函数证明有限时间界，并给出可计算的二次Lyapunov证书作为充分条件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 二次Lyapunov证书仅为充分条件，并非所有实例都可行。
分析依赖于JSR小于1的条件，可能不适用于所有Q-learning变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 理论创新性强，方法严谨，对RL理论有重要贡献，但缺乏实验验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从切换系统视角为Q-learning建立直接切换理论，利用联合谱半径导出紧致指数收敛率。

papers.title: Multi-modal Reasoning with LLMs for Visual Semantic Arithmetic
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) as post-training is crucial for enhancing the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs) in coding and math. However, their capacity for visual semantic arithmetic, inferring relationships from images, remains underexplored. The classic text analogy "king"-"man"+"woman" = "queen" illustrates relational reasoning, yet replacing text with images of "king" and "man" significantly reduces performance because it requires commonsense knowledge and the extraction of concise concepts from irrelevant visual details. This capability is important for service and domestic robotics in unstructured environments, where robots must infer semantic relationships among objects, agents, and actions. In a kitchen, recognizing from images that "powder" and "cake" are related by "is made of" grounds symbolic relations in perception, enabling tool substitution, task generalization, and improved semantic reasoning. Prior work approaches semantic arithmetic by decoding image features after vector arithmetic, but suffers from modality gaps and lacks systematic evaluation. In this paper, we formulate two novel tasks, two-term subtraction and three-term operations, and construct the Image-Relation-Pair Dataset (IRPD) for benchmarking. We further propose Semantic Arithmetic Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (SAri-RFT), which post-trains large vision-language models (LVLMs) using a verifiable function and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on IRPD and the real-world Visual7W-Telling dataset. By equipping LVLMs with robust cross-modal relational reasoning, this work advances domestic robots' ability to ground symbolic reasoning in perception, enhancing decision-making, tool adaptability, and human-robot interaction in complex environments. Datasets and source code are provided in the supplementary material.

analysis.tldr: 提出强化学习微调方法SAri-RFT，提升大视觉语言模型在视觉语义算术任务中的跨模态关系推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语义算术（如从图像中推断“国王”-“男人”+“女人”=“女王”）对服务与家庭机器人至关重要，但现有方法因模态差距和缺乏系统评估而性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 大语言模型在视觉语义算术任务中表现不足，需要从图像中提取简洁概念并推理语义关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 将文本类比中的“国王”和“男人”替换为图像后，性能显著下降，因为需要常识知识和从无关视觉细节中提取概念。
analysis.method: 提出Semantic Arithmetic Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (SAri-RFT)，使用可验证函数和Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)对大型视觉语言模型进行后训练。
contributions: 定义了两项减法与三项运算两种新任务，并构建了Image-Relation-Pair Dataset (IRPD)基准。
提出SAri-RFT方法，通过强化学习微调提升LVLM的跨模态关系推理能力，在IRPD和Visual7W-Telling上取得最优结果。
analysis.experiments: 在IRPD和真实世界Visual7W-Telling数据集上取得最优结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Detecting Hallucinations in SpeechLLMs at Inference Time Using Attention Maps
papers.abstract: Hallucinations in Speech Large Language Models (SpeechLLMs) pose significant risks, yet existing detection methods typically rely on gold-standard outputs that are costly or impractical to obtain. Moreover, hallucination detection methods developed for text-based LLMs do not directly capture audio-specific signals. We investigate four attention-derived metrics: AUDIORATIO, AUDIOCONSISTENCY, AUDIOENTROPY, and TEXTENTROPY, designed to capture pathological attention patterns associated with hallucination, and train lightweight logistic regression classifiers on these features for efficient inference-time detection. Across automatic speech recognition and speech-to-text translation tasks, evaluations on Qwen-2-Audio and Voxtral-3B show that our approach outperforms uncertainty-based and prior attention-based baselines on in-domain data, achieving improvements of up to +0.23 PR-AUC, and generalises to out-of-domain ASR settings. We further find that strong performance can be achieved with approximately 100 attention heads, improving out-of-domain generalisation compared to using all heads. While effectiveness is model-dependent and task-specific training is required, our results demonstrate that attention patterns provide a valuable tool for hallucination detection in SpeechLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 利用注意力图在推理时检测语音大模型的幻觉，无需金标准输出。
analysis.research_motivation: 语音大模型（SpeechLLMs）中的幻觉带来显著风险，现有检测方法依赖昂贵或不可行的金标准输出，且文本LLM的检测方法无法捕捉音频特有信号。
analysis.problem: 如何在推理时高效检测SpeechLLMs中的幻觉，而不依赖金标准输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出四种注意力衍生指标（AUDIORATIO、AUDIOCONSISTENCY、AUDIOENTROPY、TEXTENTROPY），捕捉与幻觉相关的病态注意力模式，并训练轻量级逻辑回归分类器进行推理时检测。
contributions: 提出四种针对语音模态的注意力指标用于幻觉检测。
在ASR和ST任务上，方法优于不确定性基线和先前注意力基线，PR-AUC提升达0.23，并泛化到域外ASR场景。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen-2-Audio和Voxtral-3B上评估ASR和ST任务，域内性能优于基线，域外泛化有效；约100个注意力头即可达到强性能。
limitations: 效果依赖模型，需要任务特定训练。
未在更多模型和任务上验证。

papers.title: EgoSelf: From Memory to Personalized Egocentric Assistant
papers.abstract: Egocentric assistants often rely on first-person view data to capture user behavior and context for personalized services. Since different users exhibit distinct habits, preferences, and routines, such personalization is essential for truly effective assistance. However, effectively integrating long-term user data for personalization remains a key challenge. To address this, we introduce EgoSelf, a system that includes a graph-based interaction memory constructed from past observations and a dedicated learning task for personalization. The memory captures temporal and semantic relationships among interaction events and entities, from which user-specific profiles are derived. The personalized learning task is formulated as a prediction problem where the model predicts possible future interactions from individual user's historical behavior recorded in the graph. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of EgoSelf as a personalized egocentric assistant. Code is available at https://abie-e.github.io/EgoSelf/.

analysis.tldr: EgoSelf通过图记忆和个性化预测任务实现第一人称视角的个性化助手。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有第一人称助手缺乏对用户长期行为数据的有效整合，难以实现真正的个性化服务。

contributions: 提出EgoSelf系统，包含图结构交互记忆和个性化预测任务。
通过实验验证了系统作为个性化第一人称助手的有效性。

papers.title: Detecting Data Contamination in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) utilize large amounts of data for their training, some of which may come from copyrighted sources. Membership Inference Attacks (MIA) aim to detect those documents and whether they have been included in the training corpora of the LLMs. The black-box MIAs require a significant amount of data manipulation; therefore, their comparison is often challenging. We study state-of-the-art (SOTA) MIAs under the black-box assumptions and compare them to each other using a unified set of datasets to determine if any of them can reliably detect membership under SOTA LLMs. In addition, a new method, called the Familiarity Ranking, was developed to showcase a possible approach to black-box MIAs, thereby giving LLMs more freedom in their expression to understand their reasoning better. The results indicate that none of the methods are capable of reliably detecting membership in LLMs, as shown by an AUC-ROC of approximately 0.5 for all methods across several LLMs. The higher TPR and FPR for more advanced LLMs indicate higher reasoning and generalizing capabilities, showcasing the difficulty of detecting membership in LLMs using black-box MIAs.

analysis.tldr: 现有黑盒成员推理攻击无法可靠检测LLM中的数据污染，新方法Familiarity Ranking也未能提升检测效果。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM训练数据可能包含版权内容，需要检测数据污染，但黑盒成员推理攻击（MIA）因数据操作量大而难以比较和可靠应用。
analysis.problem: 评估现有黑盒MIA方法在检测LLM训练数据成员关系时的可靠性，并探索新方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有方法在多个LLM上的AUC-ROC均接近0.5，表明无法可靠检测成员关系；更先进的LLM具有更高的TPR和FPR，显示其推理和泛化能力增加了检测难度。
analysis.method: 提出Familiarity Ranking方法，通过让LLM自由表达来理解其推理，作为黑盒MIA的一种可能途径。
contributions: 在统一数据集上系统比较了多种SOTA黑盒MIA方法，发现均无法可靠检测LLM成员关系。
提出了Familiarity Ranking方法，展示了黑盒MIA的一种新思路。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM上使用统一数据集评估了多种MIA方法，AUC-ROC均约0.5。
limitations: 仅评估了黑盒场景，未考虑白盒或灰盒攻击。
Familiarity Ranking方法未显著提升检测性能。

papers.title: Enhancing Construction Worker Safety in Extreme Heat: A Machine Learning Approach Utilizing Wearable Technology for Predictive Health Analytics
papers.abstract: Construction workers are highly vulnerable to heat stress, yet tools that translate real-time physiological data into actionable safety intelligence remain scarce. This study addresses this gap by developing and evaluating deep learning models, specifically a baseline Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network and an attention-based LSTM, to predict heat stress among 19 workers in Saudi Arabia. Using Garmin Vivosmart 5 smartwatches to monitor metrics such as heart rate, HRV, and oxygen saturation, the attention-based model outperformed the baseline, achieving 95.40% testing accuracy and significantly reducing false positives and negatives. With precision, recall, and F1 scores of 0.982, this approach not only improves predictive performance but also offers interpretable results suitable for integration into IoT-enabled safety systems and BIM dashboards, advancing proactive, informatics-driven safety management in the construction industry.

analysis.tldr: 基于注意力机制的LSTM模型利用可穿戴设备数据预测建筑工人热应激，准确率达95.40%。
analysis.research_motivation: 建筑工人极易受热应激影响，但缺乏将实时生理数据转化为可操作安全情报的工具，现有方法预测性能不足且可解释性差。
analysis.problem: 如何利用可穿戴设备实时生理数据准确预测建筑工人的热应激状态，并实现可解释性以支持安全决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于注意力机制的LSTM模型，利用Garmin Vivosmart 5智能手表采集心率、HRV、血氧饱和度等指标，预测热应激。
contributions: 开发了注意力LSTM模型，在19名工人数据集上达到95.40%测试准确率，优于基线LSTM。
模型具有可解释性，适合集成到IoT安全系统和BIM仪表板中，推动主动安全管理。
analysis.experiments: 在沙特阿拉伯19名建筑工人数据集上评估，注意力LSTM模型测试准确率95.40%，精确率、召回率、F1分数均为0.982。
limitations: 样本量较小（19人），可能限制泛化性。

papers.title: Paparazzo: Active Mapping of Moving 3D Objects
papers.abstract: Current 3D mapping pipelines generally assume static environments, which limits their ability to accurately capture and reconstruct moving objects. To address this limitation, we introduce the novel task of active mapping of moving objects, in which a mapping agent must plan its trajectory while compensating for the object's motion. Our approach, Paparazzo, provides a learning-free solution that robustly predicts the target's trajectory and identifies the most informative viewpoints from which to observe it, to plan its own path. We also contribute a comprehensive benchmark designed for this new task. Through extensive experiments, we show that Paparazzo significantly improves 3D reconstruction completeness and accuracy compared to several strong baselines, marking an important step toward dynamic scene understanding. Project page: https://davidea97.github.io/paparazzo-page/

analysis.tldr: 提出无学习主动映射方法Paparazzo，通过预测运动物体轨迹并规划最优视角，提升动态场景3D重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D映射管线假设静态环境，无法准确捕捉和重建运动物体，限制了动态场景理解能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在主动映射中规划智能体轨迹以补偿运动物体位移，实现高质量动态物体3D重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Paparazzo：无学习方案，通过预测目标轨迹并识别信息量最大的视角来规划路径。
contributions: 提出主动映射运动物体的新任务
提出无学习解决方案Paparazzo，结合轨迹预测与视角选择

papers.title: Taming Actor-Observer Asymmetry in Agents via Dialectical Alignment
papers.abstract: Large Language Model agents have rapidly evolved from static text generators into dynamic systems capable of executing complex autonomous workflows. To enhance reliability, multi-agent frameworks assigning specialized roles are increasingly adopted to enable self-reflection and mutual auditing. While such role-playing effectively leverages domain expert knowledge, we find it simultaneously induces a human-like cognitive bias known as Actor-Observer Asymmetry (AOA). Specifically, an agent acting as an actor (during self-reflection) tends to attribute failures to external factors, whereas an observer (during mutual auditing) attributes the same errors to internal faults. We quantify this using our new Ambiguous Failure Benchmark, which reveals that simply swapping perspectives triggers the AOA effect in over 20% of cases for most models. To tame this bias, we introduce ReTAS (Reasoning via Thesis-Antithesis-Synthesis), a model trained through dialectical alignment to enforce perspective-invariant reasoning. By integrating dialectical chain-of-thought with Group Relative Policy Optimization, ReTAS guides agents to synthesize conflicting viewpoints into an objective consensus. Experiments demonstrate that ReTAS effectively mitigates attribution inconsistency and significantly improves fault resolution rates in ambiguous scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出辩证对齐方法ReTAS，缓解多智能体系统中的演员-观察者不对称偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体框架通过角色扮演提升可靠性，但发现会引入类似人类的认知偏差——演员-观察者不对称（AOA），导致自我反思和相互审计时归因不一致，影响故障解决。
analysis.problem: 解决多智能体系统中因角色切换引发的归因不一致问题，即演员-观察者不对称偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过Ambiguous Failure Benchmark量化了AOA效应：简单切换视角即可在超过20%的案例中触发归因偏差。
analysis.method: 提出ReTAS（Reasoning via Thesis-Antithesis-Synthesis），通过辩证对齐训练模型，结合辩证思维链与Group Relative Policy Optimization，强制视角不变的推理，合成冲突观点为客观共识。
contributions: 发现并量化了多智能体系统中的演员-观察者不对称偏差。
提出ReTAS方法，通过辩证对齐有效缓解归因不一致，提升模糊场景下的故障解决率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及ReTAS有效缓解归因不一致并显著提升故障解决率。
limitations: 可能仅在特定基准上验证，泛化性未知。
辩证对齐的训练成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对多智能体认知偏差问题，但实验细节不足，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出辩证对齐方法ReTAS，缓解多智能体系统中的演员-观察者不对称偏差。

papers.title: DT2IT-MRM: Debiased Preference Construction and Iterative Training for Multimodal Reward Modeling
papers.abstract: Multimodal reward models (MRMs) play a crucial role in aligning Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) with human preferences. Training a good MRM requires high-quality multimodal preference data. However, existing preference datasets face three key challenges: lack of granularity in preference strength, textual style bias, and unreliable preference signals. Besides, existing open-source multimodal preference datasets suffer from substantial noise, yet there is a lack of effective and scalable curation methods to enhance their quality. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{DT2IT-MRM}, which integrates a \textbf{D}ebiased preference construction pipeline, a novel reformulation of text-to-image (\textbf{T2I}) preference data, and an \textbf{I}terative \textbf{T}raining framework that curates existing multimodal preference datasets for \textbf{M}ultimodal \textbf{R}eward \textbf{M}odeling. Our experimental results show that DT2IT-MRM achieves new \textbf{state-of-the-art} overall performance on three major benchmarks: VL-RewardBench, Multimodal RewardBench, and MM-RLHF-RewardBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出DT2IT-MRM框架，通过去偏偏好构建和迭代训练提升多模态奖励模型性能，在三大基准上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态奖励模型（MRM）对对齐多模态大语言模型（MLLM）至关重要，但现有偏好数据集存在偏好强度粒度不足、文本风格偏差和偏好信号不可靠等问题，且缺乏有效的噪声清洗方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构建高质量、无偏的多模态偏好数据，并有效清洗现有数据集中的噪声，以训练更好的多模态奖励模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有开源多模态偏好数据集存在大量噪声，且缺乏有效且可扩展的清洗方法。
analysis.method: 提出DT2IT-MRM框架，包含去偏偏好构建流程、文本到图像（T2I）偏好数据的重新表述，以及迭代训练框架，用于清洗现有多模态偏好数据集以训练奖励模型。
contributions: 提出去偏偏好构建流程，解决偏好强度粒度、文本风格偏差和偏好信号不可靠问题。
创新性地将文本到图像（T2I）偏好数据重新表述用于多模态奖励建模。
提出迭代训练框架，有效清洗现有多模态偏好数据集中的噪声。
analysis.experiments: 在VL-RewardBench、Multimodal RewardBench和MM-RLHF-RewardBench三个基准上取得新的SOTA整体性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定T2I数据源，泛化性需进一步验证。
迭代训练框架的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对多模态奖励模型数据构建的关键问题，实验在多个基准上取得SOTA，与对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DT2IT-MRM框架，通过去偏偏好构建和迭代训练提升多模态奖励模型性能，在三大基准上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Mesh Memory Protocol: Semantic Infrastructure for Multi-Agent LLM Systems
papers.abstract: Teams of LLM agents increasingly collaborate on tasks spanning days or weeks: multi-day data-generation sprints where generator, reviewer, and auditor agents coordinate in real time on overlapping batches; specialists carrying findings forward across session restarts; product decisions compounding over many review rounds. This requires agents to share, evaluate, and combine each other's cognitive state in real time across sessions. We call this cross-session agent-to-agent cognitive collaboration, distinct from parallel agent execution. To enable it, three problems must be solved together. (P1) Each agent decides field by field what to accept from peers, not accept or reject whole messages. (P2) Every claim is traceable to source, so returning claims are recognised as echoes of the receiver's own prior thinking. (P3) Memory that survives session restarts is relevant because of how it was stored, not how it is retrieved. These are protocol-level properties at the semantic layer of agent communication, distinct from tool-access and task-delegation protocols at lower layers. We call this missing protocol layer "semantic infrastructure," and the Mesh Memory Protocol (MMP) specifies it. Four composable primitives work together: CAT7, a fixed seven-field schema for every Cognitive Memory Block (CMB); SVAF, which evaluates each field against the receiver's role-indexed anchors and realises P1; inter-agent lineage, carried as parents and ancestors of content-hash keys and realising P2; and remix, which stores only the receiver's own role-evaluated understanding of each accepted CMB, never the raw peer signal, realising P3. MMP is specified, shipped, and running in production across three reference deployments, where each session runs an autonomous agent as a mesh peer with its own identity and memory, collaborating with other agents across the network for collective intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 提出Mesh Memory Protocol，为多智能体LLM系统提供跨会话认知协作的语义基础设施。

papers.title: Predicting Scale-Up of Metal-Organic Framework Syntheses with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Scalable synthesis remains the gate between MOF discovery and industrial deployment, as scale-up know-how is fragmented across disparate reports. We introduce ESU-MOF, a literature-mined dataset and a positive-unlabeled learning strategy that fine-tunes large language models to predict scalability potential with 91.4% accuracy, enabling rapid data-driven triage for industrial MOF discovery.

papers.title: Integrating Anomaly Detection into Agentic AI for Proactive Risk Management in Human Activity
papers.abstract: Agentic AI, with goal-directed, proactive, and autonomous decision-making capabilities, offers a compelling opportunity to address movement-related risks in human activity, including the persistent hazard of falls among elderly populations. Despite numerous approaches to fall mitigation through fall prediction and detection, existing systems have not yet functioned as universal solutions across care pathways and safety-critical environments. This is largely due to limitations in consistently handling real-world complexity, particularly poor context awareness, high false alarm rates, environmental noise, and data scarcity. We argue that fall detection and fall prediction can usefully be formulated as anomaly detection problems and more effectively addressed through an agentic AI system. More broadly, this perspective enables the early identification of subtle deviations in movement patterns associated with increased risk, whether arising from age-related decline, fatigue, or environmental factors. While technical requirements for immediate deployment are beyond the scope of this paper, we propose a conceptual framework that highlights potential value. This framework promotes a well-orchestrated approach to risk management by dynamically selecting relevant tools and integrating them into adaptive decision-making workflows, rather than relying on static configurations tailored to narrowly defined scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 将异常检测融入智能体AI，用于人类活动中跌倒等风险的主动管理。

papers.title: Cyber Defense Benchmark: Agentic Threat Hunting Evaluation for LLMs in SecOps
papers.abstract: We introduce the Cyber Defense Benchmark, a benchmark for measuring how well large language model (LLM) agents perform the core SOC analyst task of threat hunting: given a database of raw Windows event logs with no guided questions or hints, identify the exact timestamps of malicious events. The benchmark wraps 106 real attack procedures from the OTRF Security-Datasets corpus - spanning 86 MITRE ATT&CK sub-techniques across 12 tactics - into a Gymnasium reinforcement-learning environment. Each episode presents the agent with an in-memory SQLite database of 75,000-135,000 log records produced by a deterministic campaign simulator that time-shifts and entity-obfuscates the raw recordings. The agent must iteratively submit SQL queries to discover malicious event timestamps and explicitly flag them, scored CTF-style against Sigma-rule-derived ground truth. Evaluating five frontier models - Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Kimi K2.5, and Gemini 3 Flash - on 26 campaigns covering 105 of 106 procedures, we find that all models fail dramatically: the best model (Claude Opus 4.6) submits correct flags for only 3.8% of malicious events on average, and no run across any model ever finds all flags. We define a passing score as >= 50% recall on every ATT&CK tactic - the minimum bar for unsupervised SOC deployment. No model passes: the leader clears this bar on 5 of 13 tactics and the remaining four on zero. These results suggest that current LLMs are poorly suited for open-ended, evidence-driven threat hunting despite strong performance on curated Q&A security benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: LLM在开放式威胁狩猎任务中表现极差，最佳模型仅召回3.8%恶意事件。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全基准多为问答形式，无法评估LLM在真实SOC分析中执行开放式威胁狩猎的能力。

papers.title: BEAT: Tokenizing and Generating Symbolic Music by Uniform Temporal Steps
papers.abstract: Tokenizing music to fit the general framework of language models is a compelling challenge, especially considering the diverse symbolic structures in which music can be represented (e.g., sequences, grids, and graphs). To date, most approaches tokenize symbolic music as sequences of musical events, such as onsets, pitches, time shifts, or compound note events. This strategy is intuitive and has proven effective in Transformer-based models, but it treats the regularity of musical time implicitly: individual tokens may span different durations, resulting in non-uniform time progression. In this paper, we instead consider whether an alternative tokenization is possible, where a uniform-length musical step (e.g., a beat) serves as the basic unit. Specifically, we encode all events within a single time step at the same pitch as one token, and group tokens explicitly by time step, which resembles a sparse encoding of a piano-roll representation. We evaluate the proposed tokenization on music continuation and accompaniment generation tasks, comparing it with mainstream event-based methods. Results show improved musical quality and structural coherence, while additional analyses confirm higher efficiency and more effective capture of long-range patterns with the proposed tokenization.

analysis.tldr: 提出BEAT，一种基于均匀时间步的符号音乐分词方法，在续写和伴奏生成任务中优于传统事件式方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有符号音乐分词方法将音乐视为事件序列，隐式处理时间规律，导致时间步长不均匀，影响模型对长程结构的建模能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种分词方案，使音乐表示具有均匀的时间步长，从而提升生成质量和结构连贯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统事件式分词中，单个token可能跨越不同时长，导致时间推进不均匀，不利于捕捉长程依赖。
analysis.method: 以均匀节拍为基本单元，将同一时间步内所有音高事件编码为一个token，并按时间步显式分组，类似钢琴卷帘的稀疏编码。

papers.title: Revisiting RaBitQ and TurboQuant: A Symmetric Comparison of Methods, Theory, and Experiments
papers.abstract: This technical note revisits the relationship between RaBitQ and TurboQuant under a unified comparison framework. We compare the two methods in terms of methodology, theoretical guarantees, and empirical performance, using a reproducible, transparent, and symmetric setup. Our results show that, despite the claimed advantage of TurboQuant, TurboQuant performs worse than RaBitQ in most tested settings of inner-product estimation, nearest-neighbor search and KV cache quantization. We further find that several reported runtime and recall results in the TurboQuant paper could not be reproduced from the released implementation under the stated configuration. Overall, this note clarifies the shared structure and genuine differences between the two lines of work, while documenting reproducibility issues in the experimental results reported by the TurboQuant paper.

analysis.tldr: 对称比较揭示TurboQuant在多数设置下不如RaBitQ，且部分结果无法复现。

papers.title: Revac: A Social Deduction Reasoning Agent
papers.abstract: Social deduction games such as Mafia present a unique AI challenge: players must reason under uncertainty, interpret incomplete and intentionally misleading information, evaluate human-like communication, and make strategic elimination decisions. Unlike deterministic board games, success in Mafia depends not on perfect information or brute-force search, but on inference, memory, and adaptability in the presence of deception. This work presents the design and evaluation of Revac-8, an AI agent developed for the Social Deduction track of the MindGames Arena competition, where it achieved first place. The final agent evolved from a simple two-stage reasoning system into a multi-module architecture that integrates memory-based player profiling, social-graph analysis of accusations and defenses, and dynamic tone selection for communication. These results highlight the importance of structured memory and adaptive communication for achieving strong performance in high-stakes social environments.

analysis.tldr: Revac-8 是一个在社交推理游戏 Mafia 中通过集成记忆、社交图分析和动态语调选择获得第一名的 AI 智能体。

papers.title: Structure Guided Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Factual Queries
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has been proposed to mitigate hallucinations in large language models (LLMs), where generated outputs may be factually incorrect. However, existing RAG approaches predominantly rely on vector similarity for retrieval, which is prone to semantic noise and fails to ensure that generated responses fully satisfy the complex conditions specified by factual queries, often leading to incorrect answers. To address this challenge, we introduce a novel research problem, named Exact Retrieval Problem (ERP). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first problem formulation that explicitly incorporates structural information into RAG for factual questions to satisfy all query conditions. For this novel problem, we propose Structure Guided Retrieval-Augmented Generation (SG-RAG), which models the retrieval process as an embedding-based subgraph matching task, and uses the retrieved topological structures to guide the LLM to generate answers that meet all specified query conditions. To facilitate evaluation of ERP, we construct and publicly release Exact Retrieval Question Answering (ERQA), a large-scale dataset comprising 120000 fact-oriented QA pairs, each involving complex conditions, spanning 20 diverse domains. The experimental results demonstrate that SG-RAG significantly outperforms strong baselines on ERQA, delivering absolute improvements from 20.68 to 50.88 points across all evaluation metrics, while maintaining reasonable computational overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构引导的检索增强生成方法，通过子图匹配建模检索过程，显著提升事实性查询的准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG方法依赖向量相似性检索，易受语义噪声干扰，无法确保生成响应满足事实查询的复杂条件，导致答案错误。
analysis.problem: 如何利用结构信息改进RAG，使其生成的答案满足事实查询的所有条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将检索过程建模为基于嵌入的子图匹配任务，利用检索到的拓扑结构引导LLM生成满足所有查询条件的答案。
contributions: 首次将结构信息显式融入RAG，提出精确检索问题（ERP）的形式化定义。
提出结构引导的检索增强生成（SG-RAG）方法，通过子图匹配实现条件满足。
构建并公开大规模数据集ERQA（120000个事实性QA对，覆盖20个领域），用于评估ERP。
analysis.experiments: 在ERQA数据集上，SG-RAG在所有评估指标上相比强基线获得20.68到50.88个百分点的绝对提升，且计算开销合理。

papers.title: SimDiff: Depth Pruning via Similarity and Difference
papers.abstract: Depth pruning improves the deployment efficiency of large language models (LLMs) by identifying and removing redundant layers. A widely accepted standard for this identification process is to measure the similarity between layers using cosine distance. However, we find that methods relying solely on this one-dimensional heuristic can exhibit unpredictable performance and even catastrophic collapse across different architectures. To address this issue, we propose SimDiff, a novel layer importance criterion that jointly evaluates layers from two orthogonal perspectives: representational similarity and transformation difference. The difference is quantified using two distinct metrics: MSSD, which is sensitive to outliers and identifies layers that make decisive corrections, and MASD, which robustly measures a layer's average contribution. Extensive experiments on multiple models ranging from 0.5B to 13B parameters demonstrate that SimDiff significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across various pruning ratios. Notably, our method retains over 91% of LLaMA2-7B's performance at a 25% pruning ratio and achieves up to a 1.49x inference speedup when pruning 12 layers on LLaMA3.1-8B. We also show that pruned models can be effectively recovered with minimal fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 提出SimDiff，通过联合评估层间相似性与变换差异来改进LLM深度剪枝，避免仅依赖余弦相似度导致的性能不稳定。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度剪枝方法仅依赖余弦相似度这一单一启发式标准，在不同架构上可能表现不稳定甚至出现灾难性崩溃，亟需更鲁棒的层重要性准则。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个更可靠的层重要性准则，以在LLM深度剪枝中同时考虑表征相似性和变换差异，避免单一指标导致的性能波动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅使用余弦相似度衡量层间相似性进行剪枝时，在不同架构上可能产生不可预测的性能甚至灾难性崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出SimDiff准则，从两个正交角度评估层重要性：表征相似性（余弦距离）和变换差异（使用MSSD和MASD两种指标，MSSD对异常值敏感以识别做出决定性修正的层，MASD稳健测量层的平均贡献）。
contributions: 揭示了仅依赖余弦相似度进行深度剪枝的局限性，并提出了SimDiff这一联合评估相似性与差异的新准则。
设计了MSSD和MASD两种差异度量，分别捕捉层的决定性修正和平均贡献。
在多个模型（0.5B-13B）上验证了SimDiff优于现有方法，在25%剪枝率下保留LLaMA2-7B超过91%的性能，并在LLaMA3.1-8B上剪枝12层实现1.49倍推理加速。
analysis.experiments: 在0.5B到13B参数的多个模型上进行实验，与最先进基线比较，报告了剪枝后的性能保留和推理加速，并表明剪枝模型可通过少量微调有效恢复。
limitations: 摘要未提及对更大规模模型（如70B+）的验证。
MSSD和MASD的计算开销可能影响剪枝过程的效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验充分且效果显著，与LLM压缩方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SimDiff，通过联合评估层间相似性与变换差异来改进LLM深度剪枝，避免仅依赖余弦相似度导致的性能不稳定。

papers.title: From Experience to Skill: Multi-Agent Generative Engine Optimization via Reusable Strategy Learning
papers.abstract: Generative engines (GEs) are reshaping information access by replacing ranked links with citation-grounded answers, yet current Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) methods optimize each instance in isolation, unable to accumulate or transfer effective strategies across tasks and engines. We reframe GEO as a strategy learning problem and propose MAGEO, a multi-agent framework in which coordinated planning, editing, and fidelity-aware evaluation serve as the execution layer, while validated editing patterns are progressively distilled into reusable, engine-specific optimization skills. To enable controlled assessment, we introduce a Twin Branch Evaluation Protocol for causal attribution of content edits and DSV-CF, a dual-axis metric that unifies semantic visibility with attribution accuracy. We further release MSME-GEO-Bench, a multi-scenario, multi-engine benchmark grounded in real-world queries. Experiments on three mainstream engines show that MAGEO substantially outperforms heuristic baselines in both visibility and citation fidelity, with ablations confirming that engine-specific preference modeling and strategy reuse are central to these gains, suggesting a scalable learning-driven paradigm for trustworthy GEO. Code is available at https://github.com/Wu-beining/MAGEO

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体框架MAGEO，通过可复用策略学习实现生成式引擎优化，显著提升可见性与引用保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式引擎优化方法孤立优化每个实例，无法跨任务和引擎积累或迁移有效策略，导致效率低下且缺乏可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何使GEO方法能够学习并复用跨任务和引擎的优化策略，从而提升优化效果和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MAGEO多智能体框架，包含协调规划、编辑和保真度感知评估的执行层，并将验证过的编辑模式逐步蒸馏为可复用的引擎特定优化技能；同时引入双分支评估协议用于因果归因，以及DSV-CF双轴度量统一语义可见性与归因准确性。
contributions: 提出MAGEO框架，将GEO重构为策略学习问题，实现跨任务和引擎的策略积累与迁移。
提出双分支评估协议和DSV-CF度量，实现内容编辑的因果归因和可见性-保真度联合评估。
发布MSME-GEO-Bench多场景多引擎基准，并实验证明MAGEO在可见性和引用保真度上显著优于启发式基线。
analysis.experiments: 在三个主流生成式引擎上实验，MAGEO优于启发式基线，消融实验证实引擎特定偏好建模和策略复用是关键。
limitations: 可能依赖特定引擎的API或可访问性，泛化性需进一步验证。
策略蒸馏过程可能引入偏差，影响长尾查询的优化效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，与Agent和工具使用方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体框架MAGEO，通过可复用策略学习实现生成式引擎优化，显著提升可见性与引用保真度。

papers.title: When Graph Structure Becomes a Liability: A Critical Re-Evaluation of Graph Neural Networks for Bitcoin Fraud Detection under Temporal Distribution Shift
papers.abstract: The consensus that GCN, GraphSAGE, GAT, and EvolveGCN outperform feature-only baselines on the Elliptic Bitcoin Dataset is widely cited but has not been rigorously stress-tested under a leakage-free evaluation protocol. We perform a seed-matched inductive-versus-transductive comparison and find that this consensus does not hold. Under a strictly inductive protocol, Random Forest on raw features achieves F1 = 0.821 and outperforms all evaluated GNNs, while GraphSAGE reaches F1 = 0.689 +/- 0.017. A paired controlled experiment reveals a 39.5-point F1 gap attributable to training-time exposure to test-period adjacency. Additionally, edge-shuffle ablations show that randomly wired graphs outperform the real transaction graph, indicating that the dataset's topology can be misleading under temporal distribution shift. Hybrid models combining GNN embeddings with raw features provide only marginal gains and remain substantially below feature-only baselines. We release code, checkpoints, and a strict-inductive protocol to enable reproducible, leakage-free evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 在严格归纳协议下，随机森林在比特币欺诈检测中显著优于GNN，揭示图结构在时间分布偏移下可能成为负担。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究普遍认为GNN在Elliptic比特币数据集上优于特征基线，但缺乏严格的无泄漏评估，导致结论可能不可靠。
analysis.problem: 重新评估GNN在比特币欺诈检测中的真实性能，特别是在时间分布偏移下是否存在数据泄漏导致的虚假优势。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：在严格归纳协议下，随机森林（F1=0.821）优于所有GNN；训练时暴露测试期邻接关系导致39.5个F1点的差距；随机图比真实交易图表现更好，表明拓扑结构在时间分布偏移下具有误导性。
analysis.method: 提出种子匹配的归纳与直推对比实验、配对控制实验、边洗牌消融实验，并发布严格归纳协议和代码。
contributions: 通过严格归纳协议证明GNN在比特币欺诈检测中不如随机森林等特征基线。
量化了训练时暴露测试期邻接关系导致的性能高估（39.5 F1点）。
揭示真实图结构在时间分布偏移下可能具有误导性，随机图反而更好。
analysis.experiments: 在Elliptic比特币数据集上进行了归纳与直推对比、配对控制实验和边洗牌消融，报告了F1分数和标准差。
limitations: 仅针对单一数据集（Elliptic），结论的泛化性需进一步验证。
未探索其他图结构或时间序列建模方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验设计严谨，对GNN评估领域有重要警示意义，但应用领域较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在严格归纳协议下，随机森林在比特币欺诈检测中显著优于GNN，揭示图结构在时间分布偏移下可能成为负担。

papers.title: Evaluating Histogram Matching for Robust Deep learning-Based Grapevine Disease Detection
papers.abstract: Variability in illumination is a primary factor limiting deep learning robustness for field-based plant disease detection. This study evaluates Histogram Matching (HM), a technique that transforms the pixel intensity distribution of an image to match a reference profile, to mitigate this in grapevine classification, distinguishing among healthy leaves, downy mildew, and spider mite damage. We propose a dual-stage integration of HM: (i) as a preprocessing step for normalization, and (ii) as a data augmentation technique to introduce controlled training variability. Experiments using 1,469 RGB images (comprising homogeneous leaf-focused and heterogeneous canopy samples) to train ResNet-18 models demonstrate that this combination significantly enhances robustness on real-world canopy images. While leaf-focused samples showed marginal gains, the canopy subset improved markedly, indicating that balancing normalization with histogram-based diversification effectively bridges the domain gap caused by uncontrolled lighting.

analysis.tldr: 直方图匹配作为预处理和数据增强，显著提升葡萄病害检测模型在复杂光照下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 田间植物病害检测中，光照变化是限制深度学习模型鲁棒性的主要因素，现有方法难以有效应对真实场景中的光照差异。
analysis.problem: 如何利用直方图匹配（HM）减少光照变化对葡萄病害分类模型的影响，提升其在真实冠层图像上的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：仅对叶片聚焦图像使用HM增益有限，但对光照变化大的冠层图像，HM结合预处理和数据增强能显著提升性能，表明平衡归一化与直方图多样化可弥合光照引起的域差距。
analysis.method: 提出双阶段直方图匹配集成：作为预处理步骤进行归一化，以及作为数据增强技术引入受控训练变异性。
contributions: 首次系统评估直方图匹配在葡萄病害检测中对抗光照变化的效果
提出预处理与数据增强结合的双阶段HM策略，显著提升模型在真实冠层图像上的鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 使用1469张RGB图像（包括叶片聚焦和冠层样本）训练ResNet-18模型，验证了HM组合策略的有效性。
limitations: 仅针对葡萄病害和特定光照条件，泛化性需进一步验证
未与其他光照归一化方法（如颜色恒常性）进行对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简单，实验规模较小，贡献增量，适合快速浏览。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 直方图匹配作为预处理和数据增强，显著提升葡萄病害检测模型在复杂光照下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Seeing Candidates at Scale: Multimodal LLMs for Visual Political Communication on Instagram
papers.abstract: This paper presents a computational case study that evaluates the capabilities of specialized machine learning models and emerging multimodal large language models for Visual Political Communication (VPC) analysis. Focusing on concentrated visibility in Instagram stories and posts during the 2021 German federal election campaign, we compare the performance of traditional computer vision models (FaceNet512, RetinaFace, Google Cloud Vision) with a multimodal large language model (GPT-4o) in identifying front-runner politicians and counting individuals in images. GPT-4o outperformed the other models, achieving a macro F1-score of 0.89 for face recognition and 0.86 for person counting in stories. These findings demonstrate the potential of advanced AI systems to scale and refine visual content analysis in political communication while highlighting methodological considerations for future research.

analysis.tldr: GPT-4o在Instagram政治视觉内容分析中优于传统CV模型，人脸识别F1达0.89。
analysis.research_motivation: 政治传播中视觉内容分析依赖传统计算机视觉模型，但面对大规模、多模态数据时精度和泛化能力不足，亟需探索多模态大语言模型的潜力。
analysis.problem: 评估多模态大语言模型（GPT-4o）与传统视觉模型在视觉政治传播分析（候选人识别、人数统计）中的性能差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GPT-4o在Instagram故事和帖子中的人脸识别和人数统计任务上均显著优于FaceNet512、RetinaFace和Google Cloud Vision等传统模型。
analysis.method: 以2021年德国联邦大选期间Instagram故事和帖子为数据，对比GPT-4o与FaceNet512、RetinaFace、Google Cloud Vision在候选人识别和人数统计上的表现。
contributions: 首次系统比较多模态大语言模型与传统视觉模型在视觉政治传播分析中的性能。
证明GPT-4o在候选人识别（F1=0.89）和人数统计（F1=0.86）上具有显著优势。
analysis.experiments: 在2021年德国联邦大选Instagram数据上，GPT-4o人脸识别宏F1为0.89，人数统计宏F1为0.86，优于其他模型。
limitations: 仅针对单一国家选举和特定平台（Instagram），泛化性待验证。
未讨论模型计算成本或部署可行性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性一般，但实证结果有参考价值，适合关注MLLM应用的研究者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GPT-4o在Instagram政治视觉内容分析中优于传统CV模型，人脸识别F1达0.89。

papers.title: CoDA: Towards Effective Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer via CoT-guided Domain Adaptation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved substantial advances in logical reasoning, yet they continue to lag behind human-level performance. In-context learning provides a viable solution that boosts the model's performance via prompting its input with expert-curated, in-domain exemplars. However, in many real-world, expertise-scarce domains, such as low-resource scientific disciplines, emerging biomedical subfields, or niche legal jurisdictions, such high-quality in-domain demonstrations are inherently limited or entirely unavailable, thereby constraining the general applicability of these approaches. To mitigate this limitation, recent efforts have explored the retrieval of cross-domain samples as surrogate in-context demonstrations. Nevertheless, the resulting gains remain modest. This is largely attributable to the pronounced domain shift between source and target distributions, which impedes the model's ability to effectively identify and exploit underlying shared structures or latent reasoning patterns. Consequently, when relying solely on raw textual prompting, LLMs struggle to abstract and transfer such cross-domain knowledge in a robust and systematic manner. To address these issues, we propose CoDA, which employs a lightweight adapter to directly intervene in the intermediate hidden states. By combining feature-based distillation of CoT-enriched reference representations with Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) for kernelized distribution matching, our method aligns the latent reasoning representation of the source and target domains. Extensive experimental results on multiple logical reasoning tasks across various model families validate the efficacy of CoDA by significantly outperforming the previous state-of-the-art baselines by a large margin.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoDA方法，通过轻量适配器结合CoT蒸馏和MMD对齐，实现跨领域逻辑推理知识迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在逻辑推理上仍落后人类，且现实场景中缺乏高质量领域内示例，限制了上下文学习的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 跨领域样本作为替代示例时，领域偏移导致LLM难以有效识别和利用共享的潜在推理模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，仅依赖原始文本提示时，LLM难以鲁棒地抽象和迁移跨领域知识，导致性能提升有限。
analysis.method: CoDA：使用轻量适配器干预中间隐藏状态，结合CoT增强参考表示的特征蒸馏和最大均值差异（MMD）进行核化分布匹配，对齐源域和目标域的潜在推理表示。
contributions: 提出CoDA方法，通过适配器直接干预隐藏状态实现跨领域知识迁移。
结合CoT蒸馏和MMD分布匹配，有效对齐源域和目标域的推理表示。
在多个逻辑推理任务上显著超越先前最先进基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多个逻辑推理任务和多种模型家族上进行实验，结果验证了CoDA的有效性，显著优于先前最先进基线。
limitations: 可能依赖CoT数据的质量。
适配器引入额外参数，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与LLM推理和领域自适应高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoDA方法，通过轻量适配器结合CoT蒸馏和MMD对齐，实现跨领域逻辑推理知识迁移。

papers.title: EVPO: Explained Variance Policy Optimization for Adaptive Critic Utilization in LLM Post-Training
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) for LLM post-training faces a fundamental design choice: whether to use a learned critic as a baseline for policy optimization. Classical theory favors critic-based methods such as PPO for variance reduction, yet critic-free alternatives like GRPO have gained widespread adoption due to their simplicity and competitive performance. We show that in sparse-reward settings, a learned critic can inject estimation noise that exceeds the state signal it captures, increasing rather than reducing advantage variance. By casting baseline selection as a Kalman filtering problem, we unify PPO and GRPO as two extremes of the Kalman gain and prove that explained variance (EV), computable from a single training batch, identifies the exact boundary: positive EV indicates the critic reduces variance, while zero or negative EV signals that it inflates variance. Building on this insight, we propose Explained Variance Policy Optimization (EVPO), which monitors batch-level EV at each training step and adaptively switches between critic-based and batch-mean advantage estimation, provably achieving no greater variance than the better of the two at every step. Across four tasks spanning classical control, agentic interaction, and mathematical reasoning, EVPO consistently outperforms both PPO and GRPO regardless of which fixed baseline is stronger on a given task. Further analysis confirms that the adaptive gating tracks critic maturation over training and that the theoretically derived zero threshold is empirically optimal.

analysis.tldr: EVPO通过解释方差自适应切换基线，统一PPO与GRPO，在LLM后训练中持续优于两者。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM后训练中，基于学习评论家的PPO虽理论上能降低方差，但实际中评论家估计噪声可能反而增大方差，而GRPO等无评论家方法因简单高效被广泛采用，两者之间缺乏统一的理论理解和自适应选择机制。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地选择是否使用学习评论家作为基线，以在每一步都获得更低的优势估计方差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在稀疏奖励场景下，学习评论家引入的估计噪声可能超过其捕获的状态信号，导致方差增大而非减小；通过将基线选择建模为卡尔曼滤波问题，PPO和GRPO可视为卡尔曼增益的两个极端，而解释方差（EV）的正负能精确指示评论家是否降低方差。
analysis.method: 提出EVPO，在每一步训练中监测批级解释方差，自适应地在基于评论家和基于批均值的优势估计之间切换，理论上保证方差不大于两者中更优者。
contributions: 将基线选择统一为卡尔曼滤波框架，证明PPO和GRPO是卡尔曼增益的两个极端。
提出解释方差作为评论家有效性的可计算指标，并证明零阈值在理论上最优。
提出EVPO算法，自适应切换基线，在四个任务上一致优于PPO和GRPO。
analysis.experiments: 在经典控制、智能体交互和数学推理四个任务上评估，EVPO持续优于PPO和GRPO，且自适应门控能追踪评论家成熟过程，零阈值经验上最优。
limitations: 可能依赖批级EV的稳定性，在极小批量下可能不准确。
未在更大规模LLM或更复杂任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析深入，实验验证充分，对LLM后训练有重要实践价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EVPO通过解释方差自适应切换基线，统一PPO与GRPO，在LLM后训练中持续优于两者。

papers.title: Deep sprite-based image models: An analysis
papers.abstract: While foundation models drive steady progress in image segmentation and diffusion algorithms compose always more realistic images, the seemingly simple problem of identifying recurrent patterns in a collection of images remains very much open. In this paper, we focus on sprite-based image decomposition models, which have shown some promise for clustering and image decomposition and are appealing because of their high interpretability. These models come in different flavors, need to be tailored to specific datasets, and struggle to scale to images with many objects. We dive into the details of their design, identify their core components, and perform an extensive analysis on clustering benchmarks. We leverage this analysis to propose a deep sprite-based image decomposition method that performs on par with state-of-the-art unsupervised class-aware image segmentation methods on the standard CLEVR benchmark, scales linearly with the number of objects, identifies explicitly object categories, and fully models images in an easily interpretable way.

analysis.tldr: 深入分析基于精灵的图像分解模型，提出一种可扩展、可解释且性能与无监督类感知分割方法相当的新方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管基础模型在图像分割和扩散算法方面取得了进展，但识别图像集合中重复模式的问题仍然开放；现有精灵模型需要针对特定数据集定制且难以扩展到多对象场景。
analysis.problem: 解决基于精灵的图像分解模型在可扩展性、通用性和可解释性方面的不足，使其能处理多对象图像并达到无监督分割的竞争性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 深入分析精灵模型的核心组件，基于分析提出一种深度精灵图像分解方法，该方法线性扩展、显式识别对象类别并保持高可解释性。
contributions: 对基于精灵的图像分解模型进行了详细的设计分析和核心组件识别。
提出了一种新的深度精灵分解方法，在CLEVR基准上达到与最先进无监督类感知分割方法相当的性能，且可线性扩展。
analysis.experiments: 在CLEVR基准上进行了聚类和无监督分割实验，与现有方法对比。
limitations: 仅在CLEVR数据集上验证，泛化到真实复杂场景的能力未知。
方法可能依赖于精灵假设（重复模式），对非结构化图像效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有增量贡献，实验限于CLEVR，但分析深入且可解释性有价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 深入分析基于精灵的图像分解模型，提出一种可扩展、可解释且性能与无监督类感知分割方法相当的新方法。

papers.title: TS-Attn: Temporal-wise Separable Attention for Multi-Event Video Generation
papers.abstract: Generating high-quality videos from complex temporal descriptions that contain multiple sequential actions is a key unsolved problem. Existing methods are constrained by an inherent trade-off: using multiple short prompts fed sequentially into the model improves action fidelity but compromises temporal consistency, while a single complex prompt preserves consistency at the cost of prompt-following capability. We attribute this problem to two primary causes: 1) temporal misalignment between video content and the prompt, and 2) conflicting attention coupling between motion-related visual objects and their associated text conditions. To address these challenges, we propose a novel, training-free attention mechanism, Temporal-wise Separable Attention (TS-Attn), which dynamically rearranges attention distribution to ensure temporal awareness and global coherence in multi-event scenarios. TS-Attn can be seamlessly integrated into various pre-trained text-to-video models, boosting StoryEval-Bench scores by 33.5% and 16.4% on Wan2.1-T2V-14B and Wan2.2-T2V-A14B with only a 2% increase in inference time. It also supports plug-and-play usage across models for multi-event image-to-video generation. The source code and project page are available at https://github.com/Hong-yu-Zhang/TS-Attn.

analysis.tldr: 提出时序分离注意力机制，无需训练即可提升多事件视频生成的时间一致性与动作保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在多事件视频生成中面临动作保真度与时间一致性之间的权衡，短提示序列保真度高但一致性差，长提示一致性高但提示跟随能力弱。
analysis.problem: 多事件视频生成中视频内容与提示之间的时间错位，以及运动相关视觉对象与其文本条件之间的注意力耦合冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个主要原因：1) 视频内容与提示的时间错位；2) 运动相关视觉对象与文本条件之间的注意力耦合冲突。
analysis.method: 提出时序分离注意力（TS-Attn），一种无需训练即可动态重排注意力分布以增强时间感知和全局一致性的机制，可即插即用于预训练文本到视频模型。
contributions: 提出TS-Attn，一种无需训练、即插即用的注意力机制，解决多事件视频生成中的时间错位和注意力耦合问题。
在Wan2.1-T2V-14B和Wan2.2-T2V-A14B上分别提升StoryEval-Bench分数33.5%和16.4%，仅增加2%推理时间。
analysis.experiments: 在Wan2.1-T2V-14B和Wan2.2-T2V-A14B模型上评估，StoryEval-Bench分数分别提升33.5%和16.4%，推理时间仅增加2%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于多事件场景，单事件场景效果未知。
依赖预训练模型质量，对弱模型提升有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且有效，实验提升显著，与视频生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时序分离注意力机制，无需训练即可提升多事件视频生成的时间一致性与动作保真度。

papers.title: Fairness Audits of Institutional Risk Models in Deployed ML Pipelines
papers.abstract: Fairness audits of institutional risk models are critical for understanding how deployed machine learning pipelines allocate resources. Drawing on multi-year collaboration with Centennial College, where our prior ethnographic work introduced the ASP-HEI Cycle, we present a replica-based audit of a deployed Early Warning System (EWS), replicating its model using institutional training data and design specifications. We evaluate disparities by gender, age, and residency status across the full pipeline (training data, model predictions, and post-processing) using standard fairness metrics. Our audit reveals systematic misallocation: younger, male, and international students are disproportionately flagged for support, even when many ultimately succeed, while older and female students with comparable dropout risk are under-identified. Post-processing amplifies these disparities by collapsing heterogeneous probabilities into percentile-based risk tiers. This work provides a replicable methodology for auditing institutional ML systems and shows how disparities emerge and compound across stages, highlighting the importance of evaluating construct validity alongside statistical fairness. It contributes one empirical thread to a broader program investigating algorithms, student data, and power in higher education.

analysis.tldr: 对部署的早期预警系统进行复制审计，揭示性别、年龄和居住状态导致的系统性资源分配偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 机构风险模型在部署中可能产生不公平的资源分配，但缺乏可复制的审计方法，且现有审计多关注统计公平性而忽略构造效度。
analysis.problem: 如何系统审计已部署的机构风险模型（如早期预警系统）在全流程（训练数据、模型预测、后处理）中的公平性，并揭示偏差如何产生和累积。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 审计发现年轻、男性和国际学生被不成比例地标记为需要支持，而年龄较大和女性学生中具有相似辍学风险者被低估；后处理通过将异质概率压缩为百分位风险层级放大了这些差异。
analysis.method: 基于复制的审计方法：使用机构训练数据和设计规范复制已部署的早期预警系统，并在全流程中应用标准公平性指标评估性别、年龄和居住状态方面的差异。
contributions: 提出一种可复制的机构ML系统审计方法，覆盖训练数据、模型预测和后处理全流程。
实证揭示偏差如何在流程各阶段产生并累积，强调评估构造效度与统计公平性并重的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及与Centennial College多年合作，基于其早期预警系统进行复制审计。
limitations: 审计仅针对单一机构（Centennial College）的单一系统，泛化性有限。
未讨论审计结果对实际干预措施的影响或缓解策略。

papers.title: A neural operator framework for data-driven discovery of stability and receptivity in physical systems
papers.abstract: Understanding how complex systems respond to perturbations, such as whether they will remain stable or what their most sensitive patterns are, is a fundamental challenge across science and engineering. Traditional stability and receptivity (resolvent) analyses are powerful but rely on known equations and linearization, limiting their use in nonlinear or poorly modeled systems. Here, we introduce a data-driven framework that automatically identifies stability properties and optimal forcing responses from observation data alone, without requiring governing equations. By training a neural network as a dynamics emulator and using automatic differentiation to extract its Jacobian, we can compute eigenmodes and resolvent modes directly from data. We demonstrate the method on both canonical chaotic models and high-dimensional fluid flows, successfully identifying dominant instability modes and input-output structures even in strongly nonlinear regimes. By leveraging a neural network-based emulator, we readily obtain a nonlinear representation of system dynamics while additionally retrieving intricate dynamical patterns that were previously difficult to resolve. This equation-free methodology establishes a broadly applicable tool for analyzing complex, high-dimensional datasets, with immediate relevance to grand challenges in fields such as climate science, neuroscience, and fluid engineering.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经算子框架，从观测数据中自动发现物理系统的稳定性和感受性，无需控制方程。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统稳定性和感受性分析依赖已知方程和线性化，难以应用于非线性或模型不完备的系统，亟需数据驱动的替代方法。
analysis.problem: 如何仅从观测数据中自动识别物理系统的稳定性特性和最优强迫响应，而无需显式控制方程。

contributions: 提出一种无需方程的数据驱动框架，自动识别物理系统的稳定性和感受性。
在典型混沌模型和高维流体流动中成功识别主导不稳定模态和输入-输出结构，包括强非线性区域。
analysis.experiments: 在典型混沌模型和高维流体流动上进行了演示，成功识别了主导不稳定模态和输入-输出结构。
limitations: 可能对噪声敏感，需要大量高质量观测数据。

papers.title: LePREC: Reasoning as Classification over Structured Factors for Assessing Relevance of Legal Issues
papers.abstract: More than half of the global population struggles to meet their civil justice needs due to limited legal resources. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive reasoning capabilities, significant challenges remain even at the foundational step of legal issue identification. To investigate LLMs' capabilities in this task, we constructed a dataset from 769 real-world Malaysian Contract Act court cases, using GPT-4o to extract facts and generate candidate legal issues, annotated by senior legal experts, which reveals a critical limitation: while LLMs generate diverse issue candidates, their precision remains inadequate (GPT-4o achieves only 62%). To address this gap, we propose LePREC (Legal Professional-inspired Reasoning Elicitation and Classification), a neuro-symbolic framework combining neural generation with structured statistical reasoning. LePREC consists of: (1) a neuro component leverages LLMs to transform legal descriptions into question-answer pairs representing diverse analytical factors, and (2) a symbolic component applies sparse linear models over these discrete features, learning explicit algebraic weights that identify the most informative reasoning factors. Unlike end-to-end neural approaches, LePREC achieves interpretability through transparent feature weighting while maintaining data efficiency through correlation-based statistical classification. Experiments show a 30-40% improvement over advanced LLM baselines, including GPT-4o and Claude, confirming that correlation-based factor-issue analysis offers a more data-efficient solution for relevance decisions.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号框架LePREC，将法律问题相关性判定转化为结构化因素分类，在马来西亚合同案件数据集上比GPT-4o等LLM提升30-40%。
analysis.research_motivation: 全球超半数人口因法律资源有限难以满足民事司法需求，LLM在法律问题识别这一基础步骤上精度不足（GPT-4o仅62%），亟需更高效且可解释的方法。
analysis.problem: LLM在法律问题相关性判定中生成候选多样但精度低，需要一种数据高效、可解释且性能更优的解决方案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM能生成多样的法律问题候选，但精确率不足（GPT-4o仅62%），表明生成能力与判别能力之间存在差距。
analysis.method: LePREC框架：神经组件利用LLM将法律描述转化为问答对（表示不同分析因素），符号组件通过稀疏线性模型学习显式代数权重，识别最具信息量的推理因素，实现基于相关性的统计分类。

实验表明LePREC相比GPT-4o、Claude等先进LLM基线提升30-40%。

papers.title: Do LLMs Game Formalization? Evaluating Faithfulness in Logical Reasoning
papers.abstract: Formal verification guarantees proof validity but not formalization faithfulness. For natural-language logical reasoning, where models construct axiom systems from scratch without library constraints, this gap between valid proofs and faithful translations is especially acute. We investigate whether frontier models exploit this gap when generating Lean 4 proofs, a behavior we term formalization gaming. We evaluate GPT-5 and DeepSeek-R1 on 303 first-order logic problems (203 from FOLIO, 100 from Multi-LogiEval), comparing unified generation against a two-stage pipeline that separates formalization from proving. Despite compilation rates of 87-99%, we find no evidence of systematic gaming in unified generation: models prefer reporting failure over forcing proofs, even under prompting designed to encourage it. However, unfaithfulness that evades our detection signals may still occur. The two-stage pipeline reveals two distinct modes of unfaithfulness: GPT-5 fabricates axioms during proof generation, a reactive fallback detectable via cross-stage comparison, while DeepSeek-R1 mistranslates premises during formalization, producing internally consistent outputs that evade detection entirely. These findings show that high compilation rates or accuracies should not be equated with faithful reasoning. Code and data are available at https://github.com/koreankiwi99/formalization-gaming.

analysis.tldr: LLM在逻辑推理中高编译率不等于忠实推理，存在形式化作弊行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 形式验证保证证明有效性但不保证形式化忠实性，自然语言逻辑推理中模型从零构建公理系统，有效证明与忠实翻译之间存在差距，可能导致模型利用此差距进行形式化作弊。
analysis.problem: 研究前沿LLM在生成Lean 4证明时是否存在形式化作弊行为，即利用有效证明但不忠实于原始前提。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 统一生成中未发现系统性作弊，模型更倾向于报告失败而非强制证明；两阶段流水线揭示两种不忠实模式：GPT-5在证明阶段捏造公理，DeepSeek-R1在形式化阶段误译前提且内部一致难以检测。
analysis.method: 在303个一阶逻辑问题上评估GPT-5和DeepSeek-R1，比较统一生成与两阶段流水线（形式化+证明分离）的表现。
contributions: 提出形式化作弊概念并设计检测方法
发现高编译率不等于忠实推理，揭示两种不忠实模式
analysis.experiments: 在303个一阶逻辑问题（203来自FOLIO，100来自Multi-LogiEval）上评估，统一生成编译率87-99%，但未发现系统性作弊；两阶段流水线检测到不忠实行为。
limitations: 未检测到统一生成中的系统性作弊，但不忠实可能仍存在
仅评估两个模型和特定形式化语言Lean 4

papers.title: Four-Axis Decision Alignment for Long-Horizon Enterprise AI Agents
papers.abstract: Long-horizon enterprise agents make high-stakes decisions (loan underwriting, claims adjudication, clinical review, prior authorization) under lossy memory, multi-step reasoning, and binding regulatory constraints. Current evaluation reports a single task-success scalar that conflates distinct failure modes and hides whether an agent is aligned with the standards its deployment environment requires. We propose that long-horizon decision behavior decomposes into four orthogonal alignment axes, each independently measurable and failable: factual precision (FRP), reasoning coherence (RCS), compliance reconstruction (CRR), and calibrated abstention (CAR). CRR is a novel regulatory-grounded axis; CAR is a measurement axis separating coverage from accuracy. We exercise the decomposition on a controlled benchmark (LongHorizon-Bench) covering loan qualification and insurance claims adjudication with deterministic ground-truth construction. Running six memory architectures, we find structure aggregate accuracy cannot see: retrieval collapses on factual precision; schema-anchored architectures pay a scaffolding tax; plain summarization under a fact-preservation prompt is a strong baseline on FRP, RCS, EDA, and CRR; and all six architectures commit on every case, exposing a decisional-alignment axis the field has not targeted. The decomposition also surfaced a pre-registered prediction of our own, that summarization would fail factual recall, which the data reversed at large magnitude, an axis-level reversal aggregate accuracy would have hidden. Institutional alignment (regulatory reconstruction) and decisional alignment (calibrated abstention) are under-represented in the alignment literature and become load-bearing once decisions leave the laboratory. The framework transfers to any regulated decisioning domain via two steps: build a fact schema, and calibrate the CRR auditor prompt.

analysis.tldr: 提出长程企业AI智能体的四轴决策对齐框架，揭示聚合成功率隐藏的关键失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前长程企业智能体在高风险决策中仅用单一任务成功率评估，混淆了不同失败模式，无法反映部署环境所需的对齐标准。
analysis.problem: 如何分解和独立测量长程决策行为中的多个正交对齐维度，以揭示聚合指标掩盖的失败模式。

analysis.method: 提出四轴对齐分解：事实精度（FRP）、推理连贯性（RCS）、合规重建（CRR）和校准弃权（CAR），并在受控基准LongHorizon-Bench上对六种记忆架构进行评测。
contributions: 提出四轴决策对齐框架，将长程决策行为分解为四个正交可测量维度。
引入合规重建（CRR）和校准弃权（CAR）两个新轴，填补对齐文献空白。
通过实验揭示聚合成功率无法发现的架构级失败模式，并发现摘要基线在多个轴上表现强劲。
analysis.experiments: 在LongHorizon-Bench基准上，针对贷款资格和保险理赔裁决任务，使用六种记忆架构进行评测，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准任务仅覆盖贷款和保险两个领域，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Watts-per-Intelligence Part II: Algorithmic Catalysis
papers.abstract: We develop a thermodynamic theory of algorithmic catalysis within the watts-per-intelligence framework, identifying reusable computational structures that reduce irreversible operations for a task class while satisfying bounded restoration and structural selectivity constraints. We prove that any class-specific speed-up is upper-bounded by the algorithmic mutual information between the substrate and the class descriptor, and that installing this information incurs a minimum thermodynamic cost via Landauer erasure. Combining these results yields a coupling theorem that lower-bounds the deployment horizon required for a catalyst to be energetically favourable. The framework is illustrated on an affine SAT class and situates contemporary learned systems within a unified information-thermodynamic constraint on intelligent computation.

analysis.tldr: 提出算法催化的热力学理论，证明任务类加速受算法互信息上界约束，并给出催化剂部署时长的下界。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能计算系统面临能耗与效率的根本矛盾，需要理解可重用计算结构如何降低不可逆操作，从而在信息-热力学约束下实现高效计算。
analysis.problem: 在瓦特-智能框架下，形式化算法催化的热力学条件，并推导其性能上界与部署成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论表明：类特定加速受算法互信息上界约束，且安装该信息需付出Landauer擦除的最小热力学成本。
analysis.method: 建立算法催化的热力学理论，定义可重用计算结构满足有界恢复与结构选择性约束，通过耦合定理给出部署时长的下界。
contributions: 证明任何类特定加速的上界由底物与类描述符之间的算法互信息决定。
推导出安装该信息的最小热力学成本，并给出催化剂部署时长的下界。

limitations: 理论框架可能仅适用于特定任务类（如SAT），泛化性待验证。
未讨论实际实现中结构选择性的具体构造方法。

papers.title: LoViF 2026 Challenge on Real-World All-in-One Image Restoration: Methods and Results
papers.abstract: This paper presents a review for the LoViF Challenge on Real-World All-in-One Image Restoration. The challenge aimed to advance research on real-world all-in-one image restoration under diverse real-world degradation conditions, including blur, low-light, haze, rain, and snow. It provided a unified benchmark to evaluate the robustness and generalization ability of restoration models across multiple degradation categories within a common framework. The competition attracted 124 registered participants and received 9 valid final submissions with corresponding fact sheets, significantly contributing to the progress of real-world all-in-one image restoration. This report provides a detailed analysis of the submitted methods and corresponding results, emphasizing recent progress in unified real-world image restoration. The analysis highlights effective approaches and establishes a benchmark for future research in real-world low-level vision.

analysis.tldr: LoViF 2026挑战赛综述，聚焦真实世界全能图像恢复方法及结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实世界中图像退化类型多样（模糊、低光、雾、雨、雪），现有方法通常针对单一退化类型，缺乏统一框架下的鲁棒性和泛化能力评估。

papers.title: DINO Eats CLIP: Adapting Beyond Knowns for Open-set 3D Object Retrieval
papers.abstract: Vision foundation models have shown great promise for open-set 3D object retrieval (3DOR) through efficient adaptation to multi-view images. Leveraging semantically aligned latent space, previous work typically adapts the CLIP encoder to build view-based 3D descriptors. Despite CLIP's strong generalization ability, its lack of fine-grainedness prompted us to explore the potential of a more recent self-supervised encoder-DINO. To address this, we propose DINO Eats CLIP (DEC), a novel framework for dynamic multi-view integration that is regularized by synthesizing data for unseen classes. We first find that simply mean-pooling over view features from a frozen DINO backbone gives decent performance. Yet, further adaptation causes severe overfitting on average view patterns of known classes. To combat it, we then design a module named Chunking and Adapting Module (CAM). It segments multi-view images into chunks and dynamically integrates local view relations, yielding more robust features than the standard pooling strategy. Finally, we propose Virtual Feature Synthesis (VFS) module to mitigate bias towards known categories explicitly. Under the hood, VFS leverages CLIP's broad, pre-aligned vision-language space to synthesize virtual features for unseen classes. By exposing DEC to these virtual features, we greatly enhance its open-set discrimination capacity. Extensive experiments on standard open-set 3DOR benchmarks demonstrate its superior efficacy.

analysis.tldr: 提出DEC框架，结合DINO和CLIP实现开放集3D对象检索，通过动态多视图集成和虚拟特征合成提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放集3D对象检索需要模型能识别未见类别，现有方法依赖CLIP但缺乏细粒度，而DINO具有更好的细粒度特征但直接微调会过拟合已知类别。
analysis.problem: 如何有效结合DINO的细粒度特征和CLIP的开放集泛化能力，避免过拟合已知类别，实现鲁棒的开放集3D对象检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：冻结DINO骨干的视图特征平均池化表现尚可，但进一步微调会导致对已知类别平均视图模式的严重过拟合。
analysis.method: 提出DEC框架，包含Chunking and Adapting Module (CAM)用于动态多视图集成，以及Virtual Feature Synthesis (VFS)模块利用CLIP合成未见类别的虚拟特征以缓解已知类别偏差。
contributions: 提出DEC框架，首次将DINO和CLIP结合用于开放集3D对象检索。
设计CAM模块实现动态多视图集成，避免标准池化策略的过拟合。
提出VFS模块利用CLIP合成虚拟特征，增强开放集判别能力。
analysis.experiments: 在标准开放集3DOR基准上进行了大量实验，证明了方法的优越性。
limitations: 依赖CLIP的视觉-语言空间质量，可能受限于CLIP的偏见。
虚拟特征合成可能无法完全覆盖未见类别的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合DINO和CLIP解决开放集3D检索问题，实验充分，推荐精读。

papers.title: EX-FIQA: Leveraging Intermediate Early eXit Representations from Vision Transformers for Face Image Quality Assessment
papers.abstract: Face Image Quality Assessment is crucial for reliable face recognition systems, yet existing Vision Transformer-based approaches rely exclusively on final-layer representations, ignoring quality-relevant information captured at intermediate network depths. This paper presents the first comprehensive investigation of how intermediate representations within ViTs contribute to face quality assessment through early exit mechanisms and score fusion strategies. We systematically analyze all twelve transformer blocks of ViT-FIQA architectures, demonstrating that different depths capture distinct and complementary quality-relevant information, as evidenced by varying attention patterns and performance characteristics across network layers. We propose a score fusion framework that combines quality predictions from multiple transformer blocks without architectural modifications or additional training. Our early exit analysis reveals optimal performance-efficiency trade-offs, enabling significant computational savings while maintaining competitive performance. Through extensive evaluation across eight benchmark datasets using four FR models, we demonstrate that our fusion strategy improves upon single-exit approaches. Our proposed quality fusion approach employs depth-weighted averaging that assigns progressively higher importance to deeper transformer blocks, achieving the best quality assessment performance by effectively leveraging the hierarchical nature of feature learning in ViTs. Our work challenges the conventional wisdom that only deep features matter for face analysis, revealing that intermediate representations contain valuable information for quality assessment. The proposed framework offers practical benefits for real-world biometric systems by enabling adaptive computation based on resource constraints while maintaining competitive quality assessment capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 利用ViT中间层表示进行人脸图像质量评估，提出无需额外训练的分数融合框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于ViT的人脸质量评估方法仅使用最后一层表示，忽略了中间层捕获的质量相关信息，导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用ViT中间层表示来提升人脸图像质量评估的准确性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同深度的Transformer块捕获了不同且互补的质量相关信息，注意力模式和性能特征随层变化。
analysis.method: 提出EX-FIQA框架，通过早期退出机制和分数融合策略，结合多个Transformer块的质量预测，采用深度加权平均（对深层块赋予更高权重）进行融合，无需架构修改或额外训练。
contributions: 首次系统研究ViT中间层表示对人脸质量评估的贡献，揭示不同深度捕获互补信息。
提出无需额外训练的分数融合框架，通过深度加权平均提升性能，并实现计算效率与性能的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在8个基准数据集上使用4个FR模型进行广泛评估，融合策略优于单退出方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定ViT架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论融合权重自适应调整机制。

papers.title: Counting Worlds Branching Time Semantics for post-hoc Bias Mitigation in generative AI
papers.abstract: Generative AI systems are known to amplify biases present in their training data. While several inference-time mitigation strategies have been proposed, they remain largely empirical and lack formal guarantees. In this paper we introduce CTLF, a branching-time logic designed to reason about bias in series of generative AI outputs. CTLF adopts a counting worlds semantics where each world represents a possible output at a given step in the generation process and introduces modal operators that allow us to verify whether the current output series respects an intended probability distribution over a protected attribute, to predict the likelihood of remaining within acceptable bounds as new outputs are generated, and to determine how many outputs are needed to remove in order to restore fairness. We illustrate the framework on a toy example of biased image generation, showing how CTLF formulas can express concrete fairness properties at different points in the output series.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种分支时间逻辑CTLF，用于在生成式AI输出序列中推理和缓解偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI系统会放大训练数据中的偏见，现有推理时缓解策略缺乏形式化保证。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化地推理和验证生成式AI输出序列中的偏见，并提供可保证的缓解方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CTLF（计数世界分支时间逻辑），引入计数世界语义和模态算子，用于验证输出序列是否满足受保护属性的概率分布、预测未来输出保持公平的可能性，以及确定需要移除多少输出以恢复公平。
contributions: 提出CTLF逻辑，为生成式AI输出序列中的偏见推理提供形式化框架。
定义计数世界语义和模态算子，支持公平性属性的验证、预测和修复。

papers.title: TESO: Online Tracking of Essential Matrix by Stochastic Optimization
papers.abstract: Maintaining long-term accuracy of stereo camera calibration parameters is important for autonomous systems' perception. This work proposes Online Tracking of Essential Matrix by Stochastic Optimization (TESO). The core mechanisms of TESO are: 1) a robust loss function based on kernel correlation over tentative correspondences, 2) an adaptive online stochastic optimization on the essential manifold. TESO has low CPU and memory requirements, relies on a few hyperparameters, and eliminates the need for data-driven training, enabling the usage in resource-constrained online perception systems. We evaluated the influence of TESO on geometric precision, rectification quality, and stereo depth consistency. On the large-scale MAN TruckScenes dataset, TESO tracks rotational calibration drift with 0.12 deg precision in the Y-axis (critical for stereo accuracy) while the X- and Z-axes are five times more precise. Tracking applied to sequences with simulated drift shows similar precision with respect to the reference as tracking applied to no-drift sequences, indicating the tracker is unbiased. On the KITTI dataset, TESO revealed systematic inconsistencies in extrinsic parameters across stereo pairs, confirming previous published findings. We verified that intrinsic decalibration affected these errors, as evidenced by the conflicting behavior of the rectification and depth metrics. After correcting the reference calibration, TESO improved its rotation precision around the Y-axis 20 times to 0.025 deg and its depth accuracy 50 times. Despite its lightweight design, direct optimization of the proposed TESO loss function alone achieves accuracy comparable to that of neural network-based single-frame methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于随机优化的在线本质矩阵跟踪方法，无需数据驱动训练，在资源受限系统中实现高精度立体相机标定漂移跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主系统长期运行中，立体相机标定参数会因温度、振动等因素发生漂移，导致感知精度下降。现有方法要么依赖数据驱动训练（计算资源需求高），要么精度不足，难以在资源受限的在线系统中长期保持标定精度。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖数据驱动训练、低计算资源消耗的前提下，在线跟踪立体相机本质矩阵的漂移，并保持高几何精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出TESO在MAN TruckScenes和KITTI数据集上表现出高精度和无偏跟踪，并揭示了KITTI数据集中立体对间外参的系统性不一致。
analysis.method: 提出TESO方法，核心包括：1) 基于核相关性的鲁棒损失函数，用于处理候选匹配点；2) 在本质流形上进行自适应在线随机优化。方法低CPU和内存需求，仅依赖少量超参数。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级在线本质矩阵跟踪方法，无需数据驱动训练，适用于资源受限系统。
设计基于核相关性的鲁棒损失函数和流形上的自适应随机优化机制。
在MAN TruckScenes和KITTI数据集上验证了高精度跟踪能力，并揭示了标定误差的潜在问题。
analysis.experiments: 在MAN TruckScenes数据集上，TESO跟踪Y轴旋转漂移精度达0.12度，X和Z轴精度高5倍；在KITTI数据集上，校正参考标定后Y轴旋转精度提升20倍至0.025度，深度精度提升50倍。摘要未提供与基线方法的详细对比。
limitations: 方法可能对极端噪声或快速漂移场景的鲁棒性未充分验证。
仅针对立体相机本质矩阵跟踪，未扩展到其他传感器或标定参数类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法轻量且有效，但属于增量改进，实验规模有限，与重点方向弱相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于随机优化的在线本质矩阵跟踪方法，无需数据驱动训练，在资源受限系统中实现高精度立体相机标定漂移跟踪。

papers.title: ATTN-FIQA: Interpretable Attention-based Face Image Quality Assessment with Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Face Image Quality Assessment (FIQA) aims to assess the recognition utility of face samples and is essential for reliable face recognition (FR) systems. Existing approaches require computationally expensive procedures such as multiple forward passes, backpropagation, or additional training, and only recent work has focused on the use of Vision Transformers. Recent studies highlighted that these architectures inherently function as saliency learners with attention patterns naturally encoding spatial importance. This work proposes ATTN-FIQA, a novel training-free approach that investigates whether pre-softmax attention scores from pre-trained Vision Transformer-based face recognition models can serve as quality indicators. We hypothesize that attention magnitudes intrinsically encode quality: high-quality images with discriminative facial features enable strong query-key alignments producing focused, high-magnitude attention patterns, while degraded images generate diffuse, low-magnitude patterns. ATTN-FIQA extracts pre-softmax attention matrices from the final transformer block, aggregate multi-head attention information across all patches, and compute image-level quality scores through simple averaging, requiring only a single forward pass through pre-trained models without architectural modifications, backpropagation, or additional training. Through comprehensive evaluation across eight benchmark datasets and four FR models, this work demonstrates that attention-based quality scores effectively correlate with face image quality and provide spatial interpretability, revealing which facial regions contribute most to quality determination.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的注意力机制人脸图像质量评估方法，利用预训练ViT的注意力分数作为质量指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有FIQA方法计算成本高，需要多次前向传播、反向传播或额外训练，且缺乏可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、可解释地评估人脸图像质量，无需额外训练或模型修改。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高质量人脸图像产生聚焦、高幅度的注意力模式，低质量图像产生弥散、低幅度的注意力模式。
analysis.method: 从预训练ViT的最后一个Transformer块提取softmax前的注意力矩阵，聚合多头注意力信息，通过简单平均计算图像级质量分数。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的注意力机制FIQA方法，仅需单次前向传播。
在8个基准数据集和4个FR模型上验证了注意力分数与图像质量的相关性，并提供空间可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在8个基准数据集和4个FR模型上评估，显示注意力分数有效反映人脸图像质量并提供空间可解释性。
limitations: 仅依赖预训练ViT的注意力分数，可能受限于模型本身的质量表征能力。
未与需要训练的方法进行性能对比，实际应用效果需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，无需训练，但创新性有限，实验未与SOTA对比。
