papers.title: HalluAudio: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Hallucination Detection in Large Audio-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) have recently achieved strong performance across various audio-centric tasks. However, hallucination, where models generate responses that are semantically incorrect or acoustically unsupported, remains largely underexplored in the audio domain. Existing hallucination benchmarks mainly focus on text or vision, while the few audio-oriented studies are limited in scale, modality coverage, and diagnostic depth. We therefore introduce HalluAudio, the first large-scale benchmark for evaluating hallucinations across speech, environmental sound, and music. HalluAudio comprises over 5K human-verified QA pairs and spans diverse task types, including binary judgments, multi-choice reasoning, attribute verification, and open-ended QA. To systematically induce hallucinations, we design adversarial prompts and mixed-audio conditions. Beyond accuracy, our evaluation protocol measures hallucination rate, yes/no bias, error-type analysis, and refusal rate, enabling a fine-grained analysis of LALM failure modes. We benchmark a broad range of open-source and proprietary models, providing the first large-scale comparison across speech, sound, and music. Our results reveal significant deficiencies in acoustic grounding, temporal reasoning, and music attribute understanding, underscoring the need for reliable and robust LALMs.

analysis.tldr: 首个大规模音频语言模型幻觉检测基准，覆盖语音、环境音和音乐，揭示模型在声学基础、时间推理和音乐属性理解上的显著缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 音频语言模型（LALM）在多种音频任务中表现强劲，但幻觉问题（生成语义错误或声学无依据的响应）在音频领域尚未被充分探索，现有基准规模小、模态覆盖窄、诊断深度不足。

对多种开源和闭源模型进行基准测试，提供跨模态的首次大规模比较。
analysis.experiments: 对多种开源和闭源模型进行基准测试，结果揭示了声学基础、时间推理和音乐属性理解上的显著缺陷。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有音频类型或真实场景中的复杂幻觉。

papers.title: Rethinking Scale: Deployment Trade-offs of Small Language Models under Agent Paradigms
papers.abstract: Despite the impressive capabilities of large language models, their substantial computational costs, latency, and privacy risks hinder their widespread deployment in real-world applications. Small Language Models (SLMs) with fewer than 10 billion parameters present a promising alternative; however, their inherent limitations in knowledge and reasoning curtail their effectiveness. Existing research primarily focuses on enhancing SLMs through scaling laws or fine-tuning strategies while overlooking the potential of using agent paradigms, such as tool use and multi-agent collaboration, to systematically compensate for the inherent weaknesses of small models. To address this gap, this paper presents the first large-scale, comprehensive study of <10B open-source models under three paradigms: (1) the base model, (2) a single agent equipped with tools, and (3) a multi-agent system with collaborative capabilities. Our results show that single-agent systems achieve the best balance between performance and cost, while multi-agent setups add overhead with limited gains. Our findings highlight the importance of agent-centric design for efficient and trustworthy deployment in resource-constrained settings.

analysis.tldr: 小语言模型在智能体范式下，单智能体系统在性能和成本间取得最佳平衡，多智能体系统收益有限。

papers.title: IndiaFinBench: An Evaluation Benchmark for Large Language Model Performance on Indian Financial Regulatory Text
papers.abstract: We introduce IndiaFinBench, to our knowledge the first publicly available evaluation benchmark for assessing large language model (LLM) performance on Indian financial regulatory text. Existing financial NLP benchmarks draw exclusively from Western financial corpora (SEC filings, US earnings reports, English-language financial news), leaving a significant gap in coverage of non-Western regulatory frameworks. IndiaFinBench addresses this gap with 406 expert-annotated question-answer pairs drawn from 192 documents sourced from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) and the Reserve Bank of India (RBI), spanning four task types: regulatory interpretation (174 items), numerical reasoning (92 items), contradiction detection (62 items), and temporal reasoning (78 items). Annotation quality is validated through a model-based secondary pass (kappa=0.918 on contradiction detection; 90.7% overall agreement on a 150-item subset) and a 180-item human inter-annotator agreement study across three annotation rounds (kappa=0.645 on contradiction detection; 77.2% overall agreement; 44.3% benchmark coverage). We evaluate twelve models under zero-shot conditions, with accuracy ranging from 70.4% (Gemma 4 E4B) to 89.7% (Gemini 2.5 Flash). All models substantially outperform a non-specialist human baseline of 69.0%. Numerical reasoning is the most discriminative task, with a 35.9 percentage-point spread across models. Bootstrap significance testing (10,000 resamples) reveals three statistically distinct performance tiers. The dataset, evaluation code, and all model outputs are available at https://github.com/rajveerpall/IndiaFinBench

analysis.tldr: 首个面向印度金融监管文本的LLM评测基准，包含406个专家标注问答对，覆盖四种任务类型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有金融NLP基准主要基于西方金融语料（如SEC文件、美国财报），缺乏对非西方监管框架的覆盖，印度金融监管文本的评估存在空白。
analysis.problem: 构建首个公开的印度金融监管文本LLM评估基准，填补非西方金融NLP评测的缺失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数值推理任务最具区分度，模型间准确率差距达35.9个百分点；所有模型均优于非专家人类基线（69.0%）。
analysis.method: 从印度证券交易委员会和印度储备银行的192份文档中提取406个专家标注问答对，涵盖监管解释、数值推理、矛盾检测和时间推理四种任务；通过模型二次验证和人工一致性研究确保标注质量。
contributions: 发布了首个公开的印度金融监管文本LLM评估基准IndiaFinBench
提供了406个专家标注问答对及四种任务类型，验证了标注质量
评估了12个模型，揭示了数值推理任务的高区分度及模型性能分层
analysis.experiments: 在零样本条件下评估12个模型，准确率范围70.4%-89.7%；所有模型优于非专家人类基线（69.0%）；数值推理任务模型间差距35.9个百分点；Bootstrap显著性检验显示三个统计显著性能层级。
limitations: 基准规模较小（406个问答对），可能不足以全面评估模型能力
仅覆盖印度监管文本，泛化到其他非西方金融场景需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个印度金融监管文本基准，填补非西方金融NLP评测空白，实验充分，但规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向印度金融监管文本的LLM评测基准，包含406个专家标注问答对，覆盖四种任务类型。

papers.title: Location Not Found: Exposing Implicit Local and Global Biases in Multilingual LLMs
papers.abstract: Multilingual large language models (LLMs) have minimized the fluency gap between languages. This advancement, however, exposes models to the risk of biased behavior, as knowledge and norms may propagate across languages. In this work, we aim to quantify models' inter- and intra-lingual biases, via their ability to answer locale-ambiguous questions. To this end, we present LocQA, a test set containing 2,156 questions in 12 languages, referring to various locale-dependent facts such as laws, dates, and measurements. The questions do not contain indications of the locales they relate to, other than the querying language itself. LLMs' responses to LocQA locale-ambiguous questions thus reveal models' implicit priors. We used LocQA to evaluate 32 models, and detected two types of structural biases. Inter-lingually, we show a global bias towards answers relevant to the US-locale, even when models are asked in languages other than English. Moreover, we discovered that this global bias is exacerbated in models that underwent instruction tuning, compared to their base counterparts. Intra-lingually, we show that when multiple locales are relevant for the same language, models act as demographic probability engines, prioritizing locales with larger populations. Taken together, insights from LocQA may help in shaping LLMs' desired local behavior, and in quantifying the impact of various training phases on different kinds of biases.

analysis.tldr: 多语言LLM在回答无地点线索的问题时，表现出对美国的全局偏见和按人口规模排序的局部偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 多语言LLM缩小了语言差距，但可能跨语言传播知识中的偏见，需要量化其隐含偏见。
analysis.problem: 量化多语言LLM在回答地点模糊问题时的跨语言和语言内偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现两种结构性偏见：跨语言上，模型偏向美国相关答案，且指令微调加剧此偏见；语言内，当同一语言对应多个地点时，模型优先选择人口较多的地点。
analysis.method: 构建LocQA测试集（12语言2156个地点依赖问题），通过模型对无地点线索问题的回答揭示隐含先验。
contributions: 提出LocQA基准，用于评估多语言LLM的地点相关偏见
发现并量化了跨语言的美国全局偏见和语言内的人口规模偏见
揭示指令微调会加剧全局偏见
analysis.experiments: 在32个模型上评估，检测到两种结构性偏见。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅覆盖12种语言，可能无法代表所有语言
未深入分析偏见对下游任务的实际影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，系统评估多语言LLM的地点偏见，对公平性研究有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多语言LLM在回答无地点线索的问题时，表现出对美国的全局偏见和按人口规模排序的局部偏见。

papers.title: Beyond Semantic Similarity: A Component-Wise Evaluation Framework for Medical Question Answering Systems with Health Equity Implications
papers.abstract: The use of Large Language Models (LLMs) to support patients in addressing medical questions is becoming increasingly prevalent. However, most of the measures currently used to evaluate the performance of these models in this context only measure how closely a model's answers match semantically, and therefore do not provide a true indication of the model's medical accuracy or of the health equity risks associated with it. To address these shortcomings, we present a new evaluation framework for medical question answering called VB-Score (Verification-Based Score) that provides a separate evaluation of the four components of entity recognition, semantic similarity, factual consistency, and structured information completeness for medical question-answering models. We perform rigorous reviews of the performance of three well-known and widely used LLMs on 48 public health-related topics taken from high-quality, authoritative information sources. Based on our analyses, we discover a major discrepancy between the models' semantic and entity accuracy. Our assessments of the performance of all three models show that each of them has almost uniformly severe performance failures when evaluated against our criteria. Our findings indicate alarming performance disparities across various public health topics, with most of the models exhibiting 13.8% lower performance (compared to an overall average) for all the public health topics that relate to chronic conditions that occur in older and minority populations, which indicates the existence of what's known as condition-based algorithmic discrimination. Our findings also demonstrate that prompt engineering alone does not compensate for basic architectural limitations on how these models perform in extracting medical entities and raise the question of whether semantic evaluation alone is a sufficient measure of medical AI safety.

analysis.tldr: 提出VB-Score评估框架，发现LLM在医学问答中实体准确性差且存在基于健康状况的算法歧视。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学问答评估仅依赖语义相似度，无法反映真实医学准确性和健康公平风险。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能同时评估实体识别、语义相似性、事实一致性和结构化信息完整性的医学问答评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 三个LLM在实体准确性上表现严重不足，且对老年和少数族裔人群的慢性病主题性能平均低13.8%，存在条件性算法歧视。
analysis.method: 提出VB-Score框架，分别评估实体识别、语义相似性、事实一致性和结构化信息完整性四个组件。
contributions: 提出VB-Score评估框架，实现医学问答的多维度评估。
发现LLM在医学实体提取上的严重缺陷和基于健康状况的算法歧视。
analysis.experiments: 在48个高质量公共卫生主题上评估三个知名LLM，发现性能差异和歧视现象。
limitations: 仅评估了三个LLM，可能不具广泛代表性。
未提供VB-Score与临床专家评估的对比验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 框架新颖且发现重要公平性问题，但实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VB-Score评估框架，发现LLM在医学问答中实体准确性差且存在基于健康状况的算法歧视。

papers.title: Explicit Trait Inference for Multi-Agent Coordination
papers.abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) show promise on complex tasks but remain prone to coordination failures such as goal drift, error cascades, and misaligned behaviors. We propose Explicit Trait Inference (ETI), a psychologically grounded method for improving coordination. ETI enables agents to infer and track partner characteristics along two established psychological dimensions--warmth (e.g., trust) and competence (e.g., skill)--from interaction histories to guide decisions. We evaluate ETI in controlled settings (economic games), where it reduces payoff loss by 45-77%, and in more realistic, complex multi-agent settings (MultiAgentBench), where it improves performance by 3-29% depending on the scenario and model, relative to a CoT baseline. Additional analysis shows that gains are closely linked to trait inference: ETI profiles predict agents' actions, and informative profiles drive improvements. These results highlight ETI as a lightweight and robust mechanism for improving coordination in diverse multi-agent settings, and provide the first systematic evidence that LLM agents can (i) reliably infer others' traits from interaction histories and (ii) leverage structured awareness of others' traits for coordination.

analysis.tldr: 提出显式特质推断（ETI）方法，让LLM智能体从交互历史中推断伙伴的温暖和能力特质，从而改善多智能体协调。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体系统在复杂任务中容易出现协调失败，如目标漂移、错误级联和行为不匹配，现有方法缺乏对伙伴特质的显式建模。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM智能体有效推断并利用伙伴的心理特质（温暖和能力）来改善多智能体协调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 显式特质推断（ETI）：智能体从交互历史中沿温暖（如信任）和能力（如技能）两个心理维度推断并追踪伙伴特质，以指导决策。
contributions: 提出ETI方法，将心理学特质维度引入多智能体协调。
在受控经济游戏和复杂多智能体基准上验证有效性，性能提升3-29%。
首次系统证明LLM智能体能够从交互历史可靠推断他人特质并利用结构化特质意识进行协调。
analysis.experiments: 在受控经济游戏中减少45-77%的收益损失；在MultiAgentBench中相比CoT基线提升3-29%性能。
limitations: 可能依赖交互历史的质量和长度。
仅考虑温暖和能力两个维度，可能不覆盖所有相关特质。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对多智能体协调有显著改进，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出显式特质推断（ETI）方法，让LLM智能体从交互历史中推断伙伴的温暖和能力特质，从而改善多智能体协调。

papers.title: DR-MMSearchAgent: Deepening Reasoning in Multimodal Search Agents
papers.abstract: Agentic multimodal models have garnered significant attention for their ability to leverage external tools to tackle complex tasks. However, it is observed that such agents often meet premature interaction collapse, caused by two primary reasons: 1) the terminal reward often appending on the last token prevents the advantage from distinguishing trajectories with exploratory behavior; 2) excessively redundant context hinders the agent from absorbing useful feedback. To address these issues, we propose the Deepening Reasoning MMSearchAgent, the framework leverages the structural proximity to derive advantage signals from the whole rollout trajectories in an entire batch, such that trajectories of different lengths are further encouraged to be generated, even when containing the same correct answer. Additionally, differentiated gaussian rewards are employed to dynamically calibrate interaction tolerance, thereby ensuring information reliability and reduce redundancy. To support multi-turn interaction training, we have constructed a multi-step deep-reasoning dataset including 3602 high-quality QA pair with at least 3 reasonning steps. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming the MMSearch-R1 by 8.4$\%$ on FVQA-test.

analysis.tldr: 提出DR-MMSearchAgent框架，通过结构邻近性优势信号和差异化高斯奖励解决多模态搜索代理的过早交互崩溃问题，在FVQA-test上超越MMSearch-R1 8.4%。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态搜索代理在复杂任务中常因过早交互崩溃而性能受限，主要源于终端奖励仅附加于最后token导致无法区分探索性轨迹，以及冗余上下文阻碍有用反馈吸收。
analysis.problem: 多模态搜索代理在交互过程中因奖励信号稀疏和上下文冗余导致的过早交互崩溃问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到代理存在过早交互崩溃现象，原因包括终端奖励仅作用于最后token以及冗余上下文干扰。
analysis.method: 利用结构邻近性从整个批次轨迹中导出优势信号，鼓励不同长度轨迹生成；采用差异化高斯奖励动态校准交互容忍度，减少冗余。
contributions: 提出DR-MMSearchAgent框架，通过结构邻近性优势信号和差异化高斯奖励缓解过早交互崩溃。
构建包含3602个高质量QA对的多步深度推理数据集，支持多轮交互训练。
analysis.experiments: 在FVQA-test上取得SOTA，比MMSearch-R1提升8.4%。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（3602 QA对），可能限制泛化性。
方法在更复杂或开放域场景下的效果未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，实验有明确提升，但数据集较小且未提及其他基准，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DR-MMSearchAgent框架，通过结构邻近性优势信号和差异化高斯奖励解决多模态搜索代理的过早交互崩溃问题，在FVQA-test上超越MMSearch-R1 8.4%。

papers.title: CulturALL: Benchmarking Multilingual and Multicultural Competence of LLMs on Grounded Tasks
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are now deployed worldwide, inspiring a surge of benchmarks that measure their multilingual and multicultural abilities. However, these benchmarks prioritize generic language understanding or superficial cultural trivia, leaving the evaluation of grounded tasks -- where models must reason within real-world, context-rich scenarios -- largely unaddressed. To fill this gap, we present CulturALL, a comprehensive and challenging benchmark to assess LLMs' multilingual and multicultural competence on grounded tasks. CulturALL is built via a human--AI collaborative framework: expert annotators ensure appropriate difficulty and factual accuracy, while LLMs lighten the manual workload. By incorporating diverse sources, CulturALL ensures comprehensive scenario coverage. Each item is carefully designed to present a high level of difficulty, making CulturALL challenging. CulturALL contains 2,610 samples in 14 languages from 51 regions, distributed across 16 topics to capture the full breadth of grounded tasks. Experiments show that the best LLM achieves 44.48% accuracy on CulturALL, underscoring substantial room for improvement.

analysis.tldr: CulturALL 是一个评估 LLM 在多语言多文化接地任务上能力的基准，最佳模型仅达 44.48% 准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准多关注通用语言理解或表面文化常识，缺乏对需要真实世界场景推理的接地任务的评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个全面且具有挑战性的基准来评估 LLM 在多语言多文化接地任务上的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最佳 LLM 在 CulturALL 上仅达到 44.48% 准确率，表明现有模型在接地任务上仍有显著提升空间。
analysis.method: 通过人机协作框架构建基准：专家标注者确保难度和事实准确性，LLM 减轻人工负担；涵盖 51 个地区 14 种语言共 2610 个样本，分布 16 个主题。
contributions: 提出了 CulturALL，首个评估 LLM 多语言多文化接地任务的综合基准。
展示了人机协作构建高质量基准的框架。
实验揭示了当前 LLM 在接地任务上的显著不足。
analysis.experiments: 在 CulturALL 上评估了多个 LLM，最佳模型准确率为 44.48%。摘要未提供具体模型名称或更多实验细节。
limitations: 基准覆盖的语言和地区可能仍有限。
人机协作框架的泛化性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准填补了多语言多文化接地任务评估空白，实验显示模型差距大，但方法为增量贡献。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CulturALL 是一个评估 LLM 在多语言多文化接地任务上能力的基准，最佳模型仅达 44.48% 准确率。

papers.title: Feature Perturbation Pool-based Fusion Network for Unified Multi-Class Industrial Defect Detection
papers.abstract: Multi-class defect detection constitutes a critical yet challenging task in industrial quality inspection, where existing approaches typically suffer from two fundamental limitations: (i) the necessity of training separate models for each defect category, resulting in substantial computational and memory overhead, and (ii) degraded robustness caused by inter-class feature perturbation when heterogeneous defect categories are jointly modeled. In this paper, we present FPFNet, a Feature Perturbation Pool-based Fusion Network that synergistically integrates a stochastic feature perturbation pool with a multi-layer feature fusion strategy to address these challenges within a unified detection framework. The feature perturbation pool enriches the training distribution by randomly injecting diverse noise patterns -- including Gaussian noise, F-Noise, and F-Drop -- into the extracted feature representations, thereby strengthening the model's robustness against domain shifts and unseen defect morphologies. Concurrently, the multi-layer feature fusion module aggregates hierarchical feature representations from both the encoder and decoder through residual connections and normalization, enabling the network to capture complex cross-scale relationships while preserving fine-grained spatial details essential for precise defect localization. Built upon the UniAD architecture~\cite{you2022unified}, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on two widely adopted benchmarks: 97.17\% image-level AUROC and 96.93\% pixel-level AUROC on MVTec-AD, and 91.08\% image-level AUROC and 99.08\% pixel-level AUROC on VisA, surpassing existing methods by notable margins while introducing no additional learnable parameters or computational complexity.

analysis.tldr: 提出FPFNet，通过特征扰动池和多层融合实现统一多类工业缺陷检测，在MVTec-AD和VisA上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法需为每类缺陷训练独立模型，计算开销大；且联合建模时类别间特征扰动导致鲁棒性下降。
analysis.problem: 如何设计统一框架同时处理多类缺陷检测，克服特征扰动并保持高效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多类缺陷联合建模时存在特征扰动，导致鲁棒性下降。
analysis.method: 基于UniAD架构，引入随机特征扰动池（高斯噪声、F-Noise、F-Drop）增强训练分布，结合多层特征融合模块（残差连接与归一化）聚合编码器-解码器层次特征。
contributions: 提出特征扰动池策略，通过注入多样化噪声提升模型对域偏移和未知缺陷形态的鲁棒性。
设计多层特征融合模块，捕获跨尺度关系并保留空间细节，实现精确缺陷定位。
在MVTec-AD和VisA上取得SOTA性能，且不增加额外参数或计算复杂度。
analysis.experiments: 在MVTec-AD和VisA两个基准上评估，图像级AUROC分别为97.17%和91.08%，像素级AUROC分别为96.93%和99.08%，超越现有方法。
limitations: 方法依赖UniAD架构，可能不适用于其他基础检测框架。
噪声注入策略需手动选择类型，可能未覆盖所有扰动模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，但实验充分且性能提升显著，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FPFNet，通过特征扰动池和多层融合实现统一多类工业缺陷检测，在MVTec-AD和VisA上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Unposed-to-3D: Learning Simulation-Ready Vehicles from Real-World Images
papers.abstract: Creating realistic and simulation-ready 3D assets is crucial for autonomous driving research and virtual environment construction. However, existing 3D vehicle generation methods are often trained on synthetic data with significant domain gaps from real-world distributions. The generated models often exhibit arbitrary poses and undefined scales, resulting in poor visual consistency when integrated into driving scenes. In this paper, we present Unposed-to-3D, a novel framework that learns to reconstruct 3D vehicles from real-world driving images using image-only supervision. Our approach consists of two stages. In the first stage, we train an image-to-3D reconstruction network using posed images with known camera parameters. In the second stage, we remove camera supervision and use a camera prediction head that directly estimates the camera parameters from unposed images. The predicted pose is then used for differentiable rendering to provide self-supervised photometric feedback, enabling the model to learn 3D geometry purely from unposed images. To ensure simulation readiness, we further introduce a scale-aware module to predict real-world size information, and a harmonization module that adapts the generated vehicles to the target driving scene with consistent lighting and appearance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Unposed-to-3D effectively reconstructs realistic, pose-consistent, and harmonized 3D vehicle models from real-world images, providing a scalable path toward creating high-quality assets for driving scene simulation and digital twin environments.

analysis.tldr: 从真实驾驶图像中无监督学习生成仿真就绪的3D车辆模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D车辆生成方法依赖合成数据，存在域差距，且生成模型姿态任意、尺度未定义，难以直接用于驾驶场景仿真。
analysis.problem: 如何从真实世界无姿态标注的驾驶图像中学习生成姿态一致、尺度准确且场景和谐的3D车辆模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用有姿态图像训练图像到3D重建网络；第二阶段移除相机监督，引入相机预测头估计参数，通过可微渲染提供自监督光度反馈，并加入尺度感知模块和场景协调模块。
contributions: 提出从无姿态真实图像学习3D车辆重建的框架，无需相机参数标注。
引入尺度感知和场景协调模块，确保生成模型仿真就绪。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖第一阶段有姿态数据的质量。
对复杂场景或极端姿态的泛化能力未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且针对自动驾驶仿真关键问题，但摘要缺乏实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从真实驾驶图像中无监督学习生成仿真就绪的3D车辆模型。

papers.title: ShadowPEFT: Shadow Network for Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) reduces the training cost of full-parameter fine-tuning for large language models (LLMs) by training only a small set of task-specific parameters while freezing the pretrained backbone. However, existing approaches, such as Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), achieve adaptation by inserting independent low-rank perturbations directly to individual weights, resulting in a local parameterization of adaptation. We propose ShadowPEFT, a centralized PEFT framework that instead performs layer-level refinement through a depth-shared shadow module. At each transformer layer, ShadowPEFT maintains a parallel shadow state and evolves it repeatedly for progressively richer hidden states. This design shifts adaptation from distributed weight-space perturbations to a shared layer-space refinement process. Since the shadow module is decoupled from the backbone, it can be reused across depth, independently pretrained, and optionally deployed in a detached mode, benefiting edge computing scenarios. Experiments on generation and understanding benchmarks show that ShadowPEFT matches or outperforms LoRA and DoRA under comparable trainable-parameter budgets. Additional analyses on shadow pretraining, cross-dataset transfer, parameter scaling, inference latency, and system-level evaluation suggest that centralized layer-space adaptation is a competitive and flexible alternative to conventional low-rank PEFT.

analysis.tldr: ShadowPEFT 通过深度共享的影子模块实现层级精调，在参数效率微调中匹配或超越 LoRA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 PEFT 方法如 LoRA 对单个权重进行局部低秩扰动，缺乏全局层间协调，且难以复用和独立部署。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种集中式的、层级的参数高效微调框架，替代传统的分布式权重空间扰动方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ShadowPEFT，在每个 Transformer 层维护一个并行影子状态，通过深度共享的影子模块反复演化以产生更丰富的隐藏状态，实现层级精调。
contributions: 提出 ShadowPEFT，一种集中式 PEFT 框架，通过深度共享的影子模块进行层级精调。
实验表明 ShadowPEFT 在生成和理解基准上匹配或超越 LoRA 和 DoRA，并具有影子预训练、跨数据集迁移等额外优势。
analysis.experiments: 在生成和理解基准上进行了实验，比较了 LoRA 和 DoRA，并分析了影子预训练、跨数据集迁移、参数缩放、推理延迟和系统级评估。
limitations: 可能对长序列或深层网络的计算开销较高。
影子模块的共享机制可能在某些任务上不如专用适配器灵活。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验较充分，但技术深度中等，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ShadowPEFT 通过深度共享的影子模块实现层级精调，在参数效率微调中匹配或超越 LoRA。

papers.title: Environmental Understanding Vision-Language Model for Embodied Agent
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown strong perception and reasoning abilities for instruction-following embodied agents. However, despite these abilities and their generalization performance, they still face limitations in environmental understanding, often failing on interactions or relying on environment metadata during execution. To address this challenge, we propose a novel framework named Environmental Understanding Embodied Agent (EUEA), which fine-tunes four core skills: 1) object perception for identifying relevant objects, 2) task planning for generating interaction subgoals, 3) action understanding for judging success likelihood, and 4) goal recognition for determining goal completion. By fine-tuning VLMs with EUEA skills, our framework enables more reliable task execution for instruction-following. We further introduce a recovery step that leverages these core skills and a group relative policy optimization (GRPO) stage that refines inconsistent skill predictions. The recovery step samples alternative actions to correct failure cases, and the GRPO stage refines inconsistent skill predictions. Across ALFRED tasks, our VLM significantly outperforms a behavior-cloning baseline, achieving an 8.86% improvement in average success rate. The recovery and GRPO stages provide an additional 3.03% gain, further enhancing overall performance. Finally, our skill-level analyses reveal key limitations in the environmental understanding of closed- and open-source VLMs and identify the capabilities necessary for effective agent-environment interaction.

analysis.tldr: 提出EUEA框架，通过微调VLM的四个核心技能并引入恢复步骤和GRPO优化，提升具身智能体的环境理解与任务执行能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在具身智能体中虽具备感知和推理能力，但在环境理解上存在局限，常导致交互失败或依赖环境元数据，限制了其在指令跟随任务中的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何提升VLM在具身智能体中的环境理解能力，使其无需依赖环境元数据即可可靠执行指令跟随任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EUEA框架，微调VLM的四个核心技能（物体感知、任务规划、动作理解、目标识别），并引入恢复步骤（采样替代动作纠正失败）和GRPO阶段（优化不一致的技能预测）。
contributions: 提出EUEA框架，通过微调四个核心技能提升VLM的环境理解能力。
引入恢复步骤和GRPO阶段，进一步改善任务执行性能。
在ALFRED任务上验证有效性，平均成功率提升8.86%，恢复和GRPO额外带来3.03%增益。
analysis.experiments: 在ALFRED任务上，VLM显著优于行为克隆基线，平均成功率提升8.86%；恢复和GRPO阶段额外带来3.03%增益。技能级分析揭示了闭源和开源VLM在环境理解上的关键局限。
limitations: 可能仅在ALFRED任务上验证，泛化性未知。

papers.title: Streamliners for Answer Set Programming
papers.abstract: Streamliner constraints reduce the search space of combinatorial problems by ruling out portions of the solution space. We adapt the StreamLLM approach, which uses Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate streamliners for Constraint Programming, to Answer Set Programming (ASP). Given an ASP encoding and a few small training instances, we prompt multiple LLMs to propose candidate constraints. Candidates that cause syntax errors, render satisfiable instances unsatisfiable, or degrade performance on all training instances are discarded. The surviving streamliners are evaluated together with the original encoding, and we report results for a virtual best encoding (VBE) that, for each instance, selects the fastest among the original encoding and its streamlined variants. On three ASP Competition benchmarks (Partner Units Problem, Sokoban, Towers of Hanoi), the VBE achieves speedups of up to 4--5x over the original encoding. Different LLMs produce semantically diverse constraints, not mere syntactic variations, indicating that the approach captures genuine problem structure.

analysis.tldr: 用LLM为Answer Set Programming自动生成流线约束，在三个基准上实现4-5倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 组合问题的搜索空间巨大，流线约束能有效剪枝，但手工设计费时费力，需要自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大语言模型为Answer Set Programming自动生成有效的流线约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同LLM生成的约束语义多样，而非仅语法变化，表明方法能捕捉问题结构。
analysis.method: 基于StreamLLM方法，给定ASP编码和小训练实例，用多个LLM生成候选约束，过滤掉语法错误、导致不可满足或性能下降的候选，保留的流线约束与原编码组合成虚拟最佳编码（VBE）。
contributions: 将StreamLLM方法从约束编程扩展到Answer Set Programming。
在三个ASP竞赛基准上验证了VBE可获得4-5倍加速。
analysis.experiments: 在Partner Units Problem、Sokoban、Towers of Hanoi三个ASP竞赛基准上测试，VBE相比原编码加速4-5倍。
limitations: 仅测试了三个基准，泛化性未知。

papers.title: Talking to a Know-It-All GPT or a Second-Guesser Claude? How Repair reveals unreliable Multi-Turn Behavior in LLMs
papers.abstract: Repair, an important resource for resolving trouble in human-human conversation, remains underexplored in human-LLM interaction. In this study, we investigate how LLMs engage in the interactive process of repair in multi-turn dialogues around solvable and unsolvable math questions. We examine whether models initiate repair themselves and how they respond to user-initiated repair. Our results show strong differences across models: reactions range from being almost completely resistant to (appropriate) repair attempts to being highly susceptible and easily manipulated. We further demonstrate that once conversations extend beyond a single turn, model behavior becomes more distinctive and less predictable across systems. Overall, our findings indicate that each tested LLM exhibits its own characteristic form of unreliability in the context of repair.

analysis.tldr: LLM在多轮对话中表现出不同的修复行为，从完全抗拒到过度顺从，揭示了系统特有的不可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 修复是人类对话中解决沟通障碍的重要机制，但在人-LLM交互中尚未被充分研究，理解LLM的修复行为有助于提升对话系统的可靠性和鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 研究LLM在多轮对话中如何参与修复过程，包括主动发起修复和响应用户发起的修复，特别是在可解与不可解数学问题上的表现差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同LLM在修复行为上表现出强烈差异：有的几乎完全抗拒适当的修复尝试，有的则高度易受影响且容易被操纵；一旦对话超过单轮，模型行为变得更加独特且不可预测。
analysis.method: 通过设计可解与不可解的数学问题，构建多轮对话场景，分析LLM在修复过程中的行为模式，包括主动修复和响应修复。
contributions: 首次系统研究LLM在多轮对话中的修复行为，揭示了不同模型在修复上的显著差异。
发现对话轮次增加会导致模型行为更加独特和不可预测，表明多轮交互中LLM的可靠性问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对数学问题场景，可能无法推广到其他对话类型。
未深入分析修复行为差异背后的模型机制或训练数据影响。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在多轮对话中表现出不同的修复行为，从完全抗拒到过度顺从，揭示了系统特有的不可靠性。

papers.title: Industrial Surface Defect Detection via Diffusion Generation and Asymmetric Student-Teacher Network
papers.abstract: Industrial surface defect detection often suffers from limited defect samples, severe long-tailed distributions, and difficulties in accurately localizing subtle defects under complex backgrounds. To address these challenges, this paper proposes an unsupervised defect detection method that integrates a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) with an asymmetric teacher-student architecture. First, at the data level, the DDPM is trained solely on normal samples. By introducing constant-variance Gaussian perturbations and Perlin noise-based masks, high-fidelity and physically consistent defect samples along with pixel-level annotations are generated, effectively alleviating the data scarcity problem. Second, at the model level, an asymmetric dual-stream network is constructed. The teacher network provides stable representations of normal features, while the student network reconstructs normal patterns and amplifies discrepancies between normal and anomalous regions. Finally, a joint optimization strategy combining cosine similarity loss and pixel-wise segmentation supervision is adopted to achieve precise localization of subtle defects. Experimental results on the MVTecAD dataset show that the proposed method achieves 98.4\% image-level AUROC and 98.3\% pixel-level AUROC, significantly outperforming existing unsupervised and mainstream deep learning methods. The proposed approach does not require large amounts of real defect samples and enables accurate and robust industrial defect detection and localization. \keywords{Industrial defect detection \and diffusion models \and data generation \and teacher-student architecture \and pixel-level localization}

analysis.tldr: 提出扩散生成+非对称师生网络的无监督工业缺陷检测方法，在MVTecAD上达到98.4%图像级AUROC。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业表面缺陷检测面临缺陷样本少、长尾分布严重、复杂背景下微小缺陷定位困难等问题，现有方法依赖大量真实缺陷样本，实际应用受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在仅有正常样本的情况下，实现高精度、鲁棒的工业缺陷检测与像素级定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合DDPM数据生成与非对称师生网络：DDPM仅用正常样本训练，通过高斯扰动和Perlin噪声掩码生成高保真缺陷样本及像素级标注；教师网络提供正常特征稳定表示，学生网络重建正常模式并放大异常区域差异；联合优化余弦相似度损失和像素级分割损失。
contributions: 提出基于DDPM的缺陷样本生成方法，仅需正常样本即可生成高保真、物理一致的缺陷样本及像素级标注。
设计非对称师生网络架构，结合联合优化策略实现微小缺陷的精准定位。
在MVTecAD数据集上取得98.4%图像级AUROC和98.3%像素级AUROC，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在MVTecAD数据集上评估，图像级AUROC 98.4%，像素级AUROC 98.3%，与现有无监督和主流深度学习方法对比。
limitations: 方法在MVTecAD上表现优异，但未在更多工业场景或更复杂缺陷类型上验证。
DDPM生成样本的多样性可能受限于训练数据分布，极端罕见缺陷可能无法覆盖。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出扩散生成+非对称师生网络的无监督工业缺陷检测方法，在MVTecAD上达到98.4%图像级AUROC。

papers.title: Allo{SR}$^2$: Rectifying One-Step Super-Resolution to Stay Real via Allomorphic Generative Flows
papers.abstract: Real-world image super-resolution (Real-SR) has been revolutionized by leveraging the powerful generative priors of large-scale diffusion and flow-based models. However, fine-tuning these models on limited LR-HR pairs often precipitates "prior collapse" that the model sacrifices its inherent generative richness to overfit specific training degradations. This issue is further exacerbated in one-step generation, where the absence of multi-step refinement leads to significant trajectory drift and artifact generation. In this paper, we propose Allo{SR}$^2$, a novel framework that rectifies one-step SR trajectories via allomorphic generative flows to maintain high-fidelity generative realism. Specifically, we utilize Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) Guided Trajectory Initialization to establish a physically grounded starting state by aligning the degradation level of LR latent features with the optimal anchoring timestep of the pre-trained flow. To ensure a stable, curvature-free path for one-step inference, we propose Flow-Anchored Trajectory Consistency (FATC), which enforces velocity-level supervision across intermediate states. Furthermore, we develop Allomorphic Trajectory Matching (ATM), a self-adversarial alignment strategy that minimizes the distributional discrepancy between the SR flow and the generative flow in a unified vector field. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that Allo{SR}$^2$ achieves state-of-the-art performance in one-step Real-SR, offering a superior balance between restoration fidelity and generative realism while maintaining extreme efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出AlloSR²框架，通过异形生成流修正一步超分辨率轨迹，在保持生成真实感的同时实现高效真实世界图像超分辨率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散/流模型的真实世界超分辨率方法在有限数据微调时会出现“先验崩溃”，即模型牺牲生成丰富性以过拟合特定退化；一步生成中缺乏多步精炼导致轨迹漂移和伪影。
analysis.problem: 解决一步式真实世界超分辨率中的先验崩溃和轨迹漂移问题，在保持生成真实感的同时实现高效推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出微调大模型于有限LR-HR对会导致“先验崩溃”，一步生成中因缺少多步精炼而产生显著轨迹漂移和伪影。
analysis.method: 提出AlloSR²框架，包含SNR引导轨迹初始化、流锚定轨迹一致性（FATC）和异形轨迹匹配（ATM）三个模块，通过异形生成流修正一步SR轨迹。
contributions: 提出SNR引导轨迹初始化，将LR潜在特征的退化水平与预训练流的最优锚定时间步对齐，建立物理合理的起始状态。
提出流锚定轨迹一致性（FATC），在中间状态施加速度级监督，确保一步推理的稳定无曲率路径。
提出异形轨迹匹配（ATM），通过自对抗对齐策略最小化SR流与生成流在统一向量场中的分布差异。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实世界基准上进行了大量实验，AlloSR²在一步真实世界超分辨率中达到最先进性能，在恢复保真度和生成真实感之间取得优越平衡，同时保持极高效率。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练流模型的质量和泛化能力。
自对抗训练可能增加训练复杂度或不稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对一步超分辨率中的关键问题提出系统解决方案，实验充分且性能领先，与生成模型方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AlloSR²框架，通过异形生成流修正一步超分辨率轨迹，在保持生成真实感的同时实现高效真实世界图像超分辨率。

papers.title: Resolving space-sharing conflicts in road user interactions through uncertainty reduction: An active inference-based computational model
papers.abstract: Understanding how road users resolve space-sharing conflicts is important both for traffic safety and the safe deployment of autonomous vehicles. While existing models have captured specific aspects of such interactions (e.g., explicit communication), a theoretically-grounded computational framework has been lacking. In this paper, we extend a previously developed active inference-based driver behavior model to simulate interactive behavior of two agents. Our model captures three complementary mechanisms for uncertainty reduction in interaction: (i) implicit communication via direct behavioral coupling, (ii) reliance on normative expectations (stop signs, priority rules, etc.), and (iii) explicit communication. In a simplified intersection scenario, we show that normative and explicit communication cues can increase the likelihood of a successful conflict resolution. However, this relies on agents acting as expected. In situations where another agent (intentionally or unintentionally) violates normative expectations or communicates misleading information, reliance on these cues may induce collisions. These findings illustrate how active inference can provide a novel framework for modeling road user interactions which is also applicable in other fields.

analysis.tldr: 基于主动推理的模型模拟道路使用者通过不确定性解决解决空间共享冲突，发现规范性和显性沟通线索在预期行为下有效，但违规时可能导致碰撞。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解道路使用者如何解决空间共享冲突对交通安全和自动驾驶部署至关重要，但现有模型缺乏理论基础的统一计算框架。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个理论上严谨的计算模型来模拟道路使用者交互中不确定性减少的多种机制（隐式沟通、规范性期望、显性沟通）及其对冲突解决的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 规范性和显性沟通线索在代理按预期行动时能提高冲突解决成功率，但当代理违反规范性期望或传递误导信息时，依赖这些线索可能导致碰撞。
analysis.method: 扩展基于主动推理的驾驶员行为模型，模拟两个代理的交互行为，包含三种不确定性减少机制：直接行为耦合的隐式沟通、规范性期望（如停车标志、优先规则）和显性沟通。
contributions: 提出了一个基于主动推理的计算模型，统一了道路使用者交互中三种不确定性减少机制。
通过简化交叉口场景模拟，揭示了规范性和显性沟通线索在预期和违规情况下的不同效果。
analysis.experiments: 在简化交叉口场景中进行模拟，展示了规范性和显性沟通线索对冲突解决成功率的影响，并分析了代理违规行为导致的碰撞情况。
limitations: 模拟场景为简化交叉口，未考虑真实交通环境的复杂性。
模型假设代理行为基于主动推理，可能未涵盖所有实际交互策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（主动推理框架），但实验为模拟且场景简化，贡献偏理论，适合相关方向读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于主动推理的模型模拟道路使用者通过不确定性解决解决空间共享冲突，发现规范性和显性沟通线索在预期行为下有效，但违规时可能导致碰撞。

papers.title: Learning to Credit the Right Steps: Objective-aware Process Optimization for Visual Generation
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning, particularly Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has emerged as an effective framework for post-training visual generative models with human preference signals. However, its effectiveness is fundamentally limited by coarse reward credit assignment. In modern visual generation, multiple reward models are often used to capture heterogeneous objectives, such as visual quality, motion consistency, and text alignment. Existing GRPO pipelines typically collapse these rewards into a single static scalar and propagate it uniformly across the entire diffusion trajectory. This design ignores the stage-specific roles of different denoising steps and produces mistimed or incompatible optimization signals. To address this issue, we propose Objective-aware Trajectory Credit Assignment (OTCA), a structured framework for fine-grained GRPO training. OTCA consists of two key components. Trajectory-Level Credit Decomposition estimates the relative importance of different denoising steps. Multi-Objective Credit Allocation adaptively weights and combines multiple reward signals throughout the denoising process. By jointly modeling temporal credit and objective-level credit, OTCA converts coarse reward supervision into a structured, timestep-aware training signal that better matches the iterative nature of diffusion-based generation. Extensive experiments show that OTCA consistently improves both image and video generation quality across evaluation metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出OTCA框架，通过轨迹级信用分解和多目标信用分配，为视觉生成模型提供细粒度GRPO训练信号。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GRPO在视觉生成后训练中，将多个奖励模型（如视觉质量、运动一致性、文本对齐）简单聚合为静态标量并均匀传播，忽略了不同去噪步骤的阶段特定角色，导致优化信号时机不当或冲突。
analysis.problem: 如何为视觉生成模型中的GRPO训练设计细粒度的信用分配机制，以匹配扩散过程的迭代特性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有GRPO将多目标奖励坍缩为单一静态标量并均匀传播，忽略了去噪步骤的阶段特异性，产生时机不当或不相容的优化信号。
analysis.method: 提出OTCA框架，包含两个组件：轨迹级信用分解（估计不同去噪步骤的相对重要性）和多目标信用分配（自适应加权组合多个奖励信号），将粗粒度奖励监督转换为结构化、时间步感知的训练信号。
contributions: 提出OTCA框架，实现细粒度GRPO训练，通过轨迹级信用分解和多目标信用分配改善视觉生成。
在图像和视频生成任务上验证了OTCA的持续改进效果。
analysis.experiments: 在图像和视频生成任务上进行广泛实验，结果表明OTCA在多个评估指标上一致提升生成质量。
limitations: 可能依赖多个奖励模型的设计，奖励模型的质量影响最终效果。
计算开销可能增加，因为需要估计每个时间步的信用权重。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对GRPO在视觉生成中的信用分配问题提出结构化解决方案，实验验证有效，与扩散模型和强化学习后训练方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OTCA框架，通过轨迹级信用分解和多目标信用分配，为视觉生成模型提供细粒度GRPO训练信号。

papers.title: Adaptive Slicing-Assisted Hyper Inference for Enhanced Small Object Detection in High-Resolution Imagery
papers.abstract: Deep learning-based object detectors have achieved remarkable success across numerous computer vision applications, yet they continue to struggle with small object detection in high-resolution aerial and satellite imagery, where dense object distributions, variable shooting angles, diminutive target sizes, and substantial inter-class variability pose formidable challenges. Existing slicing strategies that partition high-resolution images into manageable patches have demonstrated promising results for enlarging the effective receptive field of small targets; however, their reliance on fixed slice dimensions introduces significant redundant computation, inflating inference cost and undermining detection speed. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Adaptive Slicing-Assisted Hyper Inference (ASAHI)}, a novel slicing framework that shifts the paradigm from prescribing a fixed slice size to adaptively determining the optimal number of slices according to image resolution, thereby substantially mitigating redundant computation while preserving beneficial overlap between adjacent patches. ASAHI integrates three synergistic components: (1)an adaptive resolution-aware slicing algorithm that dynamically generates 6 or 12 overlapping patches based on a learned threshold, (2)a slicing-assisted fine-tuning (SAF) strategy that constructs augmented training data comprising both full-resolution and sliced image patches, and (3)a Cluster-DIoU-NMS (CDN) post-processing module that combines the geometric merging efficiency of Cluster-NMS with the center-distance-aware suppression of DIoU-NMS to achieve robust duplicate elimination in crowded scenes. Extensive experiments on VisDrone2019 and xView, demonstrate that ASAHI achieves state-of-the-art performance with 56.8% on VisDrone2019-DET-val and 22.7% on xView-test, while reducing inference time by 20-25% compared to the baseline SAHI method.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应切片超推理框架，通过动态确定切片数量减少冗余计算，提升高分辨率图像中小目标检测的精度和速度。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率遥感图像中小目标检测面临目标小、分布密集、类间差异大等挑战，现有固定尺寸切片方法引入大量冗余计算，影响推理效率。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地确定切片数量以在保持检测精度的同时减少冗余计算，提升小目标检测的推理速度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定尺寸切片策略虽能扩大有效感受野，但导致冗余计算和推理成本增加。
analysis.method: 提出自适应切片超推理框架，包含自适应分辨率感知切片算法、切片辅助微调策略和Cluster-DIoU-NMS后处理模块。
contributions: 提出自适应切片超推理框架，动态确定切片数量以减少冗余计算。
设计切片辅助微调策略和Cluster-DIoU-NMS后处理模块，提升检测精度和去重效果。
analysis.experiments: 在VisDrone2019和xView数据集上，VisDrone2019-DET-val达到56.8%，xView-test达到22.7%，推理时间比基线SAHI减少20-25%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定阈值学习，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅针对高分辨率遥感图像，其他场景适用性未知。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应切片超推理框架，通过动态确定切片数量减少冗余计算，提升高分辨率图像中小目标检测的精度和速度。

papers.title: UAF: A Unified Audio Front-end LLM for Full-Duplex Speech Interaction
papers.abstract: Full-duplex speech interaction, as the most natural and intuitive mode of human communication, is driving artificial intelligence toward more human-like conversational systems. Traditional cascaded speech processing pipelines suffer from critical limitations, including accumulated latency, information loss, and error propagation across modules. To address these issues, recent efforts focus on the end-to-end audio large language models (LLMs) like GPT-4o, which primarily unify speech understanding and generation task. However, most of these models are inherently half-duplex, and rely on a suite of separate, task-specific front-end components, such as voice activity detection (VAD) and turn-taking detection (TD). In our development of speech assistant, we observed that optimizing the speech front-end is equally crucial as advancing the back-end unified model for achieving seamless, responsive interactions. To bridge this gap, we propose the first unified audio front-end LLM (UAF) tailored for full-duplex speech systems. Our model reformulates diverse audio front-end tasks into a single auto-regressive sequence prediction problem, including VAD, TD, speaker recognition (SR), automatic speech recognition (ASR) and question answer (QA). It takes streaming fixed-duration audio chunk (e.g., 600 ms) as input, leverages a reference audio prompt to anchor the target speaker at the beginning, and regressively generates discrete tokens encoding both semantic content and system-level state controls (e.g., interruption signals). Experiments demonstrate that our model achieves leading performance across multiple audio front-end tasks and significantly enhances response latency and interruption accuracy in real-world interaction scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个统一音频前端LLM（UAF），将VAD、TD、SR、ASR和QA等任务统一为自回归序列预测，实现全双工语音交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统级联语音处理存在延迟累积、信息丢失和错误传播，现有端到端音频LLM多为半双工且依赖独立前端组件，优化前端对实现无缝交互至关重要。
analysis.problem: 现有全双工语音系统缺乏统一的前端模型，导致多任务分离、延迟高、交互不流畅。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将VAD、TD、SR、ASR和QA等前端任务统一为自回归序列预测问题，以流式固定时长音频块为输入，使用参考音频提示锚定目标说话人，回归生成离散token编码语义内容和系统级状态控制（如中断信号）。
contributions: 提出首个统一音频前端LLM（UAF），专为全双工语音系统设计。
将多种前端任务（VAD、TD、SR、ASR、QA）统一为单一自回归序列预测框架。
在多个前端任务上达到领先性能，并在真实交互场景中显著提升响应延迟和中断准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个音频前端任务上评估，并测试了真实交互场景中的响应延迟和中断准确性，结果显示领先性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定音频块长度（如600ms），对更短或更长块需进一步验证。
统一模型可能在某些任务上不如专用模型精细。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，统一前端任务有实际应用价值，实验显示性能提升，但摘要未提供详细对比。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个统一音频前端LLM（UAF），将VAD、TD、SR、ASR和QA等任务统一为自回归序列预测，实现全双工语音交互。

papers.title: Sherpa.ai Privacy-Preserving Multi-Party Entity Alignment without Intersection Disclosure for Noisy Identifiers
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training among multiple parties without centralizing raw data. There are two main paradigms in FL: Horizontal FL (HFL), where all participants share the same feature space but hold different samples, and Vertical FL (VFL), where parties possess complementary features for the same set of samples. A prerequisite for VFL training is privacy-preserving entity alignment (PPEA), which establishes a common index of samples across parties (alignment) without revealing which samples are shared between them. Conventional private set intersection (PSI) achieves alignment but leaks intersection membership, exposing sensitive relationships between datasets. The standard private set union (PSU) mitigates this risk by aligning on the union of identifiers rather than the intersection. However, existing approaches are often limited to two parties or lack support for typo-tolerant matching. In this paper, we introduce the Sherpa.ai multi-party PSU protocol for VFL, a PPEA method that hides intersection membership and enables both exact and noisy matching. The protocol generalizes two-party approaches to multiple parties with low communication overhead and offers two variants: an order-preserving version for exact alignment and an unordered version tolerant to typographical and formatting discrepancies. We prove correctness and privacy, analyze communication and computational (exponentiation) complexity, and formalize a universal index mapping from local records to a shared index space. This multi-party PSU offers a scalable, mathematically grounded protocol for PPEA in real-world VFL deployments, such as multi-institutional healthcare disease detection, collaborative risk modeling between banks and insurers, and cross-domain fraud detection between telecommunications and financial institutions, while preserving intersection privacy.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种支持多参与方、容忍噪声标识符的隐私保护实体对齐协议，隐藏交集成员关系。
analysis.research_motivation: 纵向联邦学习需要隐私保护实体对齐，但现有方法要么泄露交集成员关系，要么仅支持两方或精确匹配，无法满足多机构协作中隐私和容错需求。
analysis.problem: 设计一种多参与方、隐藏交集成员关系、支持精确和噪声匹配的隐私保护实体对齐协议。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Sherpa.ai多参与方私有集合并集协议，包含保序变体（精确对齐）和无序变体（容忍拼写和格式差异），通过低通信开销将两方方法推广到多方，并形式化通用索引映射。
contributions: 提出首个支持多参与方、隐藏交集成员关系的私有集合并集协议，适用于纵向联邦学习。
提供两种变体：保序精确对齐和无序噪声容忍对齐，并证明正确性和隐私性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未在真实大规模数据集上验证效率。
噪声匹配的容错范围可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且理论扎实，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注隐私保护联邦学习的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种支持多参与方、容忍噪声标识符的隐私保护实体对齐协议，隐藏交集成员关系。

papers.title: Thinking Before Matching: A Reinforcement Reasoning Paradigm Towards General Person Re-Identification
papers.abstract: Learning identity-discriminative representations with multi-scene generality has become a critical objective in person re-identification (ReID). However, mainstream perception-driven paradigms tend to identify fitting from massive annotated data rather than identity-causal cues understanding, which presents a fragile representation against multiple disruptions. In this work, ReID-R is proposed as a novel reasoning-driven paradigm that achieves explicit identity understanding and reasoning by incorporating chain-of-thought into the ReID pipeline. Specifically, ReID-R consists of a two-stage contribution: (i) Discriminative reasoning warm-up, where a model is trained in a CoT label-free manner to acquire identity-aware feature understanding; and (ii) Efficient reinforcement learning, which proposes a non-trivial sampling to construct scene-generalizable data. On this basis, ReID-R leverages high-quality reward signals to guide the model toward focusing on ID-related cues, achieving accurate reasoning and correct responses. Extensive experiments on multiple ReID benchmarks demonstrate that ReID-R achieves competitive identity discrimination as superior methods using only 14.3K non-trivial data (20.9% of the existing data scale). Furthermore, benefit from inherent reasoning, ReID-R can provide high-quality interpretation for results.

analysis.tldr: 提出ReID-R，将思维链和强化学习引入行人重识别，实现推理驱动的身份理解，仅用20.9%数据即达竞争性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有行人重识别方法依赖大量标注数据学习外观特征，缺乏对身份因果线索的理解，导致在多场景干扰下表现脆弱。
analysis.problem: 如何让行人重识别模型具备显式的身份推理能力，从而在少量数据下实现鲁棒的跨场景识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 主流感知驱动范式从海量标注中学习拟合，而非理解身份因果线索，导致表示易受干扰。
analysis.method: 两阶段方法：1) 无标签思维链训练获取身份感知特征；2) 高效强化学习，通过非平凡采样构建场景泛化数据，利用高质量奖励信号引导模型关注身份相关线索。
contributions: 提出推理驱动的行人重识别范式ReID-R，首次将思维链引入该领域。
设计无标签思维链训练和高效强化学习框架，仅用20.9%数据量达到竞争性能。
提供可解释的推理结果。
analysis.experiments: 在多个行人重识别基准上实验，仅用14.3K非平凡数据（现有数据规模的20.9%）即达到与优越方法相当的识别性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定场景的非平凡采样策略。
推理过程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将推理引入ReID，数据效率高，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ReID-R，将思维链和强化学习引入行人重识别，实现推理驱动的身份理解，仅用20.9%数据即达竞争性能。

papers.title: Attention-based Multi-modal Deep Learning Model of Spatio-temporal Crop Yield Prediction with Satellite, Soil and Climate Data
papers.abstract: Crop yield prediction is one of the most important challenge, which is crucial to world food security and policy-making decisions. The conventional forecasting techniques are limited in their accuracy with reference to the fact that they utilize static data sources that do not reflect the dynamic and intricate relationships that exist between the variables of the environment over time [5,13]. This paper presents Attention-Based Multi-Modal Deep Learning Framework (ABMMDLF), which is suggested to be used in high-accuracy spatio-temporal crop yield prediction. The model we use combines multi-year satellite imagery, high-resolution time-series of meteorological data and initial soil properties as opposed to the traditional models which use only one of the aforementioned factors [12, 21]. The main architecture involves the use of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to extract spatial features and a Temporal Attention Mechanism to adaptively weight important phenological periods targeted by the algorithm to change over time and condition on spatial features of images and video sequences. As can be experimentally seen, the proposed research work provides an R^2 score of 0.89, which is far better than the baseline models do.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于注意力机制的多模态深度学习框架，融合卫星、土壤和气候数据实现高精度时空作物产量预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统作物产量预测方法依赖静态数据源，无法捕捉环境变量间的动态复杂关系，精度有限，而精准预测对粮食安全和政策制定至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何融合多模态时空数据（卫星图像、气象时间序列、土壤属性）并利用注意力机制提升作物产量预测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ABMMDLF框架，使用CNN提取空间特征，结合时间注意力机制自适应加权关键物候期，融合多年卫星图像、高分辨率气象时间序列和初始土壤属性。
contributions: 提出多模态融合框架，整合卫星、土壤和气候数据用于作物产量预测。
引入时间注意力机制，动态关注重要物候期，提升预测精度。

papers.title: An Object-Centered Data Acquisition Method for 3D Gaussian Splatting using Mobile Phones
papers.abstract: Data acquisition through mobile phones remains a challenge for 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). In this work we target the object-centered scenario and enable reliable mobile acquisition by providing on-device capture guidance and recording onboard sensor signals for offline reconstruction. After the calibration step, the device orientations are aligned to a baseline frame to obtain relative poses, and the optical axis of the camera is mapped to an object-centered spherical grid for uniform viewpoint indexing. To curb polar sampling bias, we compute area-weighted spherical coverage in real-time and guide the user's motion accordingly. We compare the proposed method with RealityScan and the free-capture strategy. Our method achieves superior reconstruction quality using fewer input images compared to free capture and RealityScan. Further analysis shows that the proposed method is able to obtain more comprehensive and uniform viewpoint coverage during object-centered acquisition.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向物体的手机采集方法，通过实时引导和球面覆盖优化提升3DGS重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 手机采集3DGS数据存在挑战，现有方法缺乏引导导致视角覆盖不均，影响重建质量。
analysis.problem: 如何利用手机在物体为中心的场景下高效采集均匀视角数据以提升3DGS重建效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自由采集和RealityScan等方法存在视角覆盖不均、极地采样偏差等问题，导致重建质量受限。
analysis.method: 提供手机端采集引导，利用传感器信号进行离线标定，将相机光轴映射到物体中心球面网格，实时计算面积加权球面覆盖度并引导用户运动。
contributions: 提出面向物体的手机采集方法，集成实时引导和球面覆盖优化。
通过面积加权球面覆盖度计算有效抑制极地采样偏差。
实验证明该方法用更少图像获得更优重建质量和更均匀视角覆盖。
analysis.experiments: 与RealityScan和自由采集策略对比，在重建质量和视角覆盖均匀性上取得优势。
limitations: 仅针对物体为中心场景，未涉及大场景或复杂环境。
依赖手机传感器信号，可能受传感器精度影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法实用但创新有限，实验对比充分，适合关注3DGS数据采集的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向物体的手机采集方法，通过实时引导和球面覆盖优化提升3DGS重建质量。

papers.title: ClawNet: Human-Symbiotic Agent Network for Cross-User Autonomous Cooperation
papers.abstract: Current AI agent frameworks have made remarkable progress in automating individual tasks, yet all existing systems serve a single user. Human productivity rests on the social and organizational relationships through which people coordinate, negotiate, and delegate. When agents move beyond performing tasks for one person to representing that person in collaboration with others, the infrastructure for cross-user agent collaboration is entirely absent, let alone the governance mechanisms needed to secure it. We argue that the next frontier for AI agents lies not in stronger individual capability, but in the digitization of human collaborative relationships. To this end, we propose a human-symbiotic agent paradigm. Each user owns a permanently bound agent system that collaborates on the owner's behalf, forming a network whose nodes are humans rather than agents. This paradigm rests on three governance primitives. A layered identity architecture separates a Manager Agent from multiple context-specific Identity Agents; the Manager Agent holds global knowledge but is architecturally isolated from external communication. Scoped authorization enforces per-identity access control and escalates boundary violations to the owner. Action-level accountability logs every operation against its owner's identity and authorization, ensuring full auditability. We instantiate this paradigm in ClawNet, an identity-governed agent collaboration framework that enforces identity binding and authorization verification through a central orchestrator, enabling multiple users to collaborate securely through their respective agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出ClawNet框架，通过身份治理实现跨用户AI代理安全协作。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI代理框架仅服务单用户，缺乏跨用户协作的基础设施和治理机制，限制了人类通过代理进行社会性协作的潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建安全、可审计的跨用户AI代理协作系统，使代理能代表用户与他人协作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出人类共生代理范式，包含三层治理原语：分层身份架构（Manager Agent与多个Identity Agent分离）、范围授权（按身份控制访问并上报越界）、操作级问责（记录每个操作的身份和授权）。实例化为ClawNet框架，通过中央协调器强制身份绑定和授权验证。
contributions: 提出人类共生代理范式，将代理协作网络节点从代理转向人类。
设计三层治理原语（分层身份、范围授权、操作级问责）确保安全协作。
实现ClawNet框架，通过中央协调器验证身份和授权，支持多用户安全协作。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模用户实验验证。
中央协调器可能成为性能瓶颈或单点故障。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的跨用户代理协作范式，但摘要缺乏实验验证，技术细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ClawNet框架，通过身份治理实现跨用户AI代理安全协作。

papers.title: Forage V2: Knowledge Evolution and Transfer in Autonomous Agent Organizations
papers.abstract: Autonomous agents operating in open-world tasks -- where the completion boundary is not given in advance -- face denominator blindness: they systematically underestimate the scope of the target space. Forage V1 addressed this through co-evolving evaluation (an independent Evaluator discovers what "complete" means) and method isolation (Evaluator and Planner cannot see each other's code). V2 extends the architecture from a single expedition to a learning organization: experience accumulates across runs, transfers across model capabilities, and institutional safeguards prevent knowledge degradation. We demonstrate two claims across three task types (web scraping, API queries, mathematical reasoning). Knowledge accumulation: over six runs, knowledge entries grow from 0 to 54, and denominator estimates stabilize as domain understanding deepens. Knowledge transfer: a weaker agent (Sonnet) seeded with a stronger agent's (Opus) knowledge narrows a 6.6pp coverage gap to 1.1pp, halves cost (9.40 to 5.13 USD), converges in half the rounds (mean 4.5 vs. 7.0), and three independent seeded runs arrive at exactly the same denominator estimate (266), suggesting organizational knowledge calibrates evaluation itself. V2's contribution is architectural: it designs institutions -- audit separation, contract protocols, organizational memory -- that make any agent more reliable upon entry. The accumulated experience is organizational, model-agnostic, and transferable, stored as readable documents that any future agent inherits regardless of provider or capability level.

analysis.tldr: 提出Forage V2架构，通过组织化知识积累与跨模型迁移解决开放世界任务中的分母盲视问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放世界任务中，自主智能体因无法预知完成边界而系统性低估目标空间范围（分母盲视），现有方法缺乏跨任务、跨模型的知识积累与迁移机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计架构使智能体在开放世界任务中积累可迁移的组织知识，并实现跨模型能力的高效知识传递。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Forage V2扩展了V1的协同进化评估与方法隔离，引入学习组织架构：跨运行经验积累、跨模型能力知识迁移、审计分离与合约协议等制度保障。
contributions: 提出组织化知识积累机制，使经验以可读文档形式跨运行累积。
实现跨模型知识迁移，弱智能体利用强智能体知识显著提升性能并降低成本。
analysis.experiments: 在网页抓取、API查询、数学推理三类任务上验证：知识条目从0增至54，分母估计稳定；弱智能体（Sonnet）利用强智能体（Opus）知识后覆盖率差距从6.6pp缩至1.1pp，成本减半，收敛轮次减半。
limitations: 实验仅在三种任务类型上验证，泛化性需更多场景测试。
知识迁移效果可能依赖任务类型和模型差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 架构创新性强，实验验证充分，对Agent知识积累与迁移有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Forage V2架构，通过组织化知识积累与跨模型迁移解决开放世界任务中的分母盲视问题。

papers.title: When Can We Trust Deep Neural Networks? Towards Reliable Industrial Deployment with an Interpretability Guide
papers.abstract: The deployment of AI systems in safety-critical domains, such as industrial defect inspection, autonomous driving, and medical diagnosis, is severely hampered by their lack of reliability. A single undetected erroneous prediction can lead to catastrophic outcomes. Unfortunately, there is often no alternative but to place trust in the outputs of a trained AI system, which operates without an internal safeguard to flag unreliable predictions, even in cases of high accuracy. We propose a post-hoc explanation-based indicator to detect false negatives in binary defect detection networks. To our knowledge, this is the first method to proactively identify potentially erroneous network outputs. Our core idea leverages the difference between class-specific discriminative heatmaps and class-agnostic ones. We compute the difference in their intersection over union (IoU) as a reliability score. An adversarial enhancement method is further introduced to amplify this disparity. Evaluations on two industrial defect detection benchmarks show our method effectively identifies false negatives. With adversarial enhancement, it achieves 100\% recall, albeit with a trade-off for true negatives. Our work thus advocates for a new and trustworthy deployment paradigm: data-model-explanation-output, moving beyond conventional end-to-end systems to provide critical support for reliable AI in real-world applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于解释的可靠性指标，用于检测工业缺陷检测网络中的假阴性，实现100%召回率。
analysis.research_motivation: 在安全关键领域（如工业缺陷检测）中，AI系统缺乏可靠性，单个未检测到的错误预测可能导致灾难性后果，而现有方法无法主动标记不可靠预测。
analysis.problem: 如何主动识别深度神经网络在工业缺陷检测中的假阴性（错误预测）？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 类特定判别热图与类无关热图之间的差异可用于指示预测可靠性，且对抗增强可放大这种差异。
analysis.method: 提出基于后验解释的可靠性指标：计算类特定热图与类无关热图的交并比（IoU）差异作为可靠性分数，并引入对抗增强方法放大差异。
contributions: 首次提出主动识别网络错误输出的方法，基于解释差异检测假阴性。
在工业缺陷检测基准上实现100%假阴性召回率，并引入新的部署范式：数据-模型-解释-输出。
analysis.experiments: 在两个工业缺陷检测基准上评估，对抗增强后假阴性召回率达100%，但以牺牲真阴性为代价。
limitations: 对抗增强可能降低真阴性率（误报增加）。
方法仅在二分类缺陷检测任务上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对可靠性痛点，实验有效但局限在特定任务，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于解释的可靠性指标，用于检测工业缺陷检测网络中的假阴性，实现100%召回率。

papers.title: SketchFaceGS: Real-Time Sketch-Driven Face Editing and Generation with Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian representations have emerged as a powerful paradigm for digital head modeling, achieving photorealistic quality with real-time rendering. However, intuitive and interactive creation or editing of 3D Gaussian head models remains challenging. Although 2D sketches provide an ideal interaction modality for fast, intuitive conceptual design, they are sparse, depth-ambiguous, and lack high-frequency appearance cues, making it difficult to infer dense, geometrically consistent 3D Gaussian structures from strokes - especially under real-time constraints. To address these challenges, we propose SketchFaceGS, the first sketch-driven framework for real-time generation and editing of photorealistic 3D Gaussian head models from 2D sketches. Our method uses a feed-forward, coarse-to-fine architecture. A Transformer-based UV feature-prediction module first reconstructs a coarse but geometrically consistent UV feature map from the input sketch, and then a 3D UV feature enhancement module refines it with high-frequency, photorealistic detail to produce a high-fidelity 3D head. For editing, we introduce a UV Mask Fusion technique combined with a layer-by-layer feature-fusion strategy, enabling precise, real-time, free-viewpoint modifications. Extensive experiments show that SketchFaceGS outperforms existing methods in both generation fidelity and editing flexibility, producing high-quality, editable 3D heads from sketches in a single forward pass.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于草图实时驱动3D高斯人头模型生成与编辑的框架，采用粗到细的UV特征预测与增强架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D高斯表示在数字头部建模中实现了照片级真实感和实时渲染，但直观交互式创建或编辑仍具挑战；2D草图虽提供快速直观的设计交互，但稀疏、深度模糊且缺乏高频外观线索，难以实时推断稠密几何一致的3D高斯结构。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏、深度模糊的2D草图实时生成和编辑具有照片级真实感的3D高斯人头模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SketchFaceGS，采用前馈粗到细架构：基于Transformer的UV特征预测模块从输入草图重建粗略但几何一致的UV特征图，然后3D UV特征增强模块用高频照片级细节细化，生成高保真3D人头；编辑时引入UV Mask融合与逐层特征融合策略。
contributions: 首个草图驱动的实时照片级3D高斯人头生成与编辑框架。
提出粗到细的UV特征预测与增强架构，以及UV Mask融合编辑技术。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖草图质量，极端抽象草图效果未知。
仅针对头部模型，泛化到全身或其他物体待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，首个草图驱动3D高斯人头编辑框架，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个基于草图实时驱动3D高斯人头模型生成与编辑的框架，采用粗到细的UV特征预测与增强架构。

papers.title: Benchmarking Vision Foundation Models for Domain-Generalizable Face Anti-Spoofing
papers.abstract: Face Anti-Spoofing (FAS) remains challenging due to the requirement for robust domain generalization across unseen environments. While recent trends leverage Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for semantic supervision, these multimodal approaches often demand prohibitive computational resources and exhibit high inference latency. Furthermore, their efficacy is inherently limited by the quality of the underlying visual features. This paper revisits the potential of vision-only foundation models to establish a highly efficient and robust baseline for FAS. We conduct a systematic benchmarking of 15 pre-trained models, such as supervised CNNs, supervised ViTs, and self-supervised ViTs, under severe cross-domain scenarios including the MICO and Limited Source Domains (LSD) protocols. Our comprehensive analysis reveals that self-supervised vision models, particularly DINOv2 with Registers, significantly suppress attention artifacts and capture critical, fine-grained spoofing cues. Combined with Face Anti-Spoofing Data Augmentation (FAS-Aug), Patch-wise Data Augmentation (PDA) and Attention-weighted Patch Loss (APL), our proposed vision-only baseline achieves state-of-the-art performance in the MICO protocol. This baseline outperforms existing methods under the data-constrained LSD protocol while maintaining superior computational efficiency. This work provides a definitive vision-only baseline for FAS, demonstrating that optimized self-supervised vision transformers can serve as a backbone for both vision-only and future multimodal FAS systems. The project page is available at: https://gsisaoki.github.io/FAS-VFMbenchmark-CVPRW2026/ .

analysis.tldr: 系统基准测试15个视觉基础模型，发现自监督ViT（DINOv2+Registers）在域泛化人脸防伪中表现最优，结合数据增强和注意力损失实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有FAS方法依赖VLM，计算成本高且延迟大，且视觉特征质量限制其效果；需要探索高效且鲁棒的纯视觉基线。
analysis.problem: 如何利用纯视觉基础模型实现高效、鲁棒的域泛化人脸防伪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自监督视觉模型（尤其是DINOv2+Registers）能显著抑制注意力伪影并捕获细粒度欺骗线索，优于监督CNN和ViT。
analysis.method: 系统基准测试15个预训练模型（监督CNN、监督ViT、自监督ViT），结合FAS-Aug、PDA和APL损失，构建纯视觉基线。
contributions: 首次系统基准测试15个视觉基础模型在域泛化FAS上的表现，揭示自监督ViT的优势。
提出结合FAS-Aug、PDA和APL的纯视觉基线，在MICO和LSD协议上达到SOTA，且计算效率高。
analysis.experiments: 在MICO和LSD跨域协议上评估，与现有方法对比，纯视觉基线在MICO上SOTA，在LSD上优于现有方法且效率更高。
limitations: 仅评估了15个模型，可能未覆盖所有最新视觉基础模型。
方法在更复杂攻击或极端域偏移下的泛化性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 系统基准测试和高效基线有实用价值，但方法创新为组合现有技术，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统基准测试15个视觉基础模型，发现自监督ViT（DINOv2+Registers）在域泛化人脸防伪中表现最优，结合数据增强和注意力损失实现SOTA。

papers.title: How Far Are Video Models from True Multimodal Reasoning?
papers.abstract: Despite remarkable progress toward general-purpose video models, a critical question remains unanswered: how far are these models from achieving true multimodal reasoning? Existing benchmarks fail to address this question rigorously, as they remain constrained by straightforward task designs and fragmented evaluation metrics that neglect complex multimodal reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce CLVG-Bench, an evaluation framework designed to probe video models' zero-shot reasoning capabilities via Context Learning in Video Generation. CLVG-Bench comprises more than 1,000 high-quality, manually annotated metadata across 6 categories and 47 subcategories, covering complex scenarios including physical simulation, logical reasoning, and interactive contexts. To enable rigorous and scalable assessment, we further propose an Adaptive Video Evaluator (AVE) that aligns with human expert perception using minimal annotations, delivering interpretable textual feedback across diverse video context tasks. Extensive experiments reveal a striking answer to our central question: while state-of-the-art (SOTA) video models, such as Seedance 2.0, demonstrate competence on certain understanding and reasoning subtasks, they fall substantially short with logically grounded and interactive generation tasks (achieving success rates <25% and ~0%, respectively), exposing multimodal reasoning and physical grounding as critical bottlenecks. By systematically quantifying these limitations, the proposed method provides actionable feedbacks and a clear roadmap toward truly robust, general-purpose video models. CLVG-Bench and code are released here.

analysis.tldr: 提出CLVG-Bench基准和AVE评估器，系统量化视频模型在多模态推理上的不足，发现现有模型在逻辑推理和交互生成任务上成功率极低。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频模型基准任务设计简单、评估指标碎片化，无法严格衡量模型是否具备真正的多模态推理能力，亟需一个系统性的评估框架来揭示当前瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能全面、严格评估视频模型零样本多模态推理能力的基准和自动化评估方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但实验发现SOTA视频模型在逻辑推理和交互生成任务上成功率分别低于25%和接近0%，暴露了多模态推理和物理基础的关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建CLVG-Bench基准（含1000+人工标注元数据，覆盖6大类47子类）和自适应视频评估器（AVE），通过少量标注对齐人类专家感知，提供可解释的文本反馈。
contributions: 提出CLVG-Bench基准，系统覆盖物理模拟、逻辑推理、交互上下文等复杂场景，用于评估视频模型的零样本推理能力。
提出自适应视频评估器（AVE），以最小标注量对齐人类感知，提供可解释的文本反馈。
通过大量实验量化了SOTA视频模型在多模态推理上的严重不足，为未来研究提供路线图。
analysis.experiments: 在CLVG-Bench上评估了多个SOTA视频模型（如Seedance 2.0），发现其在逻辑推理和交互生成任务上成功率极低。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖零样本推理，未涉及微调或领域适应场景。
AVE评估器可能对某些边缘案例的反馈不够准确。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计系统全面，评估方法有创新，实验揭示了关键瓶颈，对视频生成和推理领域有重要指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CLVG-Bench基准和AVE评估器，系统量化视频模型在多模态推理上的不足，发现现有模型在逻辑推理和交互生成任务上成功率极低。

papers.title: Improved Anomaly Detection in Medical Images via Mean Shift Density Enhancement
papers.abstract: Anomaly detection in medical imaging is essential for identifying rare pathological conditions, particularly when annotated abnormal samples are limited. We propose a hybrid anomaly detection framework that integrates self-supervised representation learning with manifold-based density estimation, a combination that remains largely unexplored in this domain. Medical images are first embedded into a latent feature space using pretrained, potentially domain-specific, backbones. These representations are then refined via Mean Shift Density Enhancement (MSDE), an iterative manifold-shifting procedure that moves samples toward regions of higher likelihood. Anomaly scores are subsequently computed using Gaussian density estimation in a PCA-reduced latent space, where Mahalanobis distance measures deviation from the learned normal distribution. The framework follows a one-class learning paradigm and requires only normal samples for training. Extensive experiments on seven medical imaging datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. MSDE achieves the highest AUC on four datasets and the highest Average Precision on five datasets, including near-perfect performance on brain tumor detection (0.981 AUC/AP). These results underscore the potential of the proposed framework as a scalable clinical decision-support tool for early disease detection, screening in low-label settings, and robust deployment across diverse imaging modalities.

analysis.tldr: 提出Mean Shift Density Enhancement (MSDE)方法，通过自监督表征学习和流形密度估计提升医学图像异常检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像异常检测对识别罕见病理至关重要，但标注异常样本有限，现有方法在无监督场景下性能不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在仅使用正常样本训练的条件下，提高医学图像异常检测的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合自监督表征学习与基于流形的密度估计，通过Mean Shift Density Enhancement (MSDE)迭代移动样本到高似然区域，在PCA降维后的潜在空间中使用高斯密度估计和马氏距离计算异常分数。
contributions: 提出MSDE框架，融合自监督学习和流形密度估计用于医学图像异常检测。
在七个医学影像数据集上取得SOTA，四个数据集AUC最高，五个数据集AP最高。
analysis.experiments: 在七个医学影像数据集上进行实验，包括脑肿瘤检测（AUC/AP 0.981），展示了SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练骨干网络的质量。
PCA降维可能丢失部分判别信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，在医学图像异常检测领域有显著应用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Mean Shift Density Enhancement (MSDE)方法，通过自监督表征学习和流形密度估计提升医学图像异常检测性能。

papers.title: Inductive Subgraphs as Shortcuts: Causal Disentanglement for Heterophilic Graph Learning
papers.abstract: Heterophily is a prevalent property of real-world graphs and is well known to impair the performance of homophilic Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). Prior work has attempted to adapt GNNs to heterophilic graphs through non-local neighbor extension or architecture refinement. However, the fundamental reasons behind misclassifications remain poorly understood. In this work, we take a novel perspective by examining recurring inductive subgraphs, empirically and theoretically showing that they act as spurious shortcuts that mislead GNNs and reinforce non-causal correlations in heterophilic graphs. To address this, we adopt a causal inference perspective to analyze and correct the biased learning behavior induced by shortcut inductive subgraphs. We propose a debiased causal graph that explicitly blocks confounding and spillover paths responsible for these shortcuts. Guided by this causal graph, we introduce Causal Disentangled GNN (CD-GNN), a principled framework that disentangles spurious inductive subgraphs from true causal subgraphs by explicitly blocking non-causal paths. By focusing on genuine causal signals, CD-GNN substantially improves the robustness and accuracy of node classification in heterophilic graphs. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets not only validate our theoretical findings but also demonstrate that our proposed CD-GNN outperforms state-of-the-art heterophily-aware baselines.

analysis.tldr: 发现异配图中的归纳子图作为虚假捷径误导GNN，提出因果解缠框架CD-GNN来阻断非因果路径，提升节点分类鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 异配图普遍存在且损害同配GNN性能，现有方法通过非局部邻居扩展或架构改进适应异配图，但对误分类的根本原因理解不足。
analysis.problem: 异配图中归纳子图作为虚假捷径导致GNN学习非因果关联，影响节点分类准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 归纳子图在异配图中充当虚假捷径，强化非因果相关性，误导GNN分类。
analysis.method: 提出因果解缠GNN（CD-GNN），通过构建去偏因果图显式阻断混淆和溢出路径，将虚假归纳子图与真实因果子图解缠。
contributions: 从因果视角揭示归纳子图作为异配图中虚假捷径的机制，并通过理论和实验验证。
提出CD-GNN框架，通过阻断非因果路径实现因果解缠，提升异配图节点分类的鲁棒性和准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界数据集上验证了理论发现，并表明CD-GNN优于最先进的异配感知基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定因果图假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
计算复杂度可能较高，未在摘要中提及效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，因果视角新颖，实验验证充分，对异配图学习有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现异配图中的归纳子图作为虚假捷径误导GNN，提出因果解缠框架CD-GNN来阻断非因果路径，提升节点分类鲁棒性。

papers.title: SCURank: Ranking Multiple Candidate Summaries with Summary Content Units for Enhanced Summarization
papers.abstract: Small language models (SLMs), such as BART, can achieve summarization performance comparable to large language models (LLMs) via distillation. However, existing LLM-based ranking strategies for summary candidates suffer from instability, while classical metrics (e.g., ROUGE) are insufficient to rank high-quality summaries. To address these issues, we introduce \textbf{SCURank}, a framework that enhances summarization by leveraging \textbf{Summary Content Units (SCUs)}. Instead of relying on unstable comparisons or surface-level overlap, SCURank evaluates summaries based on the richness and semantic importance of information content. We investigate the effectiveness of SCURank in distilling summaries from multiple diverse LLMs. Experimental results demonstrate that SCURank outperforms traditional metrics and LLM-based ranking methods across evaluation measures and datasets. Furthermore, our findings show that incorporating diverse LLM summaries enhances model abstractiveness and overall distilled model performance, validating the benefits of information-centric ranking in multi-LLM distillation. The code for SCURank is available at https://github.com/IKMLab/SCURank.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于摘要内容单元（SCU）的排序框架SCURank，用于从多个LLM候选摘要中选择高质量摘要以提升SLM蒸馏性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的候选摘要排序策略不稳定，而传统指标（如ROUGE）不足以区分高质量摘要，亟需更可靠的排序方法。
analysis.problem: 如何稳定且有效地从多个LLM生成的候选摘要中选出信息丰富且语义重要的摘要，以提升小语言模型的蒸馏效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SCURank框架，利用摘要内容单元（SCU）评估摘要的信息丰富度和语义重要性，替代不稳定比较或表面重叠度量。
contributions: 提出SCURank，一种基于SCU的排序方法，用于从多个LLM候选摘要中选择高质量摘要。
实验证明SCURank在多个评估指标和数据集上优于传统指标和基于LLM的排序方法。
发现引入多样LLM摘要可增强模型抽象性和蒸馏性能，验证了信息中心排序在多LLM蒸馏中的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估，对比传统指标和LLM排序方法，SCURank表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖SCU的构建质量，未讨论SCU自动提取的准确性。
实验仅在摘要任务上验证，未扩展到其他文本生成任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验信息有限，且未涉及VLM/视频生成等核心方向，适合保存后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于摘要内容单元（SCU）的排序框架SCURank，用于从多个LLM候选摘要中选择高质量摘要以提升SLM蒸馏性能。

papers.title: Reasoning-Aware AIGC Detection via Alignment and Reinforcement
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement and widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) have elevated the need for reliable AI-generated content (AIGC) detection, which remains challenging as models evolve. We introduce AIGC-text-bank, a comprehensive multi-domain dataset with diverse LLM sources and authorship scenarios, and propose REVEAL, a detection framework that generates interpretable reasoning chains before classification. Our approach uses a two-stage training strategy: supervised fine-tuning to establish reasoning capabilities, followed by reinforcement learning to improve accuracy, improve logical consistency, and reduce hallucinations. Extensive experiments show that REVEAL achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks, offering a robust and transparent solution for AIGC detection. The project is open-source at https://aka.ms/reveal

analysis.tldr: 提出REVEAL框架，通过对齐和强化学习增强AIGC检测的可解释推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM快速发展使AIGC检测需求迫切，但现有方法缺乏可解释性且难以适应模型演进。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高准确率且具有可解释推理链的AIGC文本检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段训练：监督微调建立推理能力，强化学习提升准确率、逻辑一致性并减少幻觉。
contributions: 构建多领域AIGC文本数据集AIGC-text-bank
提出REVEAL框架，结合推理链生成与分类
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，项目已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖数据集多样性
推理链质量评估未详细说明
